LanguageData.VCHE_FakeDucts.description: An air duct used by the AC network to transport air between the AC units and compressors. These do not transport anything.
LanguageData.VCHE_FakeDucts.label: fake ducts
LanguageData.VCHE_FakePipes.description: Steel pipes. These do not transport anything.
LanguageData.VCHE_FakePipes.label: fake pipe
LanguageData.VFE_CarpetBorder_Corner.description: A simple, paintable cloth carpet border. To be placed in the corner.
LanguageData.VFE_CarpetBorder_Corner.label: carpet border corner
LanguageData.VFE_CarpetBorder_Straight.description: A simple, paintable cloth carpet border.
LanguageData.VFE_CarpetBorder_Straight.label: carpet border
LanguageData.VFE_FlagstoneBorder_Corner.description: A simple, paintable flagstone border. To be placed in the corner.
LanguageData.VFE_FlagstoneBorder_Corner.label: flagstone border corner
LanguageData.VFE_FlagstoneBorder_Straight.label: flagstone border
LanguageData.VFE_MetalBorder_Corner.description: A simple, paintable metal border. To be placed in the corner.
LanguageData.VFE_MetalBorder_Corner.label: metal border corner
LanguageData.VFE_MetalBorder_Straight.label: metal border
LanguageData.VFE_StoneBorder_Corner.description: A simple, paintable stone border. To be placed in the corner.
LanguageData.VFE_StoneBorder_Corner.label: stone border corner
LanguageData.VFE_StoneBorder_Straight.label: stone border
LanguageData.VFE_WarningBorder_Corner.description: A simple, paintable warning border. To be placed in the corner.
LanguageData.VFE_WarningBorder_Corner.label: warning border corner
LanguageData.VFE_WarningBorder_Straight.label: warning border
LanguageData.VFE_WoodenBorder_Corner.description: A simple, paintable wooden border. To be placed in the corner.
LanguageData.VFE_WoodenBorder_Corner.label: wooden border corner
LanguageData.VFE_WoodenBorder_Straight.label: wooden border
LanguageData.VFEP_ShortWalls.description: A passable chest-height wall. Cannot support roofs.
LanguageData.VFEP_ShortWalls.label: short wall
LanguageData.VFEPD_Aaklac.description: A rare, huge flower which can be found in the deepest jungles. Its quite striking colour and nice smell makes it popular in gardening, if it can be extracted from the deep jungle, of course. This one is fake.
LanguageData.VFEPD_Aaklac.label: aaklac
LanguageData.VFEPD_AB_AlcyoniteSolar.description: Uses alcyonite solar cells to extract electricity from the sun. Inactive.
LanguageData.VFEPD_AB_AlcyoniteSolar.label: alcyonite solar generator
LanguageData.VFEPD_AB_AlcyoniteSolar_Advanced.descrip: Uses alcyonite solar cells to extract electricity from the sun. Inactive.
LanguageData.VFEPD_AB_AlcyoniteSolar_Advanced.label: advanced alcyonite solar generator
LanguageData.VFEPD_AB_AlienComplianceCenter.descripti: An experimental device that emmanates strange waves making everyone love the truly alien weather. Inactive.
LanguageData.VFEPD_AB_AlienComplianceCenter.label: ocular compliance center
LanguageData.VFEPD_AB_AncientBloodRainVent.descriptio: A massive duct that drops endlessly into the ground. It will regularly vent huge red clouds of a vaporized blood-like substance that will coalesce into a disgusting blood rain. Permanently inactive.
LanguageData.VFEPD_AB_AncientBloodRainVent.label: ancient blood rain vent
LanguageData.VFEPD_AB_AncientBone.description: This fosilized bone might have belonged to an exceptionally large Gallatross. Note: if you have the Rim of Madness - Bones mod installed, you can deconstruct these into useable bones.
LanguageData.VFEPD_AB_AncientBone.label: ancient bone
LanguageData.VFEPD_AB_AncientBrokenBone.description: This fosilized bone might have belonged to an exceptionally large Gallatross. Note: if you have the Rim of Madness - Bones mod installed, you can deconstruct these into useable bones.
LanguageData.VFEPD_AB_AncientBrokenBone.label: ancient shattered bone
LanguageData.VFEPD_AB_AncientDeathPallVent.descriptio: A massive duct that drops endlessly into the ground. It will regularly vent clouds of microscopic self-powered archites that affect corpses reanimating them to create a twisted imitation of life. Permanently inactive.
LanguageData.VFEPD_AB_AncientDeathPallVent.label: ancient death pall vent
LanguageData.VFEPD_AB_AncientFreezingVent.description: A massive duct that drops endlessly into the ground. It will regularly vent freezing cold air from an underground megastructure, dramatically lowering the temperature of the surrounding area. Permanently inactive.
LanguageData.VFEPD_AB_AncientFreezingVent.label: ancient freezing vent
LanguageData.VFEPD_AB_AncientGallatrossSkull.descript: This skull belonged to an exceptionally huge Gallatross. Look at the size of this thing! Note: if you have the Rim of Madness - Bones mod installed, you can deconstruct these into useable bones.
LanguageData.VFEPD_AB_AncientGallatrossSkull.label: ancient gallatross skull
LanguageData.VFEPD_AB_AncientGreyPallVent.description: A massive duct that drops endlessly into the ground. It will regularly vent large amounts of sickly looking smoke that will plunge the area into a preternatural darkness. Permanently inactive.
LanguageData.VFEPD_AB_AncientGreyPallVent.label: ancient gray pall vent
LanguageData.VFEPD_AB_AncientVerticalBone.description: These fosilized bones might have belonged to an exceptionally large Gallatross. Note: if you have the Rim of Madness - Bones mod installed, you can deconstruct these into useable bones.
LanguageData.VFEPD_AB_AncientVerticalBone.label: ancient bones
LanguageData.VFEPD_AB_BumbledroneHive.description: A huge mound of hardened organic matter that communicates with an extensive underground hive. This one was built out of papier mache.
LanguageData.VFEPD_AB_BumbledroneHive.label: bumbledrone hive
LanguageData.VFEPD_AB_DerelictArchonexusCore.descript: The ruined central core of an archonexus. Its broad surfaces are dusty and covered with vegetation. It seems to be long inert.
LanguageData.VFEPD_AB_DerelictArchonexusCore.label: derelict archonexus core
LanguageData.VFEPD_AB_DerelictArchotechTower.descript: A moderately-sized archotech tower rising from the ground. It seems to be long inert.
LanguageData.VFEPD_AB_DerelictArchotechTower.label: derelict archotech tower
LanguageData.VFEPD_AB_DerelictBeachUmbrella.descripti: A beach umbrella so broken that it won't even keep the sun out.
LanguageData.VFEPD_AB_DerelictBeachUmbrella.label: derelict beach umbrella
LanguageData.VFEPD_AB_DerelictMajorArchotechStructure: A large archotech structure. The dull green surface is ruiend and covered in vegetation. It seems to be long inert.
LanguageData.VFEPD_AB_DerelictPoolLadder.description: This pool ladder has seen better days.
LanguageData.VFEPD_AB_DerelictPoolLadder.label: derelict pool ladder
LanguageData.VFEPD_AB_DerelictRecliner.description: A recliner used for relaxation. Rotten and dirty to the point of uselessness.
LanguageData.VFEPD_AB_DerelictRecliner.label: derelict recliner
LanguageData.VFEPD_AB_DerelictSwimmingPool.descriptio: This was once a relaxing swimming pool, but it is now a fetid, stagnant pool of water.
LanguageData.VFEPD_AB_DerelictSwimmingPool.label: derelict swimming pool
LanguageData.VFEPD_AB_DessertTree.description: An easy answer to the question: "what would you create if you were an insane plant geneticist?". This one is fake.
LanguageData.VFEPD_AB_DessertTree.label: dessert tree
LanguageData.VFEPD_AB_DirtyBeachBall.description: A half-deflated beach ball that has seen better days.
LanguageData.VFEPD_AB_DirtyBeachBall.label: dirty beach ball
LanguageData.VFEPD_AB_DirtyPoolFloat.description: A deflated and dirty pool float.
LanguageData.VFEPD_AB_DirtyPoolFloat.label: dirty pool float
LanguageData.VFEPD_AB_FleshTree.description: A grotesque growth of pulsing, veiny tissue stretched over a warped wooden frame. This one is fake.
LanguageData.VFEPD_AB_FleshTree.label: flesh tree
LanguageData.VFEPD_AB_GallatrossBones.description: This ribcage once belonged to a living Gallatross of truly exceptional size. Note: if you have the Rim of Madness - Bones mod installed, you can deconstruct these into useable bones.
LanguageData.VFEPD_AB_GallatrossBones.label: gallatross bones
LanguageData.VFEPD_AB_GoldenCubeTree.description: These rare trees grow giant, shimmering golden cubes in place of fruit. This one is fake.
LanguageData.VFEPD_AB_GoldenCubeTree.label: golden cube tree
LanguageData.VFEPD_AB_HugeGallatrossSkeleton.descript: These fosilized bones might have belonged to an exceptionally large Gallatross. Note: if you have the Rim of Madness - Bones mod installed, you can deconstruct these into useable bones.
LanguageData.VFEPD_AB_HugeGallatrossSkeleton.label: huge gallatross skeleton
LanguageData.VFEPD_AB_LuminescentTree.description: A tree-like giant bramble that supports a huge globe of glowing sap that casts a soft, colorful light in the dark. This one is fake.
LanguageData.VFEPD_AB_LuminescentTree.label: luminescent tree
LanguageData.VFEPD_AB_MagmaThermalPlant.description: Produces electricity from hyperheated geothermal steam geysers in a magma rich zone. Inactive.
LanguageData.VFEPD_AB_MagmaThermalPlant.label: magma-thermal generator
LanguageData.VFEPD_AB_Mech_RuinedActivator.descriptio: A ruined mech proximity activator. Perhaps a few components can be scavenged from this one.
LanguageData.VFEPD_AB_Mech_RuinedActivator.label: ruined mech proximity activator
LanguageData.VFEPD_AB_Mech_RuinedAssembler.descriptio: A ruined mech assembler. Thankfully it has been inactive for a while.
LanguageData.VFEPD_AB_Mech_RuinedAssembler.label: ruined mech assembler
LanguageData.VFEPD_AB_Mech_RuinedCapsule.description: A ruined mech capsule. Thankfully it has been empty for a while.
LanguageData.VFEPD_AB_Mech_RuinedCapsule.label: ruined mech capsule
LanguageData.VFEPD_AB_Mech_RuinedCell.description: A ruined mech power cell. Perhaps a few components can be scavenged from this one.
LanguageData.VFEPD_AB_Mech_RuinedCell.label: ruined mech power cell
LanguageData.VFEPD_AB_Mech_RuinedLargeGunPlatform.des: A ruined mech large turret base. Whatever this base held, it's long gone.
LanguageData.VFEPD_AB_Mech_RuinedMortar_Full.descript: A ruined mech auto-mortar. Completely broken. No useful components can be scavenged from this old mortar.
LanguageData.VFEPD_AB_Mech_RuinedMortar_Full.label: ruined mech mortar
LanguageData.VFEPD_AB_Mech_RuinedMortar_Single.label: ruined mech mortar gun
LanguageData.VFEPD_AB_Mech_RuinedShield.description: A spent mech shield generator. Still faintly humming.
LanguageData.VFEPD_AB_Mech_RuinedShield.label: ruined mech shield
LanguageData.VFEPD_AB_Mech_RuinedTurret_Full.descript: A ruined mech turret. Completely broken. No useful components can be scavenged from this old turret.
LanguageData.VFEPD_AB_Mech_RuinedTurret_Full.label: ruined mech turret
LanguageData.VFEPD_AB_Mech_RuinedTurret_Single.descri: A ruined mech turret base. Completely broken.
LanguageData.VFEPD_AB_Mech_RuinedTurret_Single.label: ruined mech turret base
LanguageData.VFEPD_AB_MechanoidReceiver.description: A wide band receiver designed to intercept lingering mechanoid signal patterns from the environment. Completely inactive.
LanguageData.VFEPD_AB_MechanoidReceiver.label: mechanoid resonance receiver
LanguageData.VFEPD_AB_MycoticCollector.description: Collects edible airborne micro-fungi present in this map and extracts them into processed fungi that can be used as a food ingredient. Inactive.
LanguageData.VFEPD_AB_MycoticCollector.label: mycotic collector
LanguageData.VFEPD_AB_OcularGasSpewer.description: This device needs a small amount of electricity to condense atmospheric gases and spew a large cloud of ocular gas. Inactive.
LanguageData.VFEPD_AB_OcularGasSpewer.label: ocular gas spewer
LanguageData.VFEPD_AB_ShackledGamma.description: A containment vat designed to preserve and regulate the life of a Gamma plant beyond its natural span. This gamma seems to be a plastic plant.
LanguageData.VFEPD_AB_ShackledGamma.label: shackled gamma
LanguageData.VFEPD_AB_SlimeCompressor.description: A bulky, churning machine that grinds down organic slime and compresses it under immense pressure, slowly transforming the ooze into dense, usable sandstone. Inactive.
LanguageData.VFEPD_AB_SlimeCompressor.label: slime compressor
LanguageData.VFEPD_AB_TarPump.description: Extracts tar from a natural tar hole and transforms the tar into chemfuel. Inactive.
LanguageData.VFEPD_AB_TarPump.label: tar pump
LanguageData.VFEPD_AB_TechnoTree.description: A bizarre fusion of bark and circuitry, this half-synthetic tree hums with low energy pulses. This one is fake.
LanguageData.VFEPD_AB_TechnoTree.label: techno tree
LanguageData.VFEPD_AbductWarmup.description: This is an effecter prop for "Shambler Raise". Intrinsically laggy, use in moderation.
LanguageData.VFEPD_AbductWarmup.label: abduct warmup
LanguageData.VFEPD_AberrationRedirector.description: An old and inactive aberration redirector.
LanguageData.VFEPD_AberrationRedirector.label: aberration redirector
LanguageData.VFEPD_Activator.description: A timed mechanoid activation unit. After counting down, it will... do nothing... Welp.
LanguageData.VFEPD_Activator.label: activator
LanguageData.VFEPD_ActivatorProx.description: A proximity alarm for dormant mechanoids. If it detects a human-like threat nearby, it will... do nothing... Welp.
LanguageData.VFEPD_ActivatorProx.label: activator proximity
LanguageData.VFEPD_AdjustableWrench.description: A small adjustable wrench. Intended to be placed over an empty workbench. Just for decorative purposes.
LanguageData.VFEPD_AdjustableWrench.label: adjustable wrench
LanguageData.VFEPD_AdvancedRotor.label: advanced rotor
LanguageData.VFEPD_Aerodrone.description: Aerodrone is a spacer-tech, unmanned aerial vehicle equipped with advanced sensors and a missile payload. Non-functional.
LanguageData.VFEPD_Aerodrone.label: aerodrone
LanguageData.VFEPD_AerodroneBatteryPack.description: A large, overcharged aerodrone battery. Non-functional.
LanguageData.VFEPD_AerodroneBatteryPack.label: aerodrone battery pack
LanguageData.VFEPD_AerodroneMunitionsCrate.descriptio: A large military crate of aerodrone munitions. Upon closer inspection, all the missiles are fake plastic ones.
LanguageData.VFEPD_AerodroneMunitionsCrate.label: aerodrone munitions crate
LanguageData.VFEPD_AgaricusDomeCap.description: Everything about this fungus screams "I'm toxic, stay away from me". This one is fake.
LanguageData.VFEPD_AgaricusDomeCap.label: agaricus domecap
LanguageData.VFEPD_Agarilux.description: A fake, enormous purple mushroom. Its size and glowing protrusions make this fungus beautiful to look at.
LanguageData.VFEPD_Agarilux.label: agarilux
LanguageData.VFEPD_AgariluxPrime.description: An unbelievably large exemplar of Agarilux. This myconic colony has adapted perfectly to its environment. This one is fake.
LanguageData.VFEPD_AgariluxPrime.label: Agarilux Prime
LanguageData.VFEPD_Agave.description: A fake, large-leafed desert plant with edible flowers and stalks.
LanguageData.VFEPD_Agave.label: agave
LanguageData.VFEPD_AlbatrossBlack.description: A large, multi-personel transport ship currently out of service.
LanguageData.VFEPD_AlbatrossBlack.label: black gunship
LanguageData.VFEPD_AlbatrossBlue.description: A large, multi-personel transport ship currently out of service.
LanguageData.VFEPD_AlbatrossBlue.label: blue gunship
LanguageData.VFEPD_AlbatrossRed.description: A large, multi-personel transport ship currently out of service.
LanguageData.VFEPD_AlbatrossRed.label: red gunship
LanguageData.VFEPD_AlbatrossSilver.description: A large, multi-personel transport ship currently out of service.
LanguageData.VFEPD_AlbatrossSilver.label: silver gunship
LanguageData.VFEPD_AlbatrossWhite.description: A large, multi-personel transport ship currently out of service.
LanguageData.VFEPD_AlbatrossWhite.label: white gunship
LanguageData.VFEPD_Alembic.description: An alembic. Intended to be placed over an empty workbench. Just for decorative purposes.
LanguageData.VFEPD_Alembic.label: alembic
LanguageData.VFEPD_AlienGrass.description: This grass is completely alien, probably not even 100% carbon based. Not very edible for terrestrial creatures. This one is fake.
LanguageData.VFEPD_AlienGrass.label: ocular grass
LanguageData.VFEPD_AlienTree.description: This tree is completely alien, probably not even 100% carbon based, and it seems to be struggling to grow from exposure to a terrestrial environment. This one is fake.
LanguageData.VFEPD_AlienTree.label: ocular tree
LanguageData.VFEPD_AlienTree_Polluted.description: This ocular tree has been affected by pollution and mutated in strange ways. This one is fake.
LanguageData.VFEPD_AlienTree_Polluted.label: mutated ocular tree
LanguageData.VFEPD_Allspice.description: A fake, anomalous, leafy vine bearing tiny unpalatable green fruits. When ground finely during cooking the fruits release a complex, peppery flavor, perfect for spicing dishes.
LanguageData.VFEPD_Allspice.label: allspice
LanguageData.VFEPD_Alocasia.description: A fake tropical plant. Its extremely broad leaves are a commonly-recognized signifier of tropical forests.
LanguageData.VFEPD_Alocasia.label: alocasia
LanguageData.VFEPD_AloeVera.description: A herb with succulent leaves that are arranged in a rosette. The leaves are grey to green and sometimes have white spots on their surfaces. This one is fake.
LanguageData.VFEPD_AloeVera.label: aloe vera
LanguageData.VFEPD_AloeVera_Succulent.description: A cultivated succulent with thick, greenish, fleshy leaves that fan out from the short stem. This one is fake.
LanguageData.VFEPD_AloeVera_Succulent.label: aloe vera
LanguageData.VFEPD_AlphaGenesAncientBandNode.descript: A broken mechanoid-band signal amplifier. Its antennas are bent in weird angles.
LanguageData.VFEPD_AlphaGenesAncientBandNode.label: ancient band node
LanguageData.VFEPD_AlphaGenesAncientBasicRecharger.de: A broken mech recharger. The connecting pins are bent and chipped, making the whole machine useless.
LanguageData.VFEPD_AlphaGenesAncientFaultyLamp.descri: A metallic capsule filled with some bioluminescent compound. It seems to have stopped producing light.
LanguageData.VFEPD_AlphaGenesAncientFaultyLamp.label: ancient faulty lamp
LanguageData.VFEPD_AlphaGenesAncientGeneAssembler.des: A workbench for creating implantable xenogerms from genepacks stored in nearby gene banks. This device has collapsed in on itself, rendering it useless.
LanguageData.VFEPD_AlphaGenesAncientGeneBank.descript: This device was able to store genepacks and make them usable to create new xenogerms, when placed near a gene assembler. It has corroded beyond any repair, and the genepacks stored inside are far gone.
LanguageData.VFEPD_AlphaGenesAncientGeneBank.label: ancient gene bank
LanguageData.VFEPD_AlphaGenesAncientGeneExtractor.des: An automated surgery machine that was able to extract a person's genes and create a genepack from them. Its internal machinery is completely fused and rusted.
LanguageData.VFEPD_AlphaGenesAncientGeneProcessor.des: A genetic analysis and processing system. Ruined and unuseable.
LanguageData.VFEPD_AlphaGenesAncientGrowthVat.descrip: A vat of fluid which was able to gestate an embryo or accelerate a child's growth. Its transparent plasteel sheel has been smashed open, seemingly from the inside... Ominous.
LanguageData.VFEPD_AlphaGenesAncientGrowthVat.label: ancient growth vat
LanguageData.VFEPD_AlphaGenesAncientHugeBank.descript: A huge gene bank, much larger than the ones in use nowadays. Completely broken.
LanguageData.VFEPD_AlphaGenesAncientHugeBank.label: ancient huge gene bank
LanguageData.VFEPD_AlphaGenesAncientLamp.label: ancient broken lamp
LanguageData.VFEPD_AlphaGenesAncientLargeMechGestator: A tank used to create new mechanoids. The mechanite tank was punctured long ago, and all the fluid has long since evaporated.
LanguageData.VFEPD_AlphaGenesAncientLargeRecharger.de: A broken mech recharger. The connecting pins are bent and chipped, making the whole machine useless.
LanguageData.VFEPD_AlphaGenesAncientMechGestator.desc: A tank used to create new mechanoids. The mechanite tank was punctured long ago, and all the fluid has long since evaporated.
LanguageData.VFEPD_AlphaGenesAncientPollutionPump.des: This pump isn't going to pump anything at all anytime soon.
LanguageData.VFEPD_AlphaGenesAncientShelf.label: ancient shelf
LanguageData.VFEPD_AlphaGenesAncientSubcoreRipscanner: This thing is SO edgy. Like, SUPER edgy. Basically a medical bed with spikes. I bet it only worked if you played symphonic metal in the background. I blame Oskar.
LanguageData.VFEPD_AlphaGenesAncientVitalsMonitor.des: A broken vitals monitor with a dead screen.
LanguageData.VFEPD_AlphaGenesAncientWastepackAtomizer: This was just a fancy waste bin, and it is now just a broken waste bin.
LanguageData.VFEPD_AM_AbandonedBigBread.description: Damaged ancient van. Non-functional: all its internal mechanisms have been removed.
LanguageData.VFEPD_AM_AbandonedBigBread.label: abandoned big bread
LanguageData.VFEPD_AM_AbandonedForklift.description: An ancient forklift, whose parts are completely useless, was abandoned. Non-functional: all its internal mechanisms have been removed.
LanguageData.VFEPD_AM_AbandonedForklift.label: abandoned forklift
LanguageData.VFEPD_AM_ADI.label: ADI
LanguageData.VFEPD_AM_AllowableTurn.description: AllowableTurn Non-functional: all its internal mechanisms have been removed.
LanguageData.VFEPD_AM_AllowableTurn.label: AllowableTurn
LanguageData.VFEPD_AM_AllowRightTurn.description: An old street sign indicating a right turn. Non-functional: all its internal mechanisms have been removed.
LanguageData.VFEPD_AM_AllowRightTurn.label: forked road sign
LanguageData.VFEPD_AM_Amublance.description: A damaged and corroded ancient vehicle. Non-functional: all its internal mechanisms have been removed.
LanguageData.VFEPD_AM_Amublance.label: ancient ambulance
LanguageData.VFEPD_AM_AncientCashRegister.description: The cash register commonly found in ancient supermarkets has been damaged. Non-functional: all its internal mechanisms have been removed.
LanguageData.VFEPD_AM_AncientCashRegister.label: ancient cash register
LanguageData.VFEPD_AM_AncientDismantlingWorkbench.des: An ancient dismantling table that integrates machinery and sewing. Non-functional: all its internal mechanisms have been removed.
LanguageData.VFEPD_AM_AncientGiantHelicopter.descript: An ancient giant helicopter that has crashed, with a vague identification number on its body: mi26. Non-functional: all its internal mechanisms have been removed.
LanguageData.VFEPD_AM_AncientGiantHelicopter.label: ancient giant helicopter
LanguageData.VFEPD_AM_AncientRevolvingDoorA.descripti: An ancient glass revolving door, now it's stuck. Non-functional: all its internal mechanisms have been removed.
LanguageData.VFEPD_AM_AncientRevolvingDoorA.label: ancient revolving door
LanguageData.VFEPD_AM_AncientRevolvingDoorB.descripti: An ancient glass revolving door, now it's stuck. Non-functional: all its internal mechanisms have been removed.
LanguageData.VFEPD_AM_AncientRevolvingDoorB.label: ancient revolving door
LanguageData.VFEPD_AM_AncientRevolvingDoorC.descripti: An ancient glass revolving door, now it's stuck. Non-functional: all its internal mechanisms have been removed.
LanguageData.VFEPD_AM_AncientRevolvingDoorC.label: ancient revolving door
LanguageData.VFEPD_AM_AncientRoadblocks.description: Ancient roadblocks. Non-functional: all its internal mechanisms have been removed.
LanguageData.VFEPD_AM_AncientRoadblocks.label: ancient roadblocks
LanguageData.VFEPD_AM_AncientTruckCarriages.descripti: The carriages of ancient trucks. Non-functional: all its internal mechanisms have been removed.
LanguageData.VFEPD_AM_AncientTruckCarriages.label: ancient truck carriages
LanguageData.VFEPD_AM_ArmoredGate.description: Armored gates, commonly found in some underground military facilities. Non-functional: all its internal mechanisms have been removed.
LanguageData.VFEPD_AM_ArmoredGate.label: ancient armored gate
LanguageData.VFEPD_AM_ArmoredGate_invincible.descript: A structure commonly found in some underground military facilities. Non-functional: all its internal mechanisms have been removed.
LanguageData.VFEPD_AM_ArmoredGate_invincible.label: ancient armored gate
LanguageData.VFEPD_AM_ArmoredGateL.description: Armored gates, commonly found in some underground military facilities. Non-functional: all its internal mechanisms have been removed.
LanguageData.VFEPD_AM_ArmoredGateL.label: ancient armored gate
LanguageData.VFEPD_AM_ArmoredGateS.description: Armored gates, commonly found in some underground military facilities. Non-functional: all its internal mechanisms have been removed.
LanguageData.VFEPD_AM_ArmoredGateS.label: ancient armored gate
LanguageData.VFEPD_AM_ArmoredGateXS.description: Armored gates, commonly found in some underground military facilities. Non-functional: all its internal mechanisms have been removed.
LanguageData.VFEPD_AM_ArmoredGateXS.label: ancient armored gate
LanguageData.VFEPD_AM_Arrow.label: Arrow
LanguageData.VFEPD_AM_AtriumA.description: The atrium of an ancient shopping mall, where light can penetrate from the ceiling, makes the entire mall bright. Non-functional: all its internal mechanisms have been removed.
LanguageData.VFEPD_AM_AtriumA.label: atrium
LanguageData.VFEPD_AM_AtriumB.description: The atrium of an ancient shopping mall, where light can penetrate from the ceiling, makes the entire mall bright. Non-functional: all its internal mechanisms have been removed.
LanguageData.VFEPD_AM_AtriumB.label: atrium
LanguageData.VFEPD_AM_AtriumC.description: The atrium of an ancient shopping mall, where light can penetrate from the ceiling, makes the entire mall bright. Non-functional: all its internal mechanisms have been removed.
LanguageData.VFEPD_AM_AtriumC.label: atrium
LanguageData.VFEPD_AM_AtriumCorridorEast.description: The atrium of an ancient shopping mall, where light can penetrate from the ceiling, makes the entire mall bright. Non-functional: all its internal mechanisms have been removed.
LanguageData.VFEPD_AM_AtriumCorridorEast.label: atrium
LanguageData.VFEPD_AM_AtriumCorridorNorth.description: The atrium of an ancient shopping mall, where light can penetrate from the ceiling, makes the entire mall bright. Non-functional: all its internal mechanisms have been removed.
LanguageData.VFEPD_AM_AtriumCorridorNorth.label: atrium
LanguageData.VFEPD_AM_AVendingMachine.description: Damaged ancient vending machines. Non-functional: all its internal mechanisms have been removed.
LanguageData.VFEPD_AM_AVendingMachine.label: ancient vending machine
LanguageData.VFEPD_AM_BDAShelfA.description: There are still some goods on top that have not been crushed. Non-functional: all its internal mechanisms have been removed.
LanguageData.VFEPD_AM_BDAShelfA.label: damaged large shelves
LanguageData.VFEPD_AM_BDAShelfB.description: There are still some goods on top that have not been crushed. Non-functional: all its internal mechanisms have been removed.
LanguageData.VFEPD_AM_BDAShelfB.label: damaged large shelves
LanguageData.VFEPD_AM_BigCase.description: A large military supplies case. Maybe it has something inside. Non-functional: all its internal mechanisms have been removed.
LanguageData.VFEPD_AM_BigCase.label: large military supplies case
LanguageData.VFEPD_AM_BigCase_Open_Decoration.descrip: The opened case has nothing inside. Non-functional: all its internal mechanisms have been removed.
LanguageData.VFEPD_AM_BigCase_Open_Decoration.label: Big case
LanguageData.VFEPD_AM_Bishop.label: Bishop
LanguageData.VFEPD_AM_BlockedElevators.description: This escalator is blocked by debris and cannot pass through from here. Non-functional: all its internal mechanisms have been removed.
LanguageData.VFEPD_AM_BlockedElevators.label: blocked escalator
LanguageData.VFEPD_AM_BlockedElevatorsA.description: This escalator is blocked by debris and cannot pass through from here. Non-functional: all its internal mechanisms have been removed.

LanguageData.VFEPD_AM_TravelBag_Decoration.label: Travel bag
LanguageData.VFEPD_AM_TurnAround.description: An old street sign indicating a u-turn. Non-functional: all its internal mechanisms have been removed.
LanguageData.VFEPD_AM_TurnAround.label: U-Turn sign
LanguageData.VFEPD_AM_VC.label: VC
LanguageData.VFEPD_AM_VegetableShelf.description: A long forgotten shelf containing vegetables.\n\nNon-functional: all its internal mechanisms have been removed.
LanguageData.VFEPD_AM_VegetableShelf.label: vegetable shelf
Empty vegetable shelves. Non-functional: all its internal mechanisms have been removed.
LanguageData.VFEPD_AM_VendingMachine.description: A damaged ancient vending machine.\n\nNon-functional: all its internal mechanisms have been removed.
LanguageData.VFEPD_AM_VendingMachine.label: vending machine
LanguageData.VFEPD_AM_WatchForBug.description: An old street sign warning about hostile insects. Non-functional: all its internal mechanisms have been removed.
LanguageData.VFEPD_AM_WatchForBug.label: watch for insects sign
LanguageData.VFEPD_AM_WatchForGorehulk.description: An old street sign depicting an ominous warning. Non-functional: all its internal mechanisms have been removed.
LanguageData.VFEPD_AM_WatchForGorehulk.label: watch for Gorehulk sign
LanguageData.VFEPD_AM_WatchForMachine.description: An old street sign warning against hostile mechanoids. Non-functional: all its internal mechanisms have been removed.
LanguageData.VFEPD_AM_WatchForMachine.label: watch for Mechanoid sign
LanguageData.VFEPD_AM_WatchForMetalhorror.description: An old street sign depicting an ominous warning. Non-functional: all its internal mechanisms have been removed.
LanguageData.VFEPD_AM_WatchForMetalhorror.label: watch for Metalhorror sign
LanguageData.VFEPD_AM_WatchForNoctol.description: An old street sign depicting an ominous warning Non-functional: all its internal mechanisms have been removed.
LanguageData.VFEPD_AM_WatchForNoctol.label: watch for Noctol sign
LanguageData.VFEPD_AM_WeaponCase.description: A well-worn container. It seems to have something inside. Non-functional: all its internal mechanisms have been removed.
LanguageData.VFEPD_AM_WeaponCase.label: weapon case
LanguageData.VFEPD_AM_WeaponCaseLow.description: A weapon case that has been pried open. It seems to have something inside. Non-functional: all its internal mechanisms have been removed.
LanguageData.VFEPD_AM_WeaponCaseLow.label: opened weapon case
LanguageData.VFEPD_AmbrandyDistillery.description: A gilded distillery of very delicate craftsmanship meant for aging ambrosia must into a drinkable form. This one is inactive and non-functional.
LanguageData.VFEPD_AmbrandyDistillery.label: ambrandy distillery
LanguageData.VFEPD_Ambrosia.description: A fake rare wild bush which yields the ambrosia fruit.
LanguageData.VFEPD_Ambrosia.label: ambrosia bush
LanguageData.VFEPD_AmmoBox_Autocannon.description: A small-sized box containing autocannon ammunition. Used by Palintone turrets to reload. Upon closer inspection this box seems to be just filled with plastic slugs.
LanguageData.VFEPD_AmmoBox_Autocannon.label: autocannon ammo box
LanguageData.VFEPD_AmmoBox_Missile.description: A small-sized box containing missiles. Used by Onager turrets to reload. Upon closer inspection this box seems to be just filled with plastic missiles.
LanguageData.VFEPD_AmmoBox_Missile.label: missile ammo box
LanguageData.VFEPD_AmmoBox_UraniumSlug.description: A small-sized box containing uranium slug ammunition. Used by Kontarion turrets to reload. May explode when damaged. Upon closer inspection this box seems to be just filled with plastic slugs.
LanguageData.VFEPD_AmmoBox_UraniumSlug.label: uranium slug ammo box
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientAirConditioner.description: An ancient air conditioning machine. Its internals were smashed long ago and what wasn't looted has rusted away in the time since.
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientAirConditioner.label: ancient air conditioner
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientAmmoStack.description: A container of ancient ammunition. It's empty and any remaining rounds are corroded to uselessness.
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientAmmoStack.label: ancient ammo box
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientAntenna.description: A rusted antenna used to transmit long-forgotten communications.
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientAntenna.label: ancient antenna
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientAPC.description: The remains of an ancient armored troop carrier which was destroyed by some kind of heavy weapon. All the useful components were looted or deteriorated long ago.
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientAPC.label: ancient ruined APC
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientArmchair.description: A faded and torn armchair. It's unusable in its current state.
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientArmchair.label: ancient armchair
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientATM.description: An ancient ATM. Smashed and rusted, it is completely useless now.\n\nHow it got here is hard to say.
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientATM.label: ancient ATM
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientAutocannonTurret.descriptio: An autocannon turret with a shattered barrel. The targeting system is missing and all the components are rusted and bent to uselessness.
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientAutocannonTurret.label: broken autocannon turret
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientAutomaticDrillingRig.descri: The remains of what was an automatic drill designed for automatic ore extraction, once supported by a multitude of infrastructures. Missing most supporting infrastructures, and, most critically, its core components, it wouldn't function as of now.
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientAutomaticDrillingRig.label: ancient automatic drilling rig
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientBandNode.description: An ancient band node. Valuable parts are missing, and everything else is degraded to uselessness.
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientBandNode.label: ancient band node
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientBarrel.description: An ancient, broken barrel that looks like it once contained waste of some sort. The only thing it contains now is a smear of dried sludge.
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientBarrel.label: ancient barrel
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientBarrierGate.description: An ancient barrier gate that's no longer functioning properly.
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientBarrierGate.label: ancient barrier gate
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientBarrierLong.description: A concrete barrier used to block the path of vehicles.
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientBarrierLong.label: large concrete barrier
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientBasicRecharger.description: An ancient basic recharger. Valuable parts are missing, and everything else is degraded to uselessness.
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientBasicRecharger.label: ancient basic recharger
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientBathtub.description: A bathtub with deep cracks and rust stains. It's completely unusable.
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientBathtub.label: cracked bathtub
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientBattery.description: An old, large battery commonly found in vaults, capable of sustaining the entire compound for a nearly infinite amount of time. This one is out-of-service.
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientBattery.label: ancient battery
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientBed.description: An old, rotted mattress on a rusty frame.
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientBed.label: ancient bed
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientBedTwo.description: An old-fashioned metal bed frame with a hard mattress and uncomfortable duvet.
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientBedTwo.label: ancient bed
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientBioBattery.description: A very efficient ancient battery. Sadly out of service.
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientBioBattery.label: ancient microbiobattery
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientBioBatteryTank.description: Produces a reliable stream of power by consuming biological material such as humans or animals. This one is out-of-service.
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientBioBatteryTank.label: ancient bio-battery tank
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientBlastDoor.description: A heavily-reinforced door made of an ultratech polymer, sealed shut.
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientBlastDoor.label: ancient blast door, closed
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientBlastDoor_Frame.description: A heavily-reinforced door frame made of an ultratech polymer.
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientBlastDoor_Frame.label: ancient blast door, frame
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientBox_ComponentIndustrial.des: A box filled with fake components.
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientBox_ComponentSpacer.descrip: A box of fake advanced components.
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientBox_ComponentSpacer.label: advanced component box
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientBox_SteelSlag.description: A box filled with fake steel scrap. It's heavy.
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientBox_SteelSlag.label: steel scrap box
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientBroadcastingStation.descrip: An ancient broadcasting station. This one is non-functional.
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientBroadcastingStation.label: ancient broadcasting station
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientBroadcastingStation_Old.des: An ancient broadcasting station. This one is non-functional.
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientBrokenDefensiveTurret.label: ancient broken defensive turret
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientBrokenTurret.description: This large shotgun turret, badly damaged, is no longer usable.
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientBrokenTurret.label: ancient broken turret
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientBustedTurretPlatform.descri: A destroyed platform for a turret.
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientBustedTurretPlatform.label: ancient busted turret platform
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientCardboardBox.description: An soggy cardboard box filled with old detritus.
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientCardboardBox.label: old cardboard box
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientChembarrel.description: A rusted barrel that once stored chemfuel. It's empty and corroded.
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientChembarrel.label: ancient chembarrel
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientChembarrelPallet.descriptio: A stack of rusted barrels on a decayed pallet. Any valuable fuel leaked out long ago.
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientChembarrelPallet.label: ancient chembarrel pallet
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientChemfuelCanister.descriptio: A sealed canister of chemfuel. It is empty.
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientChemfuelCanister.label: chemfuel canister
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientChemfuelPoweredGenerator.de: Produces a reliable stream of power by consuming chemfuel. Or it would, if it was working.
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientChemfuelPoweredGenerator_Ol: Produces a reliable stream of power by consuming chemfuel. Or it would, if it was working.
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientChemtruck.description: An abandoned chemfuel transport truck. Any usable parts were looted long ago.
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientChemtruck.label: ancient chemtruck
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientColdStorage.description: An old refrigeration unit, now rusted shut. Any contents have long since decayed to dust.
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientColdStorage.label: ancient cold storage
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientCommsConsole.description: An ancient console with an attached communications dish. Valuable parts are missing, and everything else is degraded to uselessness.
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientCommsConsole.label: ancient comms console
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientComputerDesk.description: An old, no longer operational computer desk.
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientComputerDesk.label: ancient computer desk
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientConcreteBarrier.description: A traffic management solution from long ago.
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientConcreteBarrier.label: ancient concrete barrier
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientContainer.description: A large container from some ancient freight carrying vehicle. It has long since been looted and deteriorated into uselessness.
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientContainer.label: ancient container
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientCooler.description: An ancient cooler. This one is out-of-service.
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientCooler.label: ancient cooler
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientCraneArm.description: A rusted crane arm, twisted and broken.
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientCraneArm.label: ruined crane arm
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientCraneArmSmall.description: A smaller chunk of a crane arm, snapped and rusted.
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientCraneArmSmall.label: ruined crane arm
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientCraneBase.description: The base of a large industrial crane.
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientCraneBase.label: ruined crane base
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientCraneColumn.description: A vertical support column from a ruined crane. It's rusted and no longer stable.
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientCraneColumn.label: ruined crane column
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientCrate.description: An ancient, broken crate. Any valuables it once contained have degraded to uselessness.
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientCrate.label: ancient crate
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientCrateDouble.description: Whatever this crate contained has long ago rotted and turned to dust.
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientCrateDouble.label: ancient ruined crate
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientCratePallet.description: A pallet for stacking and transporting crates. The contents have been scavenged long ago.
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientCratePallet.label: ancient crate pallet
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientCratePile.description: Whatever these crates contained has long ago rotted and turned to dust.
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientCratePile.label: pile of ancient ruined crates
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientCrateTwo.description: Whatever this crate contained has long ago rotted and turned to dust.
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientCrateTwo.label: ancient ruined crate
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientCryofreezer.description: A super-charged air-conditioning unit designed for its intended purpose of preventing genomes from breaking down entropically. This one is non-functional.
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientCryofreezer.label: ancient cryofreezer
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientCryptosleepPod.description: A single-use pod for preserving one person in a state of suspended animation. Sealed shut.
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientCryptosleepPod.label: ancient cryptosleep pod
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientCryptosleepSarcophagus.desc: An ancient cryptosleep sarcophagus. Sealed shut.
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientCryptosleepSuspender.descri: An ancient medical pod that uses partial cryptosleep to slow down the degredation of wounds and help the body heal. Sealed shut.
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientCryptosleepSuspender.label: ancient cryptosleep suspender
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientDamagedSunlamp.description: An ancient self-powered sun lamp. Its internal power supply is completely depleted.
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientDamagedSunlamp.label: damaged sun lamp
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientDestroyedConsole.descriptio: A ruined console. It is now completely inoperable. Its usable parts were smashed or looted long ago.
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientDestroyedConsole.label: ancient destroyed console
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientDestroyedConsoleLarge.descr: A ruined console. It is now completely inoperable. Its usable parts were smashed or looted long ago.
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientDestroyedConsoleLarge.label: ancient destroyed console
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientDisplayBank.description: An ancient computer interface. Valuable parts are missing, and everything else is degraded to uselessness.
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientDisplayBank.label: ancient display bank
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientDoubleBed.description: A double bed with broken springs and a tattered mattress. It barely offers comfort, but two can sleep here if desperate.
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientDoubleBed.label: rusted double bed
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientDrillPlatform.description: A device meant for drilling deep into the earth. Any valuable parts were looted long ago.
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientDrillPlatform.label: ancient drill rig
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientDropshipEngine.description: An ancient dropship engine. It probably came off a military troop carrier. Its delicate internals are rusted to uselessness, and the valuable parts were looted long ago.
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientDropshipEngine.label: ancient dropship engine
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientDualHydroponicsBasin.descri: An ancient artificial nutrient bath for growing plants. Its core components have long been damaged and are now a pile of useless scrap iron.
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientDualHydroponicsBasin.label: ancient dual hydroponics
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientEducator.description: A very old interactive machine that’s commonly used in the vaults to pass the time. This one is just deactivated.
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientEducator.label: ancient educator
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientElectricalEquipment.descrip: Weathered electrical appliances once used in an ancient tunnel boring machines. Non-functional now.
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientElectricalEquipment.label: ancient electrical appliances
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientElectrowomb.description: This device has collapsed in on itself, rendering it useless.
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientElectrowomb.label: ancient electrowomb
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientElectrowombLarge.descriptio: The exterior shell has completely fallen apart, yet it seems that it exploded instead of imploded.
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientElectrowombLarge.label: ancient large electrowomb
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientEmergencyLight_Red.descript: An ancient light containing a long-lasting battery. Inactive
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientEmergencyLight_Red.label: ancient emergency light
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientEmergencyPurifier.descripti: An ancient emergency purifier. It may look on, but it actually isn't.
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientEmergencyPurifier.label: ancient emergency purifier
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientEmergencyPurifier_Off.descr: An ancient emergency purifier. Permanently off.
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientEmergencyPurifier_Off.label: ancient emergency purifier
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientEmptyMiningCar.label: ancient empty mining car
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientEnemyTerminal.label: ancient enemy terminal
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientEquipmentBlocks.description: A collection of ancient equipment blocks of unknown function. Valuable parts are missing, and everything else is degraded to uselessness.
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientEquipmentBlocks.label: ancient equipment blocks
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientExcavator.description: The remains of a mining vehicle. The valuable parts were looted long ago.
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientExcavator.label: ancient excavator
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientExcavatorBucketWheel.descri: A rusted bucket wheel of ancient giant rock excavator. Non-functional now.
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientExcavatorBucketWheel.label: ancient excavator bucket wheel
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientExcavatorPowerFacilities.de: Torn power system of the ancient giant rock excavator. Non-functional now.
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientExostriderCannon.descriptio: The remains of the back-mounted energy cannon of a massive, ancient exostrider mechanoid.
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientExostriderCannon.label: exostrider cannon
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientExostriderHead.description: The remains of the head of a massive, ancient exostrider mechanoid.
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientExostriderHead.label: exostrider head
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientExostriderLeg.description: The remains of the leg of a massive, ancient exostrider mechanoid.
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientExostriderLeg.label: exostrider leg
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientExostriderRemains.descripti: The remains of a massive, ancient exostrider war mechanoid.
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientExostriderRemains.label: exostrider remains
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientExostriderRemainsPulseEffec: This is an effecter prop for "Ancient Exostrider Remains Pulse". Intrinsically laggy, use in moderation.
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientExplosivesCrate.description: A container of ancient mining charges. Inactive.
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientExplosivesCrate.label: ancient explosives crate
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientFauxPlant.label: ancient faux plant
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientFence.description: An ancient fence made of reinforced concrete posts joined by concrete panels.
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientFence.label: ancient fence
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientFilingCabinet.description: A corroded filing cabinet. There's nothing useful left inside.
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientFilingCabinet.label: rusted filing cabinet
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientFoosballTable.description: An old relic of the times, foosball table allows players to engage in the long forgotten game of football without leaving the safety of the vault. Or it would, but its rods are soldered and immobile.
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientFoosballTable.label: ancient foosball table
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientForklift.description: A broken forklift, rusted and missing parts. It's far too damaged to be repaired.
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientForklift.label: ruined forklift
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientFuelNode.description: An ancient, depleted fuel node once used to charge machines with fuel.
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientFuelNode.label: ancient fuel node
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientFuelTank.description: A large fuel tank that could be deconstructed for fuel. If it still had any.
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientFuelTank.label: ancient fuel tank
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientGenepackCrate.description: An ancient genepack crate. Sealed shut.
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientGenepackCrate.label: ancient genepack crate
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientGenepackCrate_Empty.label: ancient genepack crate
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientGenerator.description: An ancient electrical generator. Its usable parts were smashed or looted long ago, and the rest has rusted into uselessness.
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientGenerator.label: ancient generator
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientGeneticsTinkeringTable.desc: Most of the useful and otherwise functional parts are missing, indicating intentional sabotage.
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientGenomeExtractor.description: Lacking proper maintenance for so long, this machine is rusted shut.
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientGenomeExtractor.label: ancient genome extractor table
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientGenomeRecombinator.descript: A very old recombinator that somehow possesses an awful stench and excessive mould.
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientGenomeRecombinator.label: ancient genome recombinator
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientGenomorpher.description: A Genomorpher that has fallen into complete disrepair, some salvage still remains.
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientGenomorpher.label: ancient genomorpher
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientGeothermalPlant.description: Produces electricity from geothermal steam geysers. Or it would, if it was working.
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientGeothermalPlant.label: ancient geothermal plant
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientGiantRockExcavator.descript: The gigantic husk of what was a mountain-devouring mechanical beast, larger than most conventional buildings. Non-functional now.
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientGiantRockExcavator.label: ancient giant rock excavator chassis
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientGiantWheel.description: A giant wheel which came off some large vehicle many ages ago. The rubber has disintegrated away and the metal is twisted and rusted.
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientGiantWheel.label: ancient giant wheel
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientGravEngine.description: An ultratech engine used to bring large structures and ships into orbit. Nonfunctional for many years.
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientGravEngine.label: ancient grav engine
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientGravReactor.description: An ancient generator powered by a gravcore. Once capable of producing massive amounts of power, it has now fallen into disrepair.
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientGravReactor.label: ancient grav reactor
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientHatch.description: The entrance to a long-abandoned subterranean facility. Sealed shut.
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientHatch.label: ancient stockpile entrance
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientHeater.description: An ancient heater. This one is out-of-service.
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientHeater.label: ancient heater
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientHeatVent.description: A massive duct that drops endlessly into the ground. Permanently inactive.
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientHeatVent.label: ancient heat vent
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientHermetic.description: A self-powered hermetically-sealed crate for preserving valuable items. These can preserve their contents for a long time. Sealed shut.
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientHermetic.label: ancient hermetic crate
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientHospitalArmchair.label: ancient hospital armchair
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientHospitalBench.label: ancient hospital bench
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientHospitalCrib.label: ancient hospital crib
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientHydrant.description: An ancient hydrant. Heavily rusted, it is completely useless now.\n\nHow it got here is hard to say.
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientHydrant.label: ancient hydrant
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientIncubator.label: ancient incubator
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientIndoorFireHydrants.descript: An ancient fire hydrant with no water left inside.
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientIndoorFireHydrants.label: ancient indoor fire hydrants
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientIndustrialShelf.description: An industrial shelf covered in rust. It offers nothing of value.
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientIndustrialShelf.label: ancient industrial shelf
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientIndustrialTruck.description: An industrial truck, heavily rusted and abandoned. The engine is beyond repair.
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientIndustrialTruck.label: rusted industrial truck
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientInputTerminal.description: A station with buttons and levers.
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientInputTerminal.label: ancient input terminal
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientIVStand.label: ancient IV stand
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientJetEngine.description: An ancient jet engine, probably detached from a large airplane. Its delicate internals are rusted to uselessness, and the valuable parts were looted long ago.
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientJetEngine.label: ancient jet engine
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientKitchenette.label: ancient kitchenette
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientKitchenSink.description: An ancient kitchen sink made of some non-metallic fiber-sheet material. It is badly deteriorated and there's no way to salvage anything from it.\n\nHow it got here must be a long story.
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientKitchenSink.label: ancient kitchen sink
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientLamp.description: An ancient self-powered lamp. Its internal power supply is completely depleted.
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientLamp.label: ancient lamp
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientLamppost.description: Road lighting from long ago. No longer functional.
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientLamppost.label: ancient lamppost
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientLargeCrate.description: A large crate which was abandoned ages ago. It's too rusted to store anything.
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientLargeCrate.label: ancient large crate
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientLargeMechGestator.descripti: An ancient large mech gestator. Valuable parts are missing, and everything else is degraded to uselessness.
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientLargeMechGestator.label: ancient large mech gestator
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientLargeRustedEngineBlock.desc: A large, ancient engine block from some giant vehicle or power source. It's rusted through, and all the useful components are gone. No repair could salvage this.
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientLockerBank.description: An ancient, rusted bank of lockers. All of the lockers have been forced open with nothing valuable left behind.
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientLockerBank.label: ancient locker bank
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientLockers.description: A set of metal lockers, heavily rusted and bent. They've been thoroughly looted.
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientLockers.label: rusted lockers
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientLongCrate.description: A long, empty crate which was abandoned ages ago. It's too rusted to store anything.
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientLongCrate.label: ancient long crate
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientMachine.description: A large ancient machine case filled with unknown machinery. Valuable parts are missing, and everything else is degraded to uselessness.
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientMachine.label: ancient machine
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientMachinery.description: A set of old machine blocks. Their purpose, if they ever had any, has long been forgotten.
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientMachinery.label: ancient machinery
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientMechDetritus.description: The remains of a smashed mechanoid. All the useful components and materials are ruined or missing.
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientMechDetritus.label: mechanoid detritus
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientMechDropBeacon.description: The broken shell of a mech drop beacon. Its useful components are missing and the shell has deteriorated after many years.
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientMechDropBeacon.label: ancient mech drop beacon
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientMechGestator.description: An ancient mech gestator. Valuable parts are missing, and everything else is degraded to uselessness.
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientMechGestator.label: ancient mech gestator
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientMedicalPartition.label: ancient medical partition
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientMediumContainer.description: A rusted shipping container. It's completely empty.
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientMediumContainer.label: ancient container
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientMegaCannonBarrel.descriptio: A barrel from a long-range cannon for artillery or anti-ship use. When it was new, it must have been frighteningly powerful. Now, it's far beyond repair and every useful component has been looted.
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientMegaCannonBarrel.label: ancient mega-cannon barrel
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientMegaCannonTripod.descriptio: A mounting platform that once held some sort of cannon. It has been broken for many years and every useful component was looted long ago.
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientMegaCannonTripod.label: ancient mega-cannon platform
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientMetalCrate.description: A metal crate, now rusted shut. It's empty and worthless.
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientMetalCrate.label: rusted metal crate
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientMicrowave.description: An ancient device for heating food. Smashed and rusted, it is completely useless now.\n\nHow it got here is hard to say.
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientMicrowave.label: ancient microwave
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientMilitaryBarrier.description: A concrete barrier once used for military roadblocks.
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientMilitaryBarrier.label: ancient military barrier
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientMilitaryCrate.description: An ancient, military-looking crate. It was broken long ago and any valuables it once contained were looted.
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientMilitaryCrate.label: ancient military crate
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientMilitaryGeneratorSmall.desc: A small rusted generator. The fuel tank is empty and the engine is beyond repair.
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientMineralConveyor.description: A torn ancient mineral conveyor once used for transporting minerals. Non-functional now.
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientMineralConveyor.label: ancient mineral conveyor
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientMineralExports.description: A piece of ancient mineral outlet. Non-functional now.
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientMineralExports.label: ancient mineral outlet
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientMiningCharge.description: An explosive device used to quickly blast through rock. It is made from refined chemfuel. The explosive is old and inert.
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientMiningCharge.label: ancient mining charge
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientMiniWarwalkerRemains.descri: The shattered remains of an ancient sub-scale warsprinter. Whatever parts weren't ruined when it was destroyed were looted long ago.
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientMiniWarwalkerRemains.label: ancient warsprinter remains
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientMonitorBank.description: A small set of old computer screens.
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientMonitorBank.label: ancient monitor bank
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientMortar.description: A shattered mortar emplacement. It's smashed and will never work again.
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientMortar.label: busted mortar
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientMudCarriage.description: A mining car loaded with mud.
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientMudCarriage.label: ancient mud carriage
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientNutrientDispenser.descripti: An ancient nutrient solution dispenser that was used to process and convert nutrient ointments into nutrient solutions, and then transport nutrient solutions for hydroponic cultivation through a pipeline system. Inactive.
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientNutrientDispenser.label: ancient nutrient solution dispenser
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientNutrientPump.description: An ancient nutrient solution pump. This pump has been damaged.
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientNutrientPump.label: ancient nutrient pump
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientNutrientSolutionFermenter.d: An ancient nutrient solution fermenter used to process a series of raw food or fertilizers in a fermentation tank and separate them to obtain nutrient solution. Inactive.
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientNutrientSolutionStorageTank: Ancient nutrient solution storage tanks. Inactive.
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientOfficeDesk.label: ancient office desk
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientOfficePrinter.label: ancient office printer
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientOpenContainer.description: A rusted shipping container. Its contents are worthless.
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientOpenContainer.label: rusted open container
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientOperatingTable.description: A table once used for surgical operations. It has long since deteriorated into uselessness.
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientOperatingTable.label: ancient operating table
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientOreDressingMachine.descript: An ancient ore dressing machine. Non-functional
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientOreDressingMachine.label: ancient ore dressing machine
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientOrganBox.description: A secure storage box with a built-in cooling system, typically used to preserve organs over extended durations. Sealed shut.
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientOrganBox.label: ancient organ box
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientOrganBox_Empty.description: An empty storage box with a built-in cooling system, typically used to preserve organs over extended durations.
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientOrganBox_Empty.label: empty ancient organ box
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientOven.description: An ancient oven. Smashed and rusted, it is completely useless now.\n\nHow it got here is hard to say.
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientOven.label: ancient oven
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientPallet_SteelSlag.descriptio: A pallet stacked with fake steel scrap.
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientPallet_SteelSlag.label: steel scrap pallet
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientPipelineSection.description: A section from an ancient pipeline. It once carried some valuable fluid over long distances. Now it's been looted and deteriorated to uselessness.
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientPipelineSection.label: ancient pipeline section
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientPipes.description: A bunch of rusted old pipes. It is hard to say how these ended up here.
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientPipes.label: ancient pipes
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientPipes_Odyssey.description: Steel pipes. These do not transport anything.
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientPipes_Odyssey.label: ancient pipe
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientPlantPot.description: A large cracked pot with dead soil. Nothing can grow here any more.
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientPlantPot.label: ancient plant pot
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientPlasteelMiningCars.descript: A mining car loaded with Plasteel.
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientPlasteelMiningCars.label: ancient plasteel mining car
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientPodCar.description: An ancient pod car once capable of automated flight. Its valuable parts were looted long ago, and the rest is badly deteriorated.
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientPodCar.label: ancient pod car
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientPostbox.description: An ancient postbox, smashed and deteriorated to uselessness. It seems to have been moved here long ago for some unknown reason.
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientPostbox.label: ancient postbox
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientRazorWire.description: A piece of ancient razor wire. It has been deteriorating for many years and no longer poses any danger.
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientRazorWire.label: ancient razor wire
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientRefrigerator.description: An ancient refrigerator. It was stripped of interesting parts long ago.
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientRefrigerator.label: ancient refrigerator
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientRepairBench.label: ancient repair desk
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientResearchCountertop.label: ancient research countertop
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientRockMiningCar.description: A mining car loaded with Rock.
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientRockMiningCar.label: ancient rock mining car
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientRustedCar.description: An ancient, broken car. Everything that isn't rusted away was looted long ago.
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientRustedCar.label: ancient car
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientRustedCarFrame.description: An ancient, rusted car frame. The body shell has long since rusted away to nothing.
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientRustedCarFrame.label: ancient car frame
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientRustedDropship.description: The remains of an ancient dropship. The valuable parts were looted long ago and the rest has deteriorated to uselessness.
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientRustedDropship.label: ancient dropship
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientRustedEngineBlock.descripti: An ancient engine block that is rusted through. No repair could salvage this.
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientRustedEngineBlock.label: ancient engine block
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientRustedJeep.description: An ancient, broken troop carrier. Everything that isn't rusted away was looted long ago.
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientRustedJeep.label: ancient troop carrier
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientRustedMicrowave.description: An ancient microwave covered in rust. It's beyond repair.
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientRustedMicrowave.label: rusted microwave
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientRustedTruck.description: An ancient, broken truck. Everything useful either rusted away or was looted long ago.
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientRustedTruck.label: ancient truck
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientRustedTruckMining.descripti: An ancient truck stripped of any useful parts.
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientRustedTruckMining.label: ancient rusted truck
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientSafe.description: A locked safe. It's heavily rusted, and empty.
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientSafe.label: rusted safe
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientSealedContainer.description: A small container that's still sealed.
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientSealedContainer.label: sealed container
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientSealedContainer_Open.label: open container
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientSealedCrate.description: A small crate that's still sealed.
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientSealedCrate.label: sealed crate
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientSealedCrate_Open.label: open crate
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientSecurityCrate.description: A large self-powered hermetically-sealed crate with built-in security alarms. These can preserve their contents for a long time. Sealed shut.
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientSecurityCrate.label: ancient security crate
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientSecurityTurret.description: An ancient, broken security turret. The valuable parts have all been looted or smashed.
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientSecurityTurret.label: ancient security turret
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientSemiTrailer.description: An old truck trunk filled with dirt.
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientSemiTrailer.label: ancient semi trailer
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientShelf.description: An ancient shelf. It holds nothing of interest.
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientShelf.label: ancient shelf
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientShipBeacon.description: An ancient, broken ship navigation beacon. Every useful component was looted long ago.
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientShipBeacon.label: ancient nav beacon
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientShoppingCart.description: An ancient, rusted shopping cart. How exactly it got here is a mystery, but the story is long and probably quite sad.
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientShoppingCart.label: ancient shopping cart
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientShower.description: A broken shower stall. The plumbing is corroded and the ceramics are shattered.
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientShower.label: cracked shower
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientShuttle.description: An ancient, no longer operational shuttle.
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientShuttle.label: ancient shuttle
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientSimpleResearchBench.descrip: An old, rudimentary research bench with corroded tools and faded notes. Nothing of value remains.
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientSimpleResearchBench.label: ancient research bench
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientSingleBed.description: A single bed frame with rusted metal and a torn mattress. It's better than sleeping on the ground, but just barely.
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientSingleBed.label: rusted bed
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientSink.label: ancient small sink
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientSmallContainer.description: A rusted shipping container. It's completely empty.
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientSmallContainer.label: ancient container
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientSmallCrate.description: A small, empty crate which was abandoned ages ago. It's too rusted to store anything.
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientSmallCrate.label: ancient small crate
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientSmallShelf.description: An ancient shelf. There's nothing useful left on it.
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientSmallShelf.label: ancient small shelf
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientSmokeVent.description: The exhaust vent of some long forgotten underground megastructure. Permanently inactive.
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientSmokeVent.label: ancient smoke vent
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientSolarGenerator.description: The only light this would catch would be if it was set on fire.
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientSolarGenerator.label: ancient solar generator
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientSpacerCrate.description: An ancient, broken crate. Any valuables it once contained were taken long ago.
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientSpacerCrate.label: ancient spacer crate
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientStandardRecharger.descripti: An ancient standard recharger. Valuable parts are missing, and everything else is degraded to uselessness.
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientStandardRecharger.label: ancient standard recharger
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientSteelMiningCars.description: A mining car loaded with Steel.
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientSteelMiningCars.label: ancient steel mining car
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientStorageCylinder.description: An ancient device that looks like it once stored some kind of fluid. Valuable parts are missing, and everything else is degraded to uselessness.
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientStorageCylinder.label: ancient storage cylinder
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientStorageHeater.label: ancient storage heater
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientStove.description: An ancient stove. Smashed and rusted, it is completely useless now.\n\nHow it got here is hard to say.
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientStove.label: ancient stove
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientSunlamp.description: An ancient self-powered sun lamp. Its shell is sturdy, and it was powered by a thermonuclear battery, now depleted.
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientSunlamp.label: ancient sun lamp
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientSupplyCrate.description: An ancient crate with some building resources and components. Sealed shut.
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientSupplyCrate.label: ancient supply crate
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientSupplySlingshot.description: Often found in ancient vaults, supply slingshot is a complex mechanism that catapults a supply crate across huge distances. This one is non-functional.
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientSupplySlingshot.label: ancient supply slingshot
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientSystemRack.description: An ancient rack unit packed with unidentifiable devices. Valuable parts are missing, and everything else is degraded to uselessness.
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientSystemRack.label: ancient system rack
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientTableBrewery.description: A dilapidated brewing table once used for fermentation. The equipment is rusted beyond use.
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientTableBrewery.label: ancient brewery
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientTableButcher.description: A broken butcher's table littered with old stains.
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientTableButcher.label: ancient butcher table
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientTableDrugLab.description: A crumbling lab table with shattered glassware. The equipment is useless and contaminated.
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientTableDrugLab.label: ancient drug lab
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientTableMachining.description: A rusted machining table covered in debris. All useful parts have been scavenged.
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientTableMachining.label: ancient machining table
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientTableSmithingElectric.descr: A ruined electric smithy with frayed wires and scorched surfaces. It's beyond repair.
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientTableSmithingElectric.label: ancient electric smithy
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientTableSmithingFueled.descrip: An ancient smithy that once burned fuel for crafting. Now, it's covered in soot and rust.
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientTableSmithingFueled.label: ancient fueled smithy
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientTableStoveElectric.descript: An old electric stove with shattered heating elements. It's far too damaged to use.
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientTableStoveElectric.label: ancient electric stove
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientTableStoveFueled.descriptio: A rusted cooking stove. It's beyond unusable.
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientTableStoveFueled.label: ancient fueled stove
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientTableTailorElectric.descrip: A ruined tailor's bench with torn fabric and broken tools. It's beyond salvage.
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientTableTailorElectric.label: ancient electric tailor bench
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientTableTailorHand.description: A simple tailor's bench with splintered wood and rusted needles. Nothing useful remains.
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientTableTailorHand.label: ancient hand tailor bench
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientTank.description: The remains of an ancient tank which was destroyed by some kind of heavy weapon. All the useful components were looted or deteriorated long ago.
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientTank.label: ancient ruined tank
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientTankTrap.description: An defensive fortification for stopping vehicles. It's been deteriorating for many years.
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientTankTrap.label: ancient tank trap
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientTechCrate.description: Whatever this crate contained has long ago rotted and turned to dust.
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientTechCrate.label: ancient mechanized crate
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientTerminal.label: ancient terminal
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientTerraformer.description: An ancient terraforming device powered by a gravcore. It is inert.
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientTerraformer.label: ancient terraformer
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientTissueGrinder.description: The machinery and electronics are irreparable but could be broken down for scrap.
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientTissueGrinder.label: ancient tissue grinder
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientToilet.description: An ancient toilet. Smashed long ago, it is completely useless now.\n\nHow it got here is hard to say.
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientToilet.label: ancient toilet
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientToxifierGenerator.descripti: An ancient toxifier generator. Valuable parts are missing, and everything else is degraded to uselessness.
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientToxifierGenerator.label: ancient toxifier generator
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientToxVent.description: A massive duct that vents toxic fumes from an underground megastructure. Permanently inactive.
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientToxVent.label: ancient toxic vent
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientToyBox.label: ancient toy box
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientTransmitter.description: A transmitter used to send signals over long range. Non-functional.
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientTransmitter.label: ancient transmitter
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientTransportPod.description: An ancient cargo pod capable of carrying people, animals, and items. Not in working condition.
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientTransportPod.label: ancient transport pod
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientTripWarning.label: trip warning sign
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientTruckCompartment.descriptio: An old truck trunk filled with dirt.
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientTruckCompartment.label: ancient truck compartment
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientTunnelBoringMachine.descrip: The rusted, gigantic husk of an ancient tunnel boring machine. Non-functional now.
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientTunnelBoringMachine.label: ancient tunnel boring machine
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientTunnelerClaw.description: The claw of an ancient mining mechanoid. All the parts are degraded to uselessness.
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientTunnelerClaw.label: ancient tunneler claw
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientTunnelerHusk.description: The remains of an ancient mining mechanoid. Its complex parts are all degraded to uselessness.
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientTunnelerHusk.label: ancient tunneler husk
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientTunnelStructuralSupport_a.d: A piece of ancient tunnel support frame used to support tunnels during construction. Non-functional now.
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientTunnelStructuralSupport_b.d: A piece of ancient tunnel support frame used to support tunnels during construction. Non-functional now.
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientTV.description: A shattered television set. The screen is broken and the electronics are stripped out.
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientTV.label: busted television
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientUplink.description: An ancient transmitter used for secure communications between the surface and orbit.
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientUplink.label: ancient uplink
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientUraniumMiningCars.descripti: A mining car loaded with Uranium.
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientUraniumMiningCars.label: ancient uranium mining car
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientUraniumSlugTurret.descripti: A heavy turret designed to fire uranium slugs. The mechanism is smashed and the ammo is depleted.
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientUraniumSlugTurret.label: broken uranium slug turret
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientVaultLamp.label: ancient vault lamp
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientVendingMachine.description: An ancient vending machine. It was smashed ages ago and generations of looters have taken every conceivably useful part. How it ended up here is a mystery.
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientVendingMachine.label: ancient vending machine
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientVitalsMonitor.description: An old set of monitors to check up on the healing progress of wounded soldiers. Non-functional.
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientVitalsMonitor.label: ancient vitals monitor
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientVitalsMonitorTwo.descriptio: An old set of monitors to check up on the healing progress of wounded soldiers. Non-functional.
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientVitalsMonitorTwo.label: ancient vitals monitor
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientWarspiderRemains.descriptio: The ruined remains of an ancient mid-scale warspider. It has been picked over many times, and there is nothing valuable left to loot.
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientWarspiderRemains.label: ancient warspider remains
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientWarwalkerClaw.description: The assault claw of an ancient mid-scale warwalker. This weapon specialized in tearing through heavy plasteel armor at close range. Its valuable components were looted long ago.
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientWarwalkerClaw.label: ancient warwalker claw
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientWarwalkerFoot.description: A massive foot from an ancient warwalker. It seems to have been torn free from its owner by some kind of heavy weapon. All the useful components were looted or deteriorated long ago.
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientWarwalkerFoot.label: ancient warwalker foot
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientWarwalkerLeg.description: The shattered leg of a mid-scale warwalker that fell here long ago. It has been picked clean by looters, and no valuable components remain.
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientWarwalkerLeg.label: ancient warwalker leg
