LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientWarwalkerShell.description: Most of the armored shell of a warwalker. It appears to have been torn off by some colossal weapon system. All the valuable parts were looted, and the rest is badly deteriorated.
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientWarwalkerShell.label: ancient warwalker shell
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientWarwalkerTorso.description: The torso of a mid-scale warwalker which fell here in ancient days. The valuable parts were looted long ago.
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientWarwalkerTorso.label: ancient warwalker torso
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientWashingMachine.description: An ancient device used for washing textiles. Smashed and rusted, it is completely useless now.\n\nHow it got here is hard to say.
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientWashingMachine.label: ancient washing machine
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientWaterCooler.label: ancient water cooler
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientWaterFilter.label: ancient water filter
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientWheel.description: An ancient wheel from some kind of vehicle. The rubber has deteriorated away and the metal is twisted and rusted.
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientWheel.label: ancient wheel
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientWindTurbineBody.description: A toppled wind turbine with broken blades. It's been scavenged for parts long ago.
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientWindTurbineBody.label: ancient wind turbine
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientWoodenCrate.description: A weathered wooden crate. It's empty, and the wood is brittle.
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientWoodenCrate.label: old wooden crate
LanguageData.VFEPD_AnticraftBeam.description: A massive anti-ship beam weapon. Pew pew.
LanguageData.VFEPD_AnticraftBeam.label: anticraft beam
LanguageData.VFEPD_Anvil.label: anvil
LanguageData.VFEPD_ApocritonPulseEffect.description: This is an effecter prop for "Apocriton Pulse". Intrinsically laggy, use in moderation.
LanguageData.VFEPD_ApocritonPulseEffect.label: apocriton pulse
LanguageData.VFEPD_AppleTree.description: A fake tree bearing glossy, red apples, while a myriad of different varieties exist this particular type favors warm summers and mild winters.
LanguageData.VFEPD_AppleTree.label: apple tree
LanguageData.VFEPD_ArbuscularMycorrhiza.description: A mycorrhiza is a symbiotic association between a fungus and a plant. This one is fake.
LanguageData.VFEPD_ArbuscularMycorrhiza.label: arbuscular mycorrhiza
LanguageData.VFEPD_ArcheanTree.description: A tree imitating those bioengineered to terraform deadworlds and early-stage rimworlds. This is a non-functional fake.
LanguageData.VFEPD_ArcheanTree.label: archean tree
LanguageData.VFEPD_ArchiteCapsuleContainment.label: archite capsule containment
LanguageData.VFEPD_ArchitePathingArray.description: An old and inactive archite pathing array.
LanguageData.VFEPD_ArchitePathingArray.label: archite pathing array
LanguageData.VFEPD_ArchiteRecycler.description: An old and inactive archite recycler.
LanguageData.VFEPD_ArchiteRecycler.label: archite recycler
LanguageData.VFEPD_ArchogenInjector.description: An old and inactive archogen injector.
LanguageData.VFEPD_ArchogenInjector.label: archogen injector
LanguageData.VFEPD_ArchonexusCore.description: A cardboard imitation of the central core of an archonexus.
LanguageData.VFEPD_ArchonexusCore.label: archonexus core
LanguageData.VFEPD_ArchotechSupport_Large.description: A twisted archotech structure. Inactive and merely decorative.
LanguageData.VFEPD_ArchotechSupport_Large.label: large archotech support
LanguageData.VFEPD_ArchotechSupport_Small.description: A twisted archotech structure. Inactive and merely decorative.
LanguageData.VFEPD_ArchotechSupport_Small.label: archotech support
LanguageData.VFEPD_ArchotechSupport_Vertical.descript: A twisted archotech structure. Inactive and merely decorative.
LanguageData.VFEPD_ArchotechSupport_Vertical.label: vertical archotech support
LanguageData.VFEPD_ArchotechTower.description: A cardboard imitation of a large archotech structure.
LanguageData.VFEPD_ArchotechTower.label: archotech tower
LanguageData.VFEPD_ArmoredImperialShuttle.description: A spacer-tech imperial gunship designed for transit between surface and orbit, or between moons of a planetary system. This one seems to be non-functional.
LanguageData.VFEPD_ArmoredImperialShuttle.label: armored imperial shuttle
LanguageData.VFEPD_ArmorStandEmpty.description: An armor stand. There is currently no armor mounted on it.
LanguageData.VFEPD_ArmorStandEmpty.label: empty armor stand
LanguageData.VFEPD_ArmorStandFull.description: An armor stand. There is a suit of plate armor mounted on it.
LanguageData.VFEPD_ArmorStandFull.label: full armor stand
LanguageData.VFEPD_ArrowCage.label: arrow cage
LanguageData.VFEPD_ArtilleryWreck.description: An ancient, broken self propelled artillery. Everything that isn't rusted away was looted long ago.
LanguageData.VFEPD_ArtilleryWreck.label: artillery wreck
LanguageData.VFEPD_AssortedVials.description: Assorted vials. Intended to be placed over an empty workbench. Just for decorative purposes.
LanguageData.VFEPD_AssortedVials.label: assorted vials
LanguageData.VFEPD_AssortedVialsB.description: Assorted vials. Intended to be placed over an empty workbench. Just for decorative purposes.
LanguageData.VFEPD_AssortedVialsB.label: assorted vials
LanguageData.VFEPD_AssortedVialsC.description: Assorted vials. Intended to be placed over an empty workbench. Just for decorative purposes.
LanguageData.VFEPD_AssortedVialsC.label: assorted vials
LanguageData.VFEPD_Astragalus.description: A fake small perennial wildflower that grows in alpine climates.
LanguageData.VFEPD_Astragalus.label: astragalus
LanguageData.VFEPD_Atheism.description: This is a mote prop for "Atheism". Intrinsically laggy, though less than effecter props. Use in moderation.
LanguageData.VFEPD_Atheism.label: atheism
LanguageData.VFEPD_AtmosphericHeater.description: A thermal projection device powered by scavenged shards of dark archotechnology. Inactive.
LanguageData.VFEPD_AtmosphericHeater.label: atmospheric heater
LanguageData.VFEPD_AtmosphericHeaterLit.description: A thermal projection device powered by scavenged shards of dark archotechnology. Inactive.
LanguageData.VFEPD_AtmosphericHeaterLit.label: atmospheric heater, lit
LanguageData.VFEPD_Atom.description: This is a mote prop for "Atom Symbol". Intrinsically laggy, though less than effecter props. Use in moderation.
LanguageData.VFEPD_Atom.label: atom symbol
LanguageData.VFEPD_AuthStar.description: This is a fleck prop for "Authoritarian star". Intrinsically laggy, use in moderation.
LanguageData.VFEPD_AuthStar.label: authoritarian star
LanguageData.VFEPD_AutomaticDrillingRig.description: The remains of what was an automatic drill designed for automatic ore extraction, once supported by a multitude of infrastructures. Missing most supporting infrastructures, and, most critically, its core components, it wouldn't function as of now.
LanguageData.VFEPD_AutomaticDrillingRig.label: automatic drilling rig
LanguageData.VFEPD_AV_Cog.description: A medieval sailing vessel characterized by a sturdy, broad-bottomed design with a single mast and a square-rigged sail. It was commonly used for trade, transportation, and exploration during the Middle Ages in Europe. Non-functional: all its internal mechanisms have been removed. Intended to be placed over water. Or wherever you want, I'm not your mom!
LanguageData.VFEPD_AV_Cog.label: Cog
LanguageData.VFEPD_Badger.description: A tracked, armoured fighting vehicle, the Badger is designed to transport scouts and infantry while providing covering fire to suppress enemy troops. Non-functional: all its internal wiring and its motor have been removed.
LanguageData.VFEPD_Badger.label: Badger
LanguageData.VFEPD_Balloon.description: A lighter-than-air aircraft consisting of a bag, called an envelope, which contains heated air. Non-functional: all its internal mechanisms have been removed.
LanguageData.VFEPD_Balloon.label: Balloon
LanguageData.VFEPD_BambooTree.description: A fake, fast-growing tree-like plant that grows in dense groves. Bamboo can be harvested for a wood-like material. The plant itself is not beautiful.
LanguageData.VFEPD_BambooTree.label: bamboo tree
LanguageData.VFEPD_BananaTree.description: A fake, broad-leafed, tall tropical tree adorned with a cluster of yellow, elongated berries succinctly known as bananas.
LanguageData.VFEPD_BananaTree.label: banana tree
LanguageData.VFEPD_BangBus.description: A basic passenger transport, the Bangbus is a relatively cheap piece of machinery to construct to transport people across roads of flat terrain. Non-functional: all its internal wiring and its motor have been removed.
LanguageData.VFEPD_BangBus.label: Bang Bus
LanguageData.VFEPD_Banner.description: A decorative banner hanging from a vertical wooden frame.
LanguageData.VFEPD_Banner.label: banner
LanguageData.VFEPD_Bar.description: A somewhat ornate countertop stocked to the brim with different vessels and devices for making a variety of drinks.
LanguageData.VFEPD_Bar.label: decorative bar
LanguageData.VFEPD_Barley.description: A cereal grain that people can use in bread, beverages, stews, and other dishes. This one is fake.
LanguageData.VFEPD_Barley.label: barley
LanguageData.VFEPD_BarrelBlue.label: blue barrel
LanguageData.VFEPD_BarrelGreen.label: green barrel
LanguageData.VFEPD_BarrelGrey.label: grey barrel
LanguageData.VFEPD_BarrelRed.label: red barrel
LanguageData.VFEPD_BarrelYellow.label: yellow barrel
LanguageData.VFEPD_Battery.description: A simple device that stores power. This one is out-of-service.
LanguageData.VFEPD_Battery.label: battery
LanguageData.VFEPD_BattleTankWreck.description: An ancient, broken battle tank. Everything that isn't rusted away was looted long ago.
LanguageData.VFEPD_BattleTankWreck.label: battle tank wreck
LanguageData.VFEPD_Beakers.description: Assorted beakers. Intended to be placed over an empty workbench. Just for decorative purposes.
LanguageData.VFEPD_Beakers.label: beakers
LanguageData.VFEPD_Beans.description: A herbaceous bush with a long history of cultivation. This one is fake.
LanguageData.VFEPD_Beans.label: beans
LanguageData.VFEPD_BearBerryBush.description: A low-lying bush speckled with pink berries that thrives in poor, even sandy soil. This one is fake.
LanguageData.VFEPD_BearBerryBush.label: bearberry bush
LanguageData.VFEPD_Beet.description: A fake herb-like vegetable widely cultivated for humans and livestock alike, notably nutritious and historically used in dye making.
LanguageData.VFEPD_Beet.label: beet
LanguageData.VFEPD_BellPepper.description: Also known as sweet peppers, bell peppers are technically nightshades. This one is fake.
LanguageData.VFEPD_BellPepper.label: bell pepper
LanguageData.VFEPD_BenzPatentMotorwagen.description: The Benz Patent-Motorwagen, built in 1885 by Karl Benz, is widely regarded as the first practical automobile. It was a three-wheeled vehicle powered by a single-cylinder, four-stroke engine. Benz patented the design in 1886, marking the birth of the modern car. Non-functional: all its internal mechanisms have been removed.
LanguageData.VFEPD_BenzPatentMotorwagen.label: Benz Patent-Motorwagen
LanguageData.VFEPD_BerryBush.description: A fake bushy wild plant which yields delicious berries. Berries can be cooked, but they're also good to eat even when raw.
LanguageData.VFEPD_BerryBush.label: berry bush
LanguageData.VFEPD_BigFalseFire.description: This is just smoke and mirrors.
LanguageData.VFEPD_BigFalseFire.label: big fake fire
LanguageData.VFEPD_BigRig.description: A dedicated cargo transporter, the Big Rig is the epitome of bulk material transportation. Non-functional: all its internal wiring and its motor have been removed.
LanguageData.VFEPD_BigRig.label: Big Rig
LanguageData.VFEPD_Bileceps.description: Bileceps is a peculiar, coral-like mushroom that thrives on the bile of decaying bodies. This one is fake.
LanguageData.VFEPD_Bileceps.label: bileceps
LanguageData.VFEPD_BinBag.description: A black bag containing various sort of rubbish.
LanguageData.VFEPD_BinBag.label: bin bag
LanguageData.VFEPD_Biofluxium.description: An exotic space plant. This one is fake.
LanguageData.VFEPD_Biofluxium.label: biofluxium
LanguageData.VFEPD_BioLight.description: A metallic capsule filled with some bioluminescent compound. Seems to be non-functional.
LanguageData.VFEPD_BioLight.label: ancient bioluminescent light
LanguageData.VFEPD_BioRefineryLargeBarrel.description: The large barrel of a biorefinery. Intended to be placed alongside an empty workbench. Just for decorative purposes.
LanguageData.VFEPD_BioRefineryLargeBarrel.label: biorefinery large barrel
LanguageData.VFEPD_BioRefineryLargeBarrelHorizontal.d: The large barrel of a biorefinery. Intended to be placed alongside an empty workbench. Just for decorative purposes.
LanguageData.VFEPD_BioRefineryMediumBarrel.descriptio: The medium barrel of a biorefinery. Intended to be placed alongside an empty workbench. Just for decorative purposes.
LanguageData.VFEPD_BioRefineryMediumBarrel.label: biorefinery medium barrel
The medium barrel of a biorefinery. Intended to be placed alongside an empty workbench. Just for decorative purposes.
LanguageData.VFEPD_BioRefinerySmallBarrel.description: The small barrel of a biorefinery. Intended to be placed alongside an empty workbench. Just for decorative purposes.
LanguageData.VFEPD_BioRefinerySmallBarrel.label: biorefinery small barrel
LanguageData.VFEPD_BiosculpterPod_OperatingEffect.des: This is an effecter prop for "Biosculpter Pod Operating". Intrinsically laggy, use in moderation.
LanguageData.VFEPD_BiosecuredCrate.description: A small imperial crate containing extremely valuable items. Sealed shut.
LanguageData.VFEPD_BiosecuredCrate.label: biosecured crate
LanguageData.VFEPD_BirchTree.description: A fake temperate-biome tree known for its thin, white, paper-like bark.
LanguageData.VFEPD_BirchTree.label: birch tree
LanguageData.VFEPD_Blisscap.description: A long, light-blue mushroom that offers more than just sustenance. This one is fake.
LanguageData.VFEPD_Blisscap.label: blisscap
LanguageData.VFEPD_BlocksPileA.description: A pile of blocks in the process of being chiseled. Intended to be placed alongside an empty workbench. Just for decorative purposes.
LanguageData.VFEPD_BlocksPileA.label: pile of blocks
LanguageData.VFEPD_BlocksPileB.description: A pile of blocks in the process of being chiseled. Intended to be placed alongside an empty workbench. Just for decorative purposes.
LanguageData.VFEPD_BlocksPileB.label: pile of blocks
LanguageData.VFEPD_BlocksPileC.description: A pile of blocks in the process of being chiseled. Intended to be placed alongside an empty workbench. Just for decorative purposes.
LanguageData.VFEPD_BlocksPileC.label: pile of blocks
LanguageData.VFEPD_BloodBouquet.description: A spiny plant with some kind of fruit hanging from its top. The fruit seems to be as hard as the trunk itself, and equally covered in spines. This one is fake.
LanguageData.VFEPD_BloodBouquet.label: blood bouquet
LanguageData.VFEPD_Bloodfeed_WarmupEffect.description: This is an effecter prop for "Bloodfeed Warmup". Intrinsically laggy, use in moderation.
LanguageData.VFEPD_Bloodfeed_WarmupEffect.label: bloodfeed warmup
LanguageData.VFEPD_BloodSplatter.description: Blood splatter from a butcher table. Intended to be placed alongside an empty workbench. Just for decorative purposes.
LanguageData.VFEPD_BloodSplatter.label: blood splatter
LanguageData.VFEPD_Blueberry.description: A shrub prized for its sweet edible fruits. This one is fake.
LanguageData.VFEPD_Blueberry.label: blueberry
LanguageData.VFEPD_Boomshroom.description:
These mushrooms produce volatile chemicals as a defensive measure. They can be harvested for chemfuel. However, this must be done with extreme caution, as the mushrooms can explode if they're destroyed.

Glitterworld researchers have used genetic material from boomshrooms to bioengineer a number of chemfuel-producing animals.

This object is inert and serves no biological function.
LanguageData.VFEPD_Boomshroom.label: boomshroom
LanguageData.VFEPD_BoxLarge.description: A large wooden box with various content.
LanguageData.VFEPD_BoxLarge.label: large wooden box
LanguageData.VFEPD_BoxSmall.description: A small wooden box with various content.
LanguageData.VFEPD_BoxSmall.label: small wooden box
LanguageData.VFEPD_Brambles.description: Fake, tangled, thorny, woody shoots covered with leaves. Brambles grow in clusters, and slow down anyone moving over them.
LanguageData.VFEPD_Brambles.label: brambles
LanguageData.VFEPD_BrazierEmpty.description: A bowl-shaped furnishing used to hold a fire.
LanguageData.VFEPD_BrazierEmpty.label: empty brazier
LanguageData.VFEPD_BreweryBarrel.description: A small brewery barrel. Intended to be placed over an empty workbench. Just for decorative purposes.
LanguageData.VFEPD_BreweryBarrel.label: brewery barrel
LanguageData.VFEPD_BreweryTablet.description: A brewery mat to process the plants into must. Or something. Don't look at me, I'm not a beer maker. Intended to be placed alongside an empty workbench. Just for decorative purposes.
LanguageData.VFEPD_BreweryTablet.label: brewery mat
LanguageData.VFEPD_BrewingBarrel.label: brewing barrel
LanguageData.VFEPD_BrickPile.label: brick pile
LanguageData.VFEPD_Brig.description: A two-masted sailing vessel with square rigging on both masts, typically carrying a fore-and-aft sail on the aftermast. Brigs were widely used for both naval and merchant purposes due to their combination of maneuverability and relatively large cargo capacity. Non-functional: all its internal mechanisms have been removed. Intended to be placed over water. Or wherever you want, I'm not your mom!
LanguageData.VFEPD_Brig.label: Brig
LanguageData.VFEPD_BrownBarrelCactus.description: The brown barrel cactus, Ferocactus Brunetus, is an extremophile plant that thrives in low-water and poor sunlight conditions. This one is fake.
LanguageData.VFEPD_BrownBarrelCactus.label: brown barrel cactus
LanguageData.VFEPD_BrownSmelterGizmo.description: A small smelter gizmo. God knows what this does. Intended to be placed over an empty workbench. Just for decorative purposes.
LanguageData.VFEPD_BrownSmelterGizmo.label: smelter gizmo, grey
LanguageData.VFEPD_BrusselsSprout.description: A form of cabbage grown for its edible buds called "sprouts". This one is fake.
LanguageData.VFEPD_BrusselsSprout.label: brussels sprout
LanguageData.VFEPD_Bryolux.description: A fake blue moss typically found in deep, dark caves. It is sticky, with tangled fibers, which slows anyone walking over it.
LanguageData.VFEPD_Bryolux.label: bryolux
LanguageData.VFEPD_BucketEmpty.label: empty bucket
LanguageData.VFEPD_BucketwithWater.description: A wooden bucket filled with water.
LanguageData.VFEPD_BucketwithWater.label: water bucket
LanguageData.VFEPD_Buckwheat.description: A pseudocereal cultivated for its grain-like seeds. This one is fake.
LanguageData.VFEPD_Buckwheat.label: buckwheat
LanguageData.VFEPD_Bulb.description: This is a fleck prop for "Bulb". Intrinsically laggy, use in moderation.
LanguageData.VFEPD_Bulb.label: bulb
LanguageData.VFEPD_Bulldog.description: A general main battle tank, the Bulldog is an improved combat vehicle that performs well in any engagement. Non-functional: all its internal wiring and its motor have been removed.
LanguageData.VFEPD_Bulldog.label: Bulldog
LanguageData.VFEPD_BunnyEarsCactus.description: A cultivated succulent with pads resembling ears of a bunny, and spines resembling fuzzy fur. This one is fake.
LanguageData.VFEPD_BunnyEarsCactus.label: bunny ears cactus
LanguageData.VFEPD_Bunsen.description: A basic light tank, the Bunsen is a modified armoured vehicle suited for taking on enemy fortifications and exposed infantry. Non-functional: all its internal wiring and its motor have been removed.
LanguageData.VFEPD_Bunsen.label: Bunsen
LanguageData.VFEPD_BurnbongSmokeEffect.description: This is an effecter prop for "Burnbong Smoke". Intrinsically laggy, use in moderation.
LanguageData.VFEPD_BurnbongSmokeEffect.label: burnbong smoke
LanguageData.VFEPD_BurnedTree.description: A fake burned tree stump. It's ugly and yields no usable wood.
LanguageData.VFEPD_BurnedTree.label: burned tree
LanguageData.VFEPD_BurnoutIntelScraper.description: A deserter device capable of intercepting imperial communication. Seems to be inactive.
LanguageData.VFEPD_BurnoutIntelScraper.label: burnout intel scraper
LanguageData.VFEPD_Burya.description: A dedicated multiple launch rocket system platform, the Burya is a long-range siege and area denial weapon that can be operated by a two-man crew for faster loading speeds. Non-functional: all its internal wiring and its motor have been removed.
LanguageData.VFEPD_Burya.label: Burya
LanguageData.VFEPD_BuryPawnEffect.description: This is an effecter prop for "Bury Pawn". Intrinsically laggy, use in moderation.
LanguageData.VFEPD_BuryPawnEffect.label: bury pawn
LanguageData.VFEPD_Bush.description: A fake, short shrub. Does not typically talk.
LanguageData.VFEPD_Bush.label: bush
LanguageData.VFEPD_BustedAncientWonderdoc.description: Once capable of performing powerful wondercycles, this ancient medical machine has fully broken down after a catastrophic malfunction. Its chambers are cracked, its systems dead, and it can no longer be used. Some valuables may still be salvaged from it.
LanguageData.VFEPD_BustedAncientWonderdoc.label: busted ancient wonderdoc
LanguageData.VFEPD_BustedControlPanel.label: busted control panel
LanguageData.VFEPD_ButcherMechanoidEffect.description: This is an effecter prop for "Butcher Mechanoid". Intrinsically laggy, use in moderation.
LanguageData.VFEPD_ButcherMechanoidEffect.label: butcher mechanoid
LanguageData.VFEPD_ButternutSquash.description: A vine plant that produces a vegetable with a sweet, nutty taste similar to that of a pumpkin. This one is fake.
LanguageData.VFEPD_ButternutSquash.label: butternut squash
LanguageData.VFEPD_Cabbage.description: A fake somewhat hardy, leafy green vegetable, often chopped and then fermented or stewed.
LanguageData.VFEPD_Cabbage.label: cabbage
LanguageData.VFEPD_CageBrazier.description: A metal cage shaped empty brazier.
LanguageData.VFEPD_CageBrazier.label: cage brazier
LanguageData.VFEPD_CagePlatform.description: A cage platform to walk on.
LanguageData.VFEPD_CagePlatform.label: cage platform
LanguageData.VFEPD_CanningMachine.description: A canning machine is an appliance to store preserved food inside metallic cans. This one is inactive and non-functional.
LanguageData.VFEPD_CanningMachine.label: canning machine
LanguageData.VFEPD_Canola.description: A bright-yellow flowering variety of the rapeseed, cultivated mainly for its oil-rich seed. This one is fake.
LanguageData.VFEPD_Canola.label: canola
LanguageData.VFEPD_CanopicJar.description: A decorative canopic jar. Well, you could stuff a fresh organ inside, but that'd be SO gross.
LanguageData.VFEPD_CanopicJar.label: canopic jar
LanguageData.VFEPD_CanopicJarB.description: A decorative canopic jar. Well, you could stuff a fresh organ inside, but that'd be SO gross.
LanguageData.VFEPD_CanopicJarB.label: canopic jar
LanguageData.VFEPD_CanopicJarC.description: A decorative canopic jar. Well, you could stuff a fresh organ inside, but that'd be SO gross.
LanguageData.VFEPD_CanopicJarC.label: canopic jar
LanguageData.VFEPD_CanopicJarD.description: A decorative canopic jar. Well, you could stuff a fresh organ inside, but that'd be SO gross.
LanguageData.VFEPD_CanopicJarD.label: canopic jar
LanguageData.VFEPD_Caravel.description: A caravel is a small, fast, and versatile sailing ship known for its narrow hull, multiple masts, and combination of square and lateen sails. It was widely used for exploration, trade, and naval activities during the Age of Discovery. Non-functional: all its internal mechanisms have been removed. Intended to be placed over water. Or wherever you want, I'm not your mom!
LanguageData.VFEPD_Caravel.label: Caravel
LanguageData.VFEPD_CardboardBoxLarge.description: A large cardboard box with various content.
LanguageData.VFEPD_CardboardBoxLarge.label: large cardboard box
LanguageData.VFEPD_CardboardBoxSmall.description: A small cardboard box with various content.
LanguageData.VFEPD_CardboardBoxSmall.label: small cardboard box
LanguageData.VFEPD_CarDeliveryBlack.label: black delivery truck
LanguageData.VFEPD_CarDeliveryBlue.label: blue delivery truck
LanguageData.VFEPD_CarDeliveryRed.label: red delivery truck
LanguageData.VFEPD_CarDeliverySilver.label: silver delivery truck
LanguageData.VFEPD_CarDeliveryWhite.label: white delivery truck
LanguageData.VFEPD_CarFamilyBlack.label: black family car
LanguageData.VFEPD_CarFamilyBlue.label: blue family car
LanguageData.VFEPD_CarFamilyRed.label: red family car
LanguageData.VFEPD_CarFamilySilver.label: silver family car
LanguageData.VFEPD_CarFamilyWhite.label: white family car
LanguageData.VFEPD_CarForklift.label: forklift
LanguageData.VFEPD_CargoHelicopterWreck.description: An ancient, crashed cargo helicopter. Everything that isn't rusted away was looted long ago.
LanguageData.VFEPD_CargoHelicopterWreck.label: cargo helicopter wreck
LanguageData.VFEPD_CarPickupBlack.label: black pickup truck
LanguageData.VFEPD_CarPickupBlue.label: blue pickup truck
LanguageData.VFEPD_CarPickupRed.label: red pickup truck
LanguageData.VFEPD_CarPickupSilver.label: silver pickup truck
LanguageData.VFEPD_CarPickupWhite.label: white pickup truck
LanguageData.VFEPD_Carrot.description: A herbaceous plant of the Apiaceae family that produces an edible taproot. This one is fake.
LanguageData.VFEPD_Carrot.label: carrot
LanguageData.VFEPD_CarVintageBlack.label: black vintage car
LanguageData.VFEPD_CarVintageBlue.label: blue vintage car
LanguageData.VFEPD_CarVintageRed.label: red vintage car
LanguageData.VFEPD_CarVintageSilver.label: silver vintage car
LanguageData.VFEPD_CarVintageWhite.label: white vintage car
LanguageData.VFEPD_Cassava.description: A tuberous edible plant also called manioc, mandioca, or yuca. This one is fake.
LanguageData.VFEPD_Cassava.label: cassava
LanguageData.VFEPD_CavePaintings.description: This is a mote prop for "Cave paintings". Intrinsically laggy, though less than effecter props. Use in moderation.
LanguageData.VFEPD_CavePaintings.label: cave paintings
LanguageData.VFEPD_CecropiaTree.description: One of the most common rainforest trees. Cecropia grows very fast, but yields little usable wood.
LanguageData.VFEPD_CecropiaTree.label: cecropia tree
LanguageData.VFEPD_Celery.description: A vegetable consisting of a long fibrous stalk tapering into leaves. This one is fake.
LanguageData.VFEPD_Celery.label: celery
LanguageData.VFEPD_CellPollutionEffect.description: This is an effecter prop for "Cell Pollution". Intrinsically laggy, use in moderation.
LanguageData.VFEPD_CellPollutionEffect.label: cell pollution
LanguageData.VFEPD_CerebrexCore.description: The thinking mind of the mechanoid swarm. Powered by Linux.
LanguageData.VFEPD_CerebrexCore.label: cerebrex core
LanguageData.VFEPD_CerebrexCore_Destroyed.description: The smashed neural nexus of the mechanoid swarm that once commanded mechanoids around the planet.
LanguageData.VFEPD_CerebrexCore_Destroyed.label: destroyed cerebrex core
LanguageData.VFEPD_CerebrexStabilizer.description: A remote shield generator that makes the nearby cerebrex core nearly invincible. Or it would, if it wasn't fake.
LanguageData.VFEPD_CerebrexStabilizer.label: cerebrex stabilizer
LanguageData.VFEPD_Chariot.description: A simple horse-driven cart that provides fast transportation. Non-functional: all its internal mechanisms have been removed. Even the horse is fake.
LanguageData.VFEPD_Chariot.label: Chariot
LanguageData.VFEPD_Charley.description: A general motorcycle, the Charley is a very effective single-person vehicle with a small cargo capacity. Non-functional: all its internal wiring and its motor have been removed.
LanguageData.VFEPD_Charley.label: Charley
LanguageData.VFEPD_CheesePress.description: A cheese press is a device for pressing whey from curds when making cheese. This one is empty and non-functional.
LanguageData.VFEPD_CheesePress.label: cheese press
LanguageData.VFEPD_ChemfuelTank.description: A large tank filled with explosive chemfuel.
LanguageData.VFEPD_ChemfuelTank.label: large chemfuel tank
LanguageData.VFEPD_ChemfuelTank_Prop.description: A chemfuel storage tank that supplies fuel for thrusters on a gravship. This tank seems completely inert.
LanguageData.VFEPD_ChemfuelTank_Prop.label: small chemfuel tank
LanguageData.VFEPD_ChemfuelTank_VCE.description: An industrial liquid storage tank meant for storing chemfuel. This one is empty and non-functional.
LanguageData.VFEPD_ChemfuelTank_VCE.label: chemfuel tank
LanguageData.VFEPD_ChemfuelTankSmall.description: A small chemfuel tank. Intended to be placed over an empty workbench. Just for decorative purposes.
LanguageData.VFEPD_ChemfuelTankSmall.label: chemfuel tank
LanguageData.VFEPD_CherryTree.description: A fake tree bearing tiny purple-red sweet cherries.
LanguageData.VFEPD_CherryTree.label: cherry tree
LanguageData.VFEPD_Chickpea.description: One of the earliest cultivated legumes, widely grown for its nutritious seeds. This one is fake.
LanguageData.VFEPD_Chickpea.label: chickpea
LanguageData.VFEPD_Chisel.description: A small chisel. Intended to be placed over an empty workbench. Just for decorative purposes.
LanguageData.VFEPD_Chisel.label: chisel
LanguageData.VFEPD_Chokevine.description: A fake, tangled masses of cord-like, spiky vines which coil in great masses along the ground. Chokevine greatky slows down anyone who moves over it. Multiple tribes have independently generated stories of chokevine strangling children to death in the night, as a way to scare kids into coming home before dark.
LanguageData.VFEPD_Chokevine.label: chokevine
LanguageData.VFEPD_ChristmasTree.description: A celebratory tree decorated with ornaments and lights traditionally made as part of Christmas celebrations. Made of plastic.
LanguageData.VFEPD_ChristmasTree.label: christmas tree
LanguageData.VFEPD_ChristmasTreeTwinkleEffect.descrip: This is an effecter prop for "Christmas Tree Twinkle". Intrinsically laggy, use in moderation.
LanguageData.VFEPD_ChristmasTreeTwinkleEffect.label: christmas twinkle
LanguageData.VFEPD_ClassicCarWreck.description: An ancient, broken classic car. Everything that isn't rusted away was looted long ago.
LanguageData.VFEPD_ClassicCarWreck.label: classical car wreck
LanguageData.VFEPD_CleanEffect.description: This is an effecter prop for "Clean". Intrinsically laggy, use in moderation.
LanguageData.VFEPD_CleanEffect.label: clean
LanguageData.VFEPD_ClearSnowEffect.description: This is an effecter prop for "Clear Snow". Intrinsically laggy, use in moderation.
LanguageData.VFEPD_ClearSnowEffect.label: clear snow
LanguageData.VFEPD_Cleaver.description: A small cleaver. Intended to be placed over an empty workbench. Just for decorative purposes.
LanguageData.VFEPD_Cleaver.label: cleaver
LanguageData.VFEPD_ClimateAdjuster.description: An ultratech device for controlling climate. Using chemicals and exotic fields to manipulate the atmosphere, it shifts the temperature in this region of the world. Looking inside, you'll discover it's actually a cardboard cutout without any relevant machinery.
LanguageData.VFEPD_ClimateAdjuster.label: climate adjuster
LanguageData.VFEPD_Clivia.description: An unusual plant with tall, pretty flowers. Some call it the 'bush lily'.
LanguageData.VFEPD_Clivia.label: clivia
LanguageData.VFEPD_ClothCrate.description: Fake bolts of cloth stacked in a crate.
LanguageData.VFEPD_ClothCrate.label: cloth crate
LanguageData.VFEPD_CoalBurner.label: coal burner
LanguageData.VFEPD_CoconutPalm.description: A palm tree cultivated extensively in tropical areas for its edible fruit, the coconut. This one is fake.
LanguageData.VFEPD_CoconutPalm.label: coconut palm
LanguageData.VFEPD_CocoonLocust.description: A stasis cocoon containing a locust. This one is empty.
LanguageData.VFEPD_CocoonLocust.label: locust cocoon
LanguageData.VFEPD_CocoonMegascarab.label: megascarab cocoon
LanguageData.VFEPD_CocoonMegaspider.label: megaspider cocoon
LanguageData.VFEPD_CocoonSpelopede.label: spelopede cocoon
LanguageData.VFEPD_CoffeeTable.label: coffee table (2x1)
LanguageData.VFEPD_CoffeeTableSmall.label: coffee table (1x1)
LanguageData.VFEPD_Cog.description: This is a mote prop for "Cog". Intrinsically laggy, though less than effecter props. Use in moderation.
LanguageData.VFEPD_Cog.label: cog
LanguageData.VFEPD_CognitiveRecoveryArray.description: An old and inactive cognitive recovery array.
LanguageData.VFEPD_CognitiveRecoveryArray.label: cognitive recovery array
LanguageData.VFEPD_CommsTable.description: This was once a smart table. But now it's dumb.
LanguageData.VFEPD_CommsTable.label: ancient comms table
LanguageData.VFEPD_CommsTerminal.description: A compact version of a comms console that allows radio contact with other factions and orbital traders. Inactive.
LanguageData.VFEPD_CommsTerminal.label: comms terminal
LanguageData.VFEPD_ComplexityHarmonizer.description: An old and inactive complexity harmonizer.
LanguageData.VFEPD_ComplexityHarmonizer.label: complexity harmonizer
LanguageData.VFEPD_ConcreteBags.description: A large stack of concrete bags.
LanguageData.VFEPD_ConcreteBags.label: concrete bags
LanguageData.VFEPD_CondimentPrepTable.description: A working table to cut, slice and prepare condiments used in gourmet recipes.
LanguageData.VFEPD_CondimentPrepTable.label: decorative condiment table
LanguageData.VFEPD_Cone.label: cone
LanguageData.VFEPD_ConeWrench.description: A small cone wrench. Intended to be placed over an empty workbench. Just for decorative purposes.
LanguageData.VFEPD_ConeWrench.label: cone wrench
LanguageData.VFEPD_ConstructDirtEffect.description: This is an effecter prop for "Construct Dirt". Intrinsically laggy, use in moderation.
LanguageData.VFEPD_ConstructDirtEffect.label: construct dirt
LanguageData.VFEPD_ConstructMetalEffect.description: This is an effecter prop for "Construct Metal". Intrinsically laggy, use in moderation.
LanguageData.VFEPD_ConstructMetalEffect.label: construct metal
LanguageData.VFEPD_ConstructWoodEffect.description: This is an effecter prop for "Construct Wood". Intrinsically laggy, use in moderation.
LanguageData.VFEPD_ConstructWoodEffect.label: construct wood
LanguageData.VFEPD_ContainerBlue.description: A blue metal cargo container. Impassable. Cannot hold roof.
LanguageData.VFEPD_ContainerBlue.label: blue cargo container
LanguageData.VFEPD_ContainerGreen.description: A green metal cargo container. Impassable. Cannot hold roof.
LanguageData.VFEPD_ContainerGreen.label: green cargo container
LanguageData.VFEPD_ContainerGrey.description: A grey metal cargo container. Impassable. Cannot hold roof.
LanguageData.VFEPD_ContainerGrey.label: grey cargo container
LanguageData.VFEPD_ContainerRed.description: A red metal cargo container. Impassable. Cannot hold roof.
LanguageData.VFEPD_ContainerRed.label: red cargo container
LanguageData.VFEPD_ContainerYellow.description: A yellow metal cargo container. Impassable. Cannot hold roof.
LanguageData.VFEPD_ContainerYellow.label: yellow cargo container
LanguageData.VFEPD_ControlMechEffect.description: This is an effecter prop for "Control Mech". Intrinsically laggy, use in moderation.
LanguageData.VFEPD_ControlMechEffect.label: control mech
LanguageData.VFEPD_ConveyorInput.description: A small conveyor input. Intended to be placed over an empty workbench. Just for decorative purposes.
LanguageData.VFEPD_ConveyorInput.label: conveyor input
LanguageData.VFEPD_CookEffect.description: This is an effecter prop for "Cook". Intrinsically laggy, use in moderation.
LanguageData.VFEPD_CookEffect.label: cook
LanguageData.VFEPD_Cooker.label: cooker
LanguageData.VFEPD_CookingAppliances.label: cooking appliances
LanguageData.VFEPD_CookingPan.label: pan
LanguageData.VFEPD_CopilotConsole.description: An auxiliary interface that allows a copilot to assist in launching and piloting a gravship. Inactive.
LanguageData.VFEPD_CopilotConsole.label: copilot console
LanguageData.VFEPD_Corn.description: A fake tall grain plant which produces ears of soft, edible seeds. While corn takes a long time to grow, it yields lots of food compared to other crops. Harvested corn takes a long time to spoil.
LanguageData.VFEPD_Corn.label: corn plant
LanguageData.VFEPD_Cotton.description: A fake mid-size crop that yields fine white cotton fibers. These are used to make cloth.
LanguageData.VFEPD_Cotton.label: cotton plant
LanguageData.VFEPD_CoveredCarriage.description: A horse-drawn four-wheeled vehicle used to transport people. Non-functional: all its internal mechanisms have been removed. Even the horses are fake.
LanguageData.VFEPD_CoveredCarriage.label: Covered Carriage
LanguageData.VFEPD_Creeper.description: A hive-like structure created by giant insects.
LanguageData.VFEPD_Creeper.label: creeper
LanguageData.VFEPD_CreepyBabyToy.label: creepy baby toy
LanguageData.VFEPD_Crescent.description: This is a fleck prop for "Crescent". Intrinsically laggy, use in moderation.
LanguageData.VFEPD_Crescent.label: crescent
LanguageData.VFEPD_Cross.description: This is a fleck prop for "Cross". Intrinsically laggy, use in moderation.
LanguageData.VFEPD_Cross.label: cross
LanguageData.VFEPD_Crosstie.description: A rail road crosstie placed under the railroad tracks.
LanguageData.VFEPD_Crosstie.label: crosstie
LanguageData.VFEPD_CrystalBall.description: This is a mote prop for "Crystal Ball". Intrinsically laggy, though less than effecter props. Use in moderation.
LanguageData.VFEPD_CrystalBall.label: crystal ball
LanguageData.VFEPD_CrystalFlower.description: A tall, translucent flower that seems to be partially inorganic. This one is fake.
LanguageData.VFEPD_CrystalFlower.label: crystal flower
LanguageData.VFEPD_CrystalHorn.description: This strange flower seems to be only partially organic. Part of its structure is clearly crystalline, and it appears to be unaffected, or even bolstered, by the extremely cold climate. This one is fake.
LanguageData.VFEPD_CrystalHorn.label: crystal horn
LanguageData.VFEPD_Cucumber.description: A sprawling vine with large leaves and curling tendrils, triangular prickly hairy leaves and yellow flowers. This one is fake.
LanguageData.VFEPD_Cucumber.label: cucumber
LanguageData.VFEPD_CutStoneEffect.description: This is an effecter prop for "Cut Stone, Tailor, Smith and Sculpt", which share a similar effecter. Intrinsically laggy, use in moderation.
LanguageData.VFEPD_CutStoneEffect.label: stone bits
LanguageData.VFEPD_CuttingBoard.label: cutting board
LanguageData.VFEPD_CuttingTableWithKnife.description: A cutting table with a sharpened knife. Intended to be placed over an empty workbench. Just for decorative purposes.
LanguageData.VFEPD_CuttingTableWithKnife.label: cutting table, knife
LanguageData.VFEPD_CypressTree.description: A fake, tall coniferous tree often found in swamps. Despite its slow growth, planting these trees can be profitable as a low-effort, long-term investment because they yield so much usable wood.
LanguageData.VFEPD_CypressTree.label: cypress tree
LanguageData.VFEPD_DamagedHydro.description: An ancient artificial nutrient bath for growing plants. Its core components have long been damaged and are now a pile of useless scrap iron.
LanguageData.VFEPD_DamagedHydro.label: damaged ancient hydroponics
LanguageData.VFEPD_DamagedHydroB.description: An ancient artificial nutrient bath for growing plants. Its core components have long been damaged and are now a pile of useless scrap iron.
LanguageData.VFEPD_DamagedHydroB.label: damaged ancient hydroponics
LanguageData.VFEPD_DamagedHydroC.description: An ancient artificial nutrient bath for growing plants. Its core components have long been damaged and are now a pile of useless scrap iron.
LanguageData.VFEPD_DamagedHydroC.label: damaged ancient hydroponics
LanguageData.VFEPD_Dandelion.description: A fake tiny yellow flower which grows in large clusters.
LanguageData.VFEPD_Dandelion.label: dandelions
LanguageData.VFEPD_DataConsole.description: An advanced data console accepting several different types of file formatting.
LanguageData.VFEPD_DataConsole.label: data console
LanguageData.VFEPD_DataConveyor.description: A large box holding cables and pipes for data transfer.
LanguageData.VFEPD_DataConveyor.label: data conveyor
LanguageData.VFEPD_Daylily.description: A cultivated fake flower with wide petals and a short lifespan. Daylilies are very beautiful, but must be replanted often.
LanguageData.VFEPD_Daylily.label: daylily
LanguageData.VFEPD_DeadBowerTree.description: Despite its common name, the dead bower tree is not truly dead, just exceptionally adapted to survival in arid weather. This one is fake.
LanguageData.VFEPD_DeadBowerTree.label: dead bower tree

LanguageData.VFEPD_DecorativeCubeSculture_Dirt.descri: A hastily constructed sculpture resembling a cube.
LanguageData.VFEPD_DecorativeCubeSculture_Dirt.label: decorative cube, dirt
LanguageData.VFEPD_DecorativeCubeSculture_Sand.descri: A hastily constructed sculpture resembling a cube.
LanguageData.VFEPD_DecorativeCubeSculture_Sand.label: decorative cube, sand
LanguageData.VFEPD_DecorativeCubeSculture_Scrap.descr: A hastily constructed sculpture resembling a cube.
LanguageData.VFEPD_DecorativeCubeSculture_Scrap.label: decorative cube, scrap
LanguageData.VFEPD_DecorativeCubeSculture_Stone.descr: A hastily constructed sculpture resembling a cube.
LanguageData.VFEPD_DecorativeCubeSculture_Stone.label: decorative cube, stone
LanguageData.VFEPD_DecorativePlatform.description: A decorative holding platform. Not useful for containment of any kind.
LanguageData.VFEPD_DecorativePlatform.label: decorative platform
LanguageData.VFEPD_DecorativeSodaFountain.description: An all-in-one soda manufacturing unit. This one is inactive and non-functional.
LanguageData.VFEPD_DecorativeSodaFountain.label: soda fountain
LanguageData.VFEPD_DeepchemTank.description: A heavy industrial sludge storage tank meant for storing deepchem delivered via deepchem pipe network. This one is empty and non-functional.
LanguageData.VFEPD_DeepchemTank.label: deepchem tank
LanguageData.VFEPD_DeepFrier.description: A deep fryer is a kitchen appliance used for deep frying. This one is inactive and non-functional.
LanguageData.VFEPD_DeepFrier.label: deep fryer
LanguageData.VFEPD_DeepHeater.description: A deep canal that connects to some underground steam caverns, dug up by giant insects. Sprays out superheated steam at random, similar to steam geysers. Non-functional: all its internal mechanisms have been removed.
LanguageData.VFEPD_DeepHeater.label: deep heater
LanguageData.VFEPD_Defoliator.description: An area-denial device which annihilates nearby plants without affecting animals. Permanently out of order.
LanguageData.VFEPD_Defoliator.label: inactive defoliator
LanguageData.VFEPD_DeserterShuttle.description: A spacer-tech shuttle designed for transit between surface and orbit, or between moons of a planetary system. This one seems to be non-functional.
LanguageData.VFEPD_DeserterShuttle.label: deserter shuttle
LanguageData.VFEPD_Desk.label: desk
LanguageData.VFEPD_DestroyedGravExtender.description: This device once expanded a gravship’s build area, but it is now shattered.
LanguageData.VFEPD_DestroyedGravExtender.label: destroyed grav field extender
LanguageData.VFEPD_DestroyedLargeThruster.description: This powerful thruster once pushed gravships across space, but now it lies broken.
LanguageData.VFEPD_DestroyedLargeThruster.label: destroyed large thruster
LanguageData.VFEPD_DestroyedSmallAstrofuelTank.descri: This tank once stored astrofuel for thrusters, but it has been destroyed.
LanguageData.VFEPD_DestroyedSmallAstrofuelTank.label: destroyed small astrofuel tank
LanguageData.VFEPD_DestroyedSmallHeatsink.description: This heatsink once cooled the gravship’s systems, but it has burned out.
LanguageData.VFEPD_DestroyedSmallHeatsink.label: destroyed small heatsink
LanguageData.VFEPD_DestroyedSmallOxygenTank.descripti: This tank once supplied oxygen to the gravship, but it’s now broken and useless.
LanguageData.VFEPD_DestroyedSmallOxygenTank.label: destroyed small oxygen tank
LanguageData.VFEPD_DestroyedSmallThruster.description: This thruster once powered the gravship, but it is now wrecked beyond use.
LanguageData.VFEPD_DestroyedSmallThruster.label: destroyed small thruster
LanguageData.VFEPD_Devilstrand.description: This fake fragile mushroom was genetically engineered to produce a silk net that is both difficult to tear and soft to the touch. While the mushroom takes a very long time to grow, only exotic ultra-tech fabrics outperform its devilstrand fibers.\n\nSome say it's called devilstrand because of its red color. Others think it owes its name to the greed it inspires in people.
LanguageData.VFEPD_Devilstrand.label: devilstrand
LanguageData.VFEPD_DevilstrandCrate.description: Fake bolts of devilstrand stacked in a crate.
LanguageData.VFEPD_DevilstrandCrate.label: devilstrand crate
LanguageData.VFEPD_Dinghy.description: A very basic motorised boat, the Dingy is an incredibly cheap and discrete method of transportation over water. Non-functional: all its internal wiring and its motor have been removed.
LanguageData.VFEPD_Dinghy.label: Dinghy
LanguageData.VFEPD_DinnerSet.description: A simple dinner set containing all the required utensils.
LanguageData.VFEPD_DinnerSet.label: dinner set
LanguageData.VFEPD_Dirtbike.description: A basic off-road motorcycle, the Dirtbike is a very cheap vehicle that allows a single user to travel quickly, efficiently and quietly. Non-functional: all its internal wiring and its motor have been removed.
LanguageData.VFEPD_Dirtbike.label: Dirtbike
LanguageData.VFEPD_DisabledByEMPEffect.description: This is an effecter prop for "Disabled by EMP". Intrinsically laggy, use in moderation.
LanguageData.VFEPD_DisabledByEMPEffect.label: disabled by EMP
LanguageData.VFEPD_DiscardedRadiationSuit.label: discarded radiation suit
LanguageData.VFEPD_DisplayScreen.label: display screen
LanguageData.VFEPD_DisplayTable.description: A large size display screen mounted on a large table.
LanguageData.VFEPD_DisplayTable.label: display table
LanguageData.VFEPD_DivinationStarA.description: This is a fleck prop for "Divination Star A". Intrinsically laggy, use in moderation.
LanguageData.VFEPD_DivinationStarA.label: divination star A
LanguageData.VFEPD_DivinationStarB.description: This is a fleck prop for "Divination Star B". Intrinsically laggy, use in moderation.
LanguageData.VFEPD_DivinationStarB.label: divination star B
LanguageData.VFEPD_DivinationStarC.description: This is a fleck prop for "Divination Star C". Intrinsically laggy, use in moderation.
LanguageData.VFEPD_DivinationStarC.label: divination star C
LanguageData.VFEPD_Docs.description: A bunch of scattered research documents. Intended to be placed over an empty workbench. Just for decorative purposes.
LanguageData.VFEPD_Docs.label: scattered docs
LanguageData.VFEPD_DogSled.description: A sled pulled by four trained dogs used to travel over ice and through snow. Non-functional: all its internal mechanisms have been removed. Even the dogs are fake.
LanguageData.VFEPD_DogSled.label: Dog Sled
LanguageData.VFEPD_DoubleAlembic.description: A double alembic. Intended to be placed over an empty workbench. Just for decorative purposes.
LanguageData.VFEPD_DoubleAlembic.label: double alembic
LanguageData.VFEPD_DoubleOven.description: A double oven. Intended to be placed over an empty workbench. Just for decorative purposes.
LanguageData.VFEPD_DoubleOven.label: double oven
LanguageData.VFEPD_DragoTree.description: A fake, hardy desert tree topped with thick, pointed leaves.
LanguageData.VFEPD_DragoTree.label: drago tree
LanguageData.VFEPD_DrapeProp.description: A decorative drape. This will not satisfy any noble requirements, as it is just for decorative purposes.
LanguageData.VFEPD_DrapeProp.label: decorative drape
LanguageData.VFEPD_DribblingCap.description: A huge pink mushroom, constantly dribbling a pungent, resin-like substance. This one is fake.
LanguageData.VFEPD_DribblingCap.label: dribbling cap
LanguageData.VFEPD_DriedBlood.label: dried blood
LanguageData.VFEPD_DriedRavenNettle.description: Tangled, thorny, woody shoots covered with leaves. Raven nettle grows in clusters, and slows down anyone moving over it. This one is fake.
LanguageData.VFEPD_DriedRavenNettle.label: dried raven nettle
LanguageData.VFEPD_DrillEffect.description: This is an effecter prop for "Drill". Intrinsically laggy, use in moderation.
LanguageData.VFEPD_DrillEffect.label: drill
LanguageData.VFEPD_EatMeatEffect.description: This is an effecter prop for "Eat Meat". Intrinsically laggy, use in moderation.
LanguageData.VFEPD_EatMeatEffect.label: eat meat
LanguageData.VFEPD_EatVegetarianEffect.description: This is an effecter prop for "Eat Vegetarian". Intrinsically laggy, use in moderation.
LanguageData.VFEPD_EatVegetarianEffect.label: eat vegetarian
LanguageData.VFEPD_Echeveria.description: A cultivated succulent forming a rosette, native to arid shrublands. This one is fake.
LanguageData.VFEPD_Echeveria.label: echeveria
LanguageData.VFEPD_Eggplant.description: A fake bulbous purple fruit of the nightshade family. Eggplant is rarely served as a side, generally filling the role of the main component of the dish.
LanguageData.VFEPD_Eggplant.label: eggplant
LanguageData.VFEPD_EggSac.description: A slimy sac containing an insect larva. This one is empty.
LanguageData.VFEPD_EggSac.label: egg sac
LanguageData.VFEPD_EldritchRune.description: This is a mote prop for "Eldritch Rune". Intrinsically laggy, though less than effecter props. Use in moderation.
LanguageData.VFEPD_EldritchRune.label: eldritch rune
LanguageData.VFEPD_ElectricalCabinet.description: A small metal cabinet containing electrical circuits and fuses.
LanguageData.VFEPD_ElectricalCabinet.label: electrical cabinet
LanguageData.VFEPD_ElectricalEquipment.description: Weathered electrical appliances used in a tunnel boring machine. Non-functional now.
LanguageData.VFEPD_ElectricalEquipment.label: electrical appliances
LanguageData.VFEPD_ElectricPot.description: An electric pot, also called a thermo pot, is a small appliance used for boiling water and maintaining it at a constant temperature. This one is inactive and non-functional.
LanguageData.VFEPD_ElectricPot.label: electric pot
LanguageData.VFEPD_EMIDynamo.description: A massive electromagnetic interference generator. It interferes with or shuts down electrical devices in nearby regions. Looking inside, you'll discover it's actually a cardboard cutout without any relevant machinery.
LanguageData.VFEPD_EMIDynamo.label: EMI dynamo
LanguageData.VFEPD_EmptyContainment.label: empty containment
LanguageData.VFEPD_EmptyGrogBarrel.description: A huge, decorative grog barrel. This one is completely empty.
LanguageData.VFEPD_EmptyGrogBarrel.label: empty grog barrel
LanguageData.VFEPD_EndlessPit2x2c.description: A smooth-sided hole that extends endlessly downwards... Actually, on close inspection it seems to be just painted on the ground...
LanguageData.VFEPD_EndlessPit2x2c.label: fake pit, small
LanguageData.VFEPD_EndlessPit3x2c.description: A smooth-sided hole that extends endlessly downwards... Actually, on close inspection it seems to be just painted on the ground...
LanguageData.VFEPD_EndlessPit3x2c.label: fake pit, medium
LanguageData.VFEPD_EndlessPit3x3c.description: A smooth-sided hole that extends endlessly downwards... Actually, on close inspection it seems to be just painted on the ground...
LanguageData.VFEPD_EndlessPit3x3c.label: fake pit, large
LanguageData.VFEPD_EspressoMachine.description: An espresso machine brews coffee by forcing pressurized water near boiling point through a "puck" of ground coffee and a filter in order to produce a thick, concentrated coffee called espresso. This one is inactive and non-functional.
LanguageData.VFEPD_EspressoMachine.label: espresso machine
LanguageData.VFEPD_EuphorbiaDesiccata.description: A plant of the euphorbia genus, commonly called spurges. This plant is a variety of the Euphorbia Rimworldia plant that has adapted to polluted environments. This one is fake.
LanguageData.VFEPD_EuphorbiaDesiccata.label: euphorbia desiccata
LanguageData.VFEPD_EuphorbiaRimworldia.description: A plant of the euphorbia genus, commonly called spurges. This plant has adapted to arid climates and stores a lot of water inside their spine-covered leaves. This one is fake.
LanguageData.VFEPD_EuphorbiaRimworldia.label: euphorbia rimworldia
LanguageData.VFEPD_Exhaust.description: An exhaust port for the fumes of industrialism.
LanguageData.VFEPD_Exhaust.label: exhaust
LanguageData.VFEPD_ExoticFlowers.description: A bunch of colourful flowers. These are fake.
LanguageData.VFEPD_ExoticFlowers.label: exotic flowers
LanguageData.VFEPD_EyeGrass.label: flowering ocular grass
LanguageData.VFEPD_EyeOfHorus.description: This is a mote prop for "Eye of Ra". Intrinsically laggy, though less than effecter props. Use in moderation.
LanguageData.VFEPD_EyeOfHorus.label: eye of ra
LanguageData.VFEPD_FabricationComputer.description: A fabrication computer. It computes. Intended to be placed over an empty workbench. Just for decorative purposes.
LanguageData.VFEPD_FabricationComputer.label: fabrication computer
LanguageData.VFEPD_FabricationGizmoA.description: A fabrication lathe. Intended to be placed over an empty workbench. Just for decorative purposes.
LanguageData.VFEPD_FabricationGizmoA.label: fabrication lathe
LanguageData.VFEPD_FabricationGizmoB.description: A fabrication lathe. Intended to be placed over an empty workbench. Just for decorative purposes.

LanguageData.VFEPD_FabricationGizmoC.description: A fabrication lathe. Intended to be placed over an empty workbench. Just for decorative purposes.
LanguageData.VFEPD_FabricationGizmoC.label: fabrication lathe
LanguageData.VFEPD_FabricationLargeGizmo.description: A bunch of fabrication structures. Intended to be placed over an empty workbench. Just for decorative purposes.
LanguageData.VFEPD_FabricationLargeGizmo.label: fabrication computers
LanguageData.VFEPD_FabricationLaser.description: A fabrication laser. Intended to be placed over an empty workbench. Just for decorative purposes.
LanguageData.VFEPD_FabricationLaser.label: fabrication laser
LanguageData.VFEPD_FabricationLathe.description: A fabrication laser. Intended to be placed over an empty workbench. Just for decorative purposes.
LanguageData.VFEPD_FabricationLathe.label: fabrication small lathe
LanguageData.VFEPD_FabricRollA.description: A bunch of fabric rolls. Intended to be placed over an empty workbench. Just for decorative purposes.
LanguageData.VFEPD_FabricRollA.label: fabric rolls
LanguageData.VFEPD_FabricRollB.description: A bunch of fabric rolls. Intended to be placed over an empty workbench. Just for decorative purposes.
LanguageData.VFEPD_FabricRollB.label: fabric rolls
LanguageData.VFEPD_FabricRollC.description: A bunch of fabric rolls. Intended to be placed over an empty workbench. Just for decorative purposes.
LanguageData.VFEPD_FabricRollC.label: fabric rolls
LanguageData.VFEPD_FairyWashboard.description: A cultivated succulent with rosette forming long triangular leaves. This one is fake.
LanguageData.VFEPD_FairyWashboard.label: fairy washboard
LanguageData.VFEPD_FakeAnimaGrass.description: Plastic grass painted in the same colour as anima grass. Probably terrible for the environment.
LanguageData.VFEPD_FakeAnimaGrass.label: fake anima grass
LanguageData.VFEPD_FakeAnimalDoor.description: A non-functional flap door. It's just two painted cloth sheets. Can be traversed.
LanguageData.VFEPD_FakeAnimalDoor.label: fake flap door
LanguageData.VFEPD_FakeAnimaTree.description: Plastic tree imitating an anima tree. Doesn't provide any sort of psychic powers.
LanguageData.VFEPD_FakeAnimaTree.label: fake anima tree
LanguageData.VFEPD_FakeAutoDoor.description: A non-functional autodoor. It's just two painted metal sheets. Can be traversed.
LanguageData.VFEPD_FakeAutoDoor.label: fake autodoor
LanguageData.VFEPD_FakeBonsaiPot.description: This fake pot is similar to those used for planting bonsai trees. Colonists will not plant anything here, so you can put a fake flower on top.
LanguageData.VFEPD_FakeBonsaiPot.label: bonsai pot
LanguageData.VFEPD_FakeBridge.description: This is a false bridge support that won't hold any bridge above it.
LanguageData.VFEPD_FakeBridge.label: fake bridge
LanguageData.VFEPD_FakeColumn.description: A fake, painted plywood column that won't hold any ceiling.
LanguageData.VFEPD_FakeColumn.label: fake column
LanguageData.VFEPD_FakeCube.description: Isn't this heresy?? This is heresy, right??
LanguageData.VFEPD_FakeCube.label: fake cube
LanguageData.VFEPD_FakeDoor.description: A non-functional door. It's just two painted plywood panels and won't open. Can be traversed.
LanguageData.VFEPD_FakeDoor.label: fake door
LanguageData.VFEPD_FakeFenceDoor.description: A non-functional fence door. It's just two painted plywood panels and won't open. Can be traversed.
LanguageData.VFEPD_FakeFenceDoor.label: fake fence door
LanguageData.VFEPD_FakeGauranlenMoss.description: Plastic grass painted in the same colour as gauranlen moss. Probably terrible for the environment.
LanguageData.VFEPD_FakeGauranlenMoss.label: fake gauranlen moss
LanguageData.VFEPD_FakeGauranlenTree.description: Plastic tree imitating a gauranlen tree. No dryads here.
LanguageData.VFEPD_FakeGauranlenTree.label: fake gauranlen tree
LanguageData.VFEPD_FakeGibbetCage.description: A fake gibbet cage with nothing inside. Sealed shut.
LanguageData.VFEPD_FakeGibbetCage.label: fake gibbet cage
LanguageData.VFEPD_FakeGrave.description: A fake grave with nothing buried beneath it.
LanguageData.VFEPD_FakeGrave.label: fake grave
LanguageData.VFEPD_FakeGrayDoor.description: A non-functional door. It's just two painted plywood panels and won't open. Can be traversed.
LanguageData.VFEPD_FakeGrayDoor.label: fake gray door
LanguageData.VFEPD_FakeHarbingerTree.description: Plastic tree imitating a harbinger tree. No munchies.
LanguageData.VFEPD_FakeHarbingerTree.label: fake harbinger tree
LanguageData.VFEPD_FakeHiveDoor.description: A non-functional door. It's just two painted plywood panels and won't open. Can be traversed.
LanguageData.VFEPD_FakeHiveDoor.label: fake hive door
LanguageData.VFEPD_FakeMetalBridge.description: This is a false bridge support that won't hold any bridge above it.
LanguageData.VFEPD_FakeMetalBridge.label: fake metal bridge
LanguageData.VFEPD_FakeMummyFemale.description: A fake female mummy. The latest rage in decorating.
LanguageData.VFEPD_FakeMummyFemale.label: fake mummy (f)
LanguageData.VFEPD_FakeMummyMale.description: A fake male mummy. The latest rage in decorating.
LanguageData.VFEPD_FakeMummyMale.label: fake mummy (m)
LanguageData.VFEPD_FakePlantPot.description: A fake plant pot. Colonists will not plant anything here, so you can put a fake flower on top.
LanguageData.VFEPD_FakePlantPot.label: plant pot
LanguageData.VFEPD_FakePoluxTree.description: Plastic tree imitating a polux tree. No pollution cleaning here.
LanguageData.VFEPD_FakePoluxTree.label: fake polux tree
LanguageData.VFEPD_FakeRail.label: fake rail
LanguageData.VFEPD_FakeRelicAltar.description: A small bowl with capacity for one relic. Just for decorative purposes.
LanguageData.VFEPD_FakeRelicAltar.label: relic altar
LanguageData.VFEPD_FakeSarcophagus.description: A fake sarcophagus with nothing inside. Sealed shut.
LanguageData.VFEPD_FakeSarcophagus.label: fake sarcophagus
LanguageData.VFEPD_FakeSecurityDoor.description: A non-functional security door. It's just two painted plywood panels and won't open. Can be traversed.
LanguageData.VFEPD_FakeSecurityDoor.label: fake security door
LanguageData.VFEPD_FakeSnowman.description: This is not made of snow, but a very fake looking polyurethane foam.
LanguageData.VFEPD_FakeSnowman.label: fake snowman
LanguageData.VFEPD_FakeStoneBridge.description: This is a false bridge support that won't hold any bridge above it.
LanguageData.VFEPD_FakeStoneBridge.label: fake stone bridge
LanguageData.VFEPD_FallingMeteor.description: This is a fleck prop for "Falling Meteor". Intrinsically laggy, use in moderation.
LanguageData.VFEPD_FallingMeteor.label: falling meteor
LanguageData.VFEPD_FalseBlueFire.description: This is just smoke and mirrors.
LanguageData.VFEPD_FalseBlueFire.label: fake darkfire
LanguageData.VFEPD_FalseFire.description: This is just smoke and mirrors.
LanguageData.VFEPD_FalseFire.label: fake fire
LanguageData.VFEPD_FanPalm.description: This exuberant palm grows in areas with a rich soil surrounding the tar pits. This one is fake.
LanguageData.VFEPD_FanPalm.label: fan palm
LanguageData.VFEPD_FauxPlant.description: An artificial plant in a sturdy metal pot. It requires no light, water, or air, making it perfect for adding beauty to even the most inhospitable gravship environments.
LanguageData.VFEPD_FauxPlant.label: faux plant
LanguageData.VFEPD_Fibercorn.description: A fake inedible, fibrous plant which usually produces a small amount of a wood-like substance.
LanguageData.VFEPD_Fibercorn.label: fibercorn
LanguageData.VFEPD_File.description: A small file. Intended to be placed over an empty workbench. Just for decorative purposes.
LanguageData.VFEPD_File.label: file

LanguageData.VFEPD_Filth_Propaganda.label: propaganda

LanguageData.VFEPD_FilthAnimalFilth.label: animal filth
