LanguageData.VFEPD_Fire_BurstEffect.description: This is an effecter prop for "Fire Burst". Intrinsically laggy, use in moderation.
LanguageData.VFEPD_Fire_BurstEffect.label: fire burst
LanguageData.VFEPD_Fire_SpewEffect.description: This is an effecter prop for "Fire Spew". Intrinsically laggy, use in moderation.
LanguageData.VFEPD_Fire_SpewEffect.label: fire spew
LanguageData.VFEPD_FireSmokeEffect.description: This is an effecter prop for "Fire Smoke". Intrinsically laggy, use in moderation.
LanguageData.VFEPD_FireSmokeEffect.label: fire smoke
LanguageData.VFEPD_FirevineTree.description: Firevine trees are pyrophitic plants that are able to survive wildfires due to a clever layer of thermal insulation provided by their fire retardant bark. This one is fake.
LanguageData.VFEPD_FirevineTree.label: firevine tree
LanguageData.VFEPD_FlammableBile.description: Flammable bile. You know, a classic.
LanguageData.VFEPD_FlammableBile.label: flammable bile
LanguageData.VFEPD_FlashFrozenTree.description: This tree, which probably started growing in a rare period of summer heat, has been frozen in place by the extreme temperatures, its leaves crystallized by the toxic propane compounds. This one is fake.
LanguageData.VFEPD_FlashFrozenTree.label: flash frozen tree
LanguageData.VFEPD_Fleshmassfilth.description: Fleshmass filth. Just like grandma used to make.
LanguageData.VFEPD_Fleshmassfilth.label: fleshmass debris
LanguageData.VFEPD_Floordrawing.description: Floor drawings. There is no better incentive to go child free in life.
LanguageData.VFEPD_Floordrawing.label: floor drawing
LanguageData.VFEPD_FloorEtchings.label: floor etchings
LanguageData.VFEPD_FoamPod.description: An organic, firefoam pod produced by giant insects. Non-functional.
LanguageData.VFEPD_FoamPod.label: foampod
LanguageData.VFEPD_Foampuffer.description: An ugly, thick mushroom with a cap that smells of muffalo fecal matter. This one is fake.
LanguageData.VFEPD_Foampuffer.label: foampuffer
LanguageData.VFEPD_FoodBox.description: A stack of empty food boxes.
LanguageData.VFEPD_FoodBox.label: empty food boxes
LanguageData.VFEPD_FoodTrolley.description: A four wheeled trolley for empty plates and food trays.
LanguageData.VFEPD_FoodTrolley.label: food trolley
LanguageData.VFEPD_FordModelA.description: The Ford Model A, produced from 1927 to 1931, was the successor to the Model T and marked a significant advancement in automotive design and technology. It featured a more modern look with improved styling, a more powerful 3.3-liter four-cylinder engine, and enhanced driving comfort. Non-functional: all its internal mechanisms have been removed.
LanguageData.VFEPD_FordModelA.label: Ford Model A
LanguageData.VFEPD_FordModelAAmbulance.description: The Ford Model A, produced from 1927 to 1931, was the successor to the Model T and marked a significant advancement in automotive design and technology. It featured a more modern look with improved styling, a more powerful 3.3-liter four-cylinder engine, and enhanced driving comfort. This model has been converted into an ambulance. Non-functional: all its internal mechanisms have been removed.
LanguageData.VFEPD_FordModelAAmbulance.label: Ford Model A Ambulance
LanguageData.VFEPD_FordModelAFireTruck.description: The Ford Model A, produced from 1927 to 1931, was the successor to the Model T and marked a significant advancement in automotive design and technology. It featured a more modern look with improved styling, a more powerful 3.3-liter four-cylinder engine, and enhanced driving comfort. This model has been refitted as a fire truck. Non-functional: all its internal mechanisms have been removed.
LanguageData.VFEPD_FordModelAFireTruck.label: Ford Model A Firetruck
LanguageData.VFEPD_FordModelT.description: Produced from 1908 to 1927, the Ford Model T is one of the most iconic cars in automotive history. It was the first automobile mass-produced on moving assembly lines, making it affordable and accessible to a wide audience. Powered by a 2.9-liter, four-cylinder engine, the Model T revolutionized transportation and became a symbol of early 20th-century innovation. Non-functional: all its internal mechanisms have been removed.
LanguageData.VFEPD_FordModelT.label: Ford Model T
LanguageData.VFEPD_FordModelTVan.description: Produced from 1908 to 1927, the Ford Model T is one of the most iconic cars in automotive history. It was the first automobile mass-produced on moving assembly lines, making it affordable and accessible to a wide audience. Powered by a 2.9-liter, four-cylinder engine, the Model T revolutionized transportation and became a symbol of early 20th-century innovation. Non-functional: all its internal mechanisms have been removed.
LanguageData.VFEPD_FordModelTVan.label: Ford Model T
LanguageData.VFEPD_Fridge.description: A large fridge with an in-built freezer.
LanguageData.VFEPD_Fridge.label: fridge
LanguageData.VFEPD_Frigate.description: A warship with a sleek design, fast and maneuverable, originally developed for escort and protection duties in the Age of Sail. Frigates usually feature a single continuous gun deck, carrying a mix of cannons and other armaments. Non-functional: all its internal mechanisms have been removed. Intended to be placed over water. Or wherever you want, I'm not your mom!
LanguageData.VFEPD_Frigate.label: Frigate
LanguageData.VFEPD_Frog.description: A basic reusable transport pod, the Frog is a relatively cheap vehicle that is the first option when it comes to flying without crashing into the ground. Non-functional: all its internal wiring and its motor have been removed.
LanguageData.VFEPD_Frog.label: Frog
LanguageData.VFEPD_FrostLeaf.description: These translucent plants seem to be able to grow almost anywhere, even in some snow covered areas. This one is fake.
LanguageData.VFEPD_FrostLeaf.label: frost leaf
LanguageData.VFEPD_FuelOptimizer_Prop.description: A gravtech unit that reduces the fuel needed for gravship flight. This unit seems completely inert.
LanguageData.VFEPD_FuelOptimizer_Prop.label: fuel optimizer
LanguageData.VFEPD_FuelTank.description: A large fuel tank used to refuel Imperial shuttles. Completely empty.
LanguageData.VFEPD_FuelTank.label: fuel tank
LanguageData.VFEPD_FuturisticObelisk.label: futuristic obelisk
LanguageData.VFEPD_FuturisticPyramid.description: A truly colossal metallic structure whose outer surfaces are triangular and converge to a single step at the top.
LanguageData.VFEPD_FuturisticPyramid.label: futuristic great pyramid
LanguageData.VFEPD_FuturisticStele.label: futuristic stele
LanguageData.VFEPD_Galactivine.description: An exotic space plant. This one is fake.
LanguageData.VFEPD_Galactivine.label: galactivine
LanguageData.VFEPD_Galaxy.description: This is a fleck prop for "Galaxy". Intrinsically laggy, use in moderation.
LanguageData.VFEPD_Galaxy.label: galaxy
LanguageData.VFEPD_Galleon.description: A large, multi-decked sailing ship primarily designed for transporting goods over long distances across oceans. It features a sturdy hull with ample cargo hold space, multiple masts rigged with square sails for propulsion, and a high stern and forecastle for additional cargo storage and crew quarters. Non-functional: all its internal mechanisms have been removed. Intended to be placed over water. Or wherever you want, I'm not your mom!
LanguageData.VFEPD_Galleon.label: Galleon
LanguageData.VFEPD_GargantuanLithops.description: Lithops is a genus of succulent plants often known as pebble plants or living stones, due to their stone-like appearance that allows them to avoid being eaten by blending in with surrounding rocks. This one is fake.
LanguageData.VFEPD_GargantuanLithops.label: gargantuan lithops
LanguageData.VFEPD_Garlic.description: A plant with long, flat grasslike leaves forming a stalk. This one is fake.
LanguageData.VFEPD_Garlic.label: garlic
LanguageData.VFEPD_GasReleasingEffect.description: This is an effecter prop for "Gas Releasing". Intrinsically laggy, use in moderation.
LanguageData.VFEPD_GasReleasingEffect.label: gas releasing
LanguageData.VFEPD_GasStorageUnit.description: An industrial style gas storage unit.
LanguageData.VFEPD_GasStorageUnit.label: gas storage unit
LanguageData.VFEPD_GasTank.label: gas tank
LanguageData.VFEPD_GauranlenDebrisEffect.description: This is an effecter prop for "Gauranlen Debris". Intrinsically laggy, use in moderation.
LanguageData.VFEPD_GauranlenDebrisEffect.label: gauranlen debris
LanguageData.VFEPD_GauranlenLeavesBatchEffect.descrip: This is an effecter prop for "Gauranlen Leaves, Batch". Intrinsically laggy, use in moderation.
LanguageData.VFEPD_GauranlenLeavesBatchEffect.label: gauranlen leaves, batch
LanguageData.VFEPD_GauranlenLeavesEffect.description: This is an effecter prop for "Gauranlen Leaves". Intrinsically laggy, use in moderation.
LanguageData.VFEPD_GauranlenLeavesEffect.label: gauranlen leaves
LanguageData.VFEPD_GaussCannon.description: A massive anti-ship cannon that uses electromagnets to launch large metallic darts at extreme velocities. Pew pew.
LanguageData.VFEPD_GaussCannon.label: gauss cannon
LanguageData.VFEPD_GeneAssembler_WorkingEffect.descri: This is an effecter prop for "Gene Assembler Working". Intrinsically laggy, use in moderation.
LanguageData.VFEPD_GeneAssembler_WorkingEffect.label: gene assembler
LanguageData.VFEPD_Generator.label: generator
LanguageData.VFEPD_GeneratorUnitLarge.description: A large part of an industrial generator unit.
LanguageData.VFEPD_GeneratorUnitLarge.label: generator unit
LanguageData.VFEPD_GeneratorUnitSmall.description: A small part of an industrial generator unit.
LanguageData.VFEPD_GeneratorUnitSmall.label: small generator unit
LanguageData.VFEPD_GeneTailoringPod.description: An old and inactive gene-tailoring pod.
LanguageData.VFEPD_GeneTailoringPod.label: gene-tailoring pod
LanguageData.VFEPD_GenomicAttenuator.description: An old and inactive genomic attenuator.
LanguageData.VFEPD_GenomicAttenuator.label: genomic attenuator
LanguageData.VFEPD_GeothermalVent.description: A naturally-occurring break in the ground from which volcanic gases escape. These vents bring nutrients to the surface from deep underground. Collectively, the fumes they spew are enough to block out the sun.
LanguageData.VFEPD_GeothermalVent.label: sulfur spout
LanguageData.VFEPD_Geyser.description: This is just a shallow hole with a tiny device spewing tepid, misted water. Provides no heat or energy, but looks cool.
LanguageData.VFEPD_Geyser.label: fake steam geyser
LanguageData.VFEPD_GiantAgarilux.description: A colossal purple mushroom. Its size and glowing protrusions make this fungus beautiful to look at. This one is fake.
LanguageData.VFEPD_GiantAgarilux.label: giant agarilux
LanguageData.VFEPD_GiantAgariTox.description: A giant mushroom that has adapted to growing in extremely polluted environments. This one is fake.
LanguageData.VFEPD_GiantAgariTox.label: agaritox
LanguageData.VFEPD_GiantFlower.description: Giant flowers genetically modified by a long-forgotten genetics company using the genome of a hibiscus plant. This one is fake.
LanguageData.VFEPD_GiantFlower.label: giant mutant hibiscus
LanguageData.VFEPD_GiantGamma.description: Like many other flora from the Forsakens native planet, this huge globular plant is bioluminescent. This one is fake.
LanguageData.VFEPD_GiantGamma.label: giant gamma
LanguageData.VFEPD_GiantSeptimum.description: This Septimum plant has grown to an enormous size, with a flowering top as large as a person. This one is fake.
LanguageData.VFEPD_GiantSeptimum.label: giant septimum
LanguageData.VFEPD_GiantStikehr.description: A giant alien mushroom that glows in the strange darkening mist. This one is fake.
LanguageData.VFEPD_GiantStikehr.label: giant stikehr
LanguageData.VFEPD_GiantSunflower.description: Giant flowers genetically modified by a long-forgotten genetics company using the genome of the common sunflower plant. This one is fake.
LanguageData.VFEPD_GiantSunflower.label: giant sunflower.
LanguageData.VFEPD_GiantToxicFlower.description: A continously blooming giant flower with a dangerous, bright pink colour. This one is fake.
LanguageData.VFEPD_GiantToxicFlower.label: giant toxic flower
LanguageData.VFEPD_GiantTulip.description: Giant flowers genetically modified by a long-forgotten genetics company using the genome of a tulip plant. This one is fake.
LanguageData.VFEPD_GiantTulip.label: giant tulips
LanguageData.VFEPD_GinStill.description: A fully metal industrial distilling device, meant to purify and ferment gin into a drinkable form. This one is empty and non-functional.
LanguageData.VFEPD_GinStill.label: gin still
LanguageData.VFEPD_GlobularPlant.description: A sickly pink orb supported by a network of gnarled branches. A reddish sap constantly drips from its wood, and seems to keep insects at bay. This one is fake.
LanguageData.VFEPD_GlobularPlant.label: globular aberration
LanguageData.VFEPD_GlobularPlant_Polluted.description: This globular aberration has been affected by pollution and mutated in strange ways. This one is fake.
LanguageData.VFEPD_GlobularPlant_Polluted.label: polluted globular aberration
LanguageData.VFEPD_Gloomlight.description: A self-powered mechanoid node of unknown function. Deactivated.
LanguageData.VFEPD_Gloomlight.label: deactivated gloomlight
LanguageData.VFEPD_Glowcap.description: A small blue mushroom typically found in caves. This one is fake.
LanguageData.VFEPD_Glowcap.label: glowcap
LanguageData.VFEPD_GlowingGrass.description: Wild grass. Grows anywhere there is a little light and minimally fertile ground. This one is fake.
LanguageData.VFEPD_GlowingGrass.label: glowing grass
LanguageData.VFEPD_GlowPod.description: This doesn't even glow! I want to speak with the manager!
LanguageData.VFEPD_GlowPod.label: fake glow pod
LanguageData.VFEPD_GlowPodFormation.description: A large cluster of bioluminescent pods produced by giant insects.
LanguageData.VFEPD_GlowPodFormation.label: glow pod formation
LanguageData.VFEPD_GlowPodSpire.description: An incredibly tall spire of bioluminescent pods produced by giant insects.
LanguageData.VFEPD_GlowPodSpire.label: glow pod spire
LanguageData.VFEPD_Glowstool.description: A fake small brown mushroom typically found in caves. It smells like an old, dirty rag pulled from the stomach of a rotting muffalo - but it tastes surprisingly good when cooked.
LanguageData.VFEPD_Glowstool.label: glowstool
LanguageData.VFEPD_Goliath.description: More of a movable mini-base than a deployment pod, Goliath is an expensive but powerful solution to any immovable enemy object. Non-functional: all its internal wiring and its motor have been removed.
LanguageData.VFEPD_Goliath.label: Goliath
LanguageData.VFEPD_Gomphoeria.description: An unusually tall plant with bright, pink nodules. Its nodules are slightly toxic for humans, and it produces a strange, rotten fruit smell, so it is considered absolutely inedible. This one is fake.
LanguageData.VFEPD_Gomphoeria.label: gomphoeria
LanguageData.VFEPD_GrandArchotechStructure.descriptio: A cardboard imitation of a grand archotech structure of towering height and impressive bulk.
LanguageData.VFEPD_GrandArchotechStructure.label: grand archotech structure
LanguageData.VFEPD_GrandGate.description: A huge entrance for a kemetic city.
LanguageData.VFEPD_GrandGate.label: grand gate
LanguageData.VFEPD_Grapes.description: This is a fleck prop for "Grapes". Intrinsically laggy, use in moderation.
LanguageData.VFEPD_Grapes.label: grapes
LanguageData.VFEPD_Graph.description: This is a fleck prop for "Graph". Intrinsically laggy, use in moderation.
LanguageData.VFEPD_Graph.label: graph
LanguageData.VFEPD_GrassLong.description: Fake wild tall grass. Slows down anyone moving over it..
LanguageData.VFEPD_GrassLong.label: long grass
LanguageData.VFEPD_GrassShort.description: Fake wild grass. Grows anywhere there is a little light and minimally fertile ground.
LanguageData.VFEPD_GrassShort.label: short grass
LanguageData.VFEPD_GravAnchor_Prop.description: Prevents the local map from being destroyed during a gravship launch. This anchor seems completely inert.
LanguageData.VFEPD_GravAnchor_Prop.label: grav anchor
LanguageData.VFEPD_GravcorePowerCell_Prop.description: A power generator that draws energy from gravitational waves passing through the gravship. This generator seems completely inert.
LanguageData.VFEPD_GravcorePowerCell_Prop.label: gravcore power cell
LanguageData.VFEPD_GravEngine_Prop.description: The ultratech heart of a gravship. Generates lift by inverting and intensifying gravity in a field around itself. Upon closer inspection it seems to be made out of cardboard.
LanguageData.VFEPD_GravEngine_Prop.label: grav engine
LanguageData.VFEPD_GravFieldAmplifier.description: An advanced ultratech device that dramatically increases the size of a gravship. Inactive.
LanguageData.VFEPD_GravFieldAmplifier.label: grav field amplifier
LanguageData.VFEPD_GravFieldExtender_Prop.description: Extends the area in which substructure can be built and increases support capacity. This extender seems completely inert.
LanguageData.VFEPD_GravFieldExtender_Prop.label: grav field extender
LanguageData.VFEPD_GravshipShelf.description: A reinforced storage shelf designed for use aboard gravships. Made out of cardboard, can't hold any items.
LanguageData.VFEPD_GravshipShelf.label: gravship shelf
LanguageData.VFEPD_GravshipShieldGenerator_Prop.descr: Creates a short-lived momentum repulsor surface to block projectiles. This generator seems completely inert.
LanguageData.VFEPD_GravshipShieldGenerator_Prop.label: gravship shield generator
LanguageData.VFEPD_GrayBox.description: A strange gray container. It is featureless and the surfaces are smooth. The material is not metal, concrete, or any other identifiable material. Sealed shut.
LanguageData.VFEPD_GrayBox.label: gray box
LanguageData.VFEPD_GrayBox_Empty.description: A strange gray container. It is featureless and the surfaces are smooth. The material is not metal, concrete, or any other identifiable material. Empty.
LanguageData.VFEPD_GrayBox_Empty.label: empty gray box
LanguageData.VFEPD_GrayGrass.description: This is just plastic grass painted gray. Gray? Grey? Can't you people just decide on one??
LanguageData.VFEPD_GrayGrass.label: gray grass
LanguageData.VFEPD_GrayStatue.description: A strange, twisted sculpture shaped into a disturbing form. It hums gently with some strange internal energy. Merely decorative.
LanguageData.VFEPD_GrayStatue.label: decorative gray statue
LanguageData.VFEPD_GreatPyramid.description: A truly colossal stone structure whose outer surfaces are triangular and converge to a single step at the top.
LanguageData.VFEPD_GreatPyramid.label: great pyramid
LanguageData.VFEPD_GreekColumn.description: This is a mote prop for "Greek Column". Intrinsically laggy, though less than effecter props. Use in moderation.
LanguageData.VFEPD_GreekColumn.label: greek column
LanguageData.VFEPD_GreenRockFern.description: A wild tall fern. Slows down anyone moving over it. This one is fake.
LanguageData.VFEPD_GreenRockFern.label: green rock fern
LanguageData.VFEPD_Grill.description: A grill is a device that cooks food by applying heat from below. This one is inactive and non-functional.
LanguageData.VFEPD_Grill.label: grill
LanguageData.VFEPD_HackingEffect.description: This is an effecter prop for "Hacking". Intrinsically laggy, use in moderation.
LanguageData.VFEPD_HackingEffect.label: hacking
LanguageData.VFEPD_HairCuttingEffect.description: This is an effecter prop for "Hair Cutting". Intrinsically laggy, use in moderation.
LanguageData.VFEPD_HairCuttingEffect.label: hair cutting
LanguageData.VFEPD_HalfAlienTree.description: A strange infection seems to be transforming this regular oak into an ocular tree. This one is fake.
LanguageData.VFEPD_HalfAlienTree.label: half transformed ocular tree
LanguageData.VFEPD_HalfFinishedGun.description: A small half-finished gun. Intended to be placed over an empty workbench. Just for decorative purposes.
LanguageData.VFEPD_HalfFinishedGun.label: half-finished gun
LanguageData.VFEPD_HardyGrass.description: Wild grass. Grows anywhere there is a little light and minimally fertile ground. This one is fake.
LanguageData.VFEPD_HardyGrass.label: hardy grass
LanguageData.VFEPD_Harvest_PlantEffect.description: This is an effecter prop for "Harvest Plant". Intrinsically laggy, use in moderation.
LanguageData.VFEPD_Harvest_PlantEffect.label: harvest
LanguageData.VFEPD_HayBaleLarge.label: large hay bale
LanguageData.VFEPD_HayBaleMedium.label: medium hay bale
LanguageData.VFEPD_HayBaleSmall.label: small hay bale
LanguageData.VFEPD_Haygrass.description: A fake mixture of nutrient-rich grasses which yield large amounts of hay. Hay is edible for animals, but not humans.
LanguageData.VFEPD_Haygrass.label: haygrass
LanguageData.VFEPD_Healroot.description: A fake, slow-growing plant which yields herbal medicine when harvested. Sowing and harvesting healroot are both very labor-intensive tasks because of its delicate shoots.\n\nHealroot was selectively bred for centuries by settlers. It is sometimes also called "healer's hand" by tribespeople - a nickname it owes to its five major medicinal virtues.
LanguageData.VFEPD_Healroot.label: healroot
LanguageData.VFEPD_Healshroom.description: A slow-growing mushroom which yields herbal medicine when harvested. This one is fake.
LanguageData.VFEPD_Healshroom.label: healshroom
LanguageData.VFEPD_Healtruffle.description: Healtruffle is a mushroom that grows slowly by using nutrients from rotstink. This one is fake.
LanguageData.VFEPD_Healtruffle.label: healtruffle
LanguageData.VFEPD_HeatPod.description: A bioluminescent pod produced by giant insects. Non-functional: all its internal mechanisms have been removed.
LanguageData.VFEPD_HeatPod.label: heat pod
LanguageData.VFEPD_HeavyDropship.description: A large, multi-personel heavy dropship currently out of service.
LanguageData.VFEPD_HeavyDropship.label: heavy dropship
LanguageData.VFEPD_HeavyHammer.description: A huge and heavy hammer. Intended to be placed over an empty workbench. Just for decorative purposes.
LanguageData.VFEPD_HeavyHammer.label: heavy hammer
LanguageData.VFEPD_Hedge.label: hedge
LanguageData.VFEPD_HelicopterWreck.description: An ancient, broken helicopter. Everything that isn't rusted away was looted long ago.
LanguageData.VFEPD_HelicopterWreck.label: helicopter wreck
LanguageData.VFEPD_Hermano.description: A dedicated refrigeration vehicle, the Hermano is a decent cargo transporter with a specific niche in ferrying perishable goods. Non-functional: all its internal wiring and its motor have been removed.
LanguageData.VFEPD_Hermano.label: Hermano
LanguageData.VFEPD_Highwayman.description: A basic infantry fighting vehicle, the Highwayman is the cheapest weaponized option for transporting three people. Non-functional: all its internal wiring and its motor have been removed.
LanguageData.VFEPD_Highwayman.label: Highwayman
LanguageData.VFEPD_Hive.label: fake hive
LanguageData.VFEPD_Hivenode.description: A large, exotic goop spire created by giant insects. Non-functional: all its internal mechanisms have been removed.
LanguageData.VFEPD_Hivenode.label: hivenode
LanguageData.VFEPD_Hops.description: A fake flowering crop that yields hops, an essential ingredient in beer.
LanguageData.VFEPD_Hops.label: hop plant
LanguageData.VFEPD_HugeStar.description: This is a mote prop for "Huge Star". Intrinsically laggy, though less than effecter props. Use in moderation.
LanguageData.VFEPD_HugeStar.label: huge star
LanguageData.VFEPD_HunterDroneTrap.description: A dormant and inactive hunter drone trap.
LanguageData.VFEPD_HunterDroneTrap.label: hunter trap
LanguageData.VFEPD_Hwacha.description: A primitive type of artillery designed to fire multiple rocket-powered iron-tipped arrows at once. Non-functional: all its internal mechanisms have been removed.
LanguageData.VFEPD_Hwacha.label: Hwacha
LanguageData.VFEPD_Iashiphus.description: This vivid green plant seem to be related to cacti. Though it's fleshy bark is not edible, it produces flowers than can be consumed by humans. This one is fake.
LanguageData.VFEPD_Iashiphus.label: iashiphus
LanguageData.VFEPD_ImperialBanner.description: A decorative banner hanging from a vertical wooden frame.
LanguageData.VFEPD_ImperialBanner.label: imperial banner
LanguageData.VFEPD_ImperialMaxpack.description: The Imperial maxpack is a formidable armored transport truck, known for its impressive cargo capacity. This one seems to be non-functional.
LanguageData.VFEPD_ImperialMaxpack.label: imperial maxpack
LanguageData.VFEPD_ImperialMegaHighShield.description: An advanced shielding apparatus. Seems to be inactive.
LanguageData.VFEPD_ImperialMegaHighShield.label: imperial mega high-shield
LanguageData.VFEPD_ImperialShuttle.description: A spacer-tech imperial gunship designed for transit between surface and orbit, or between moons of a planetary system. This one seems to be non-functional.
LanguageData.VFEPD_ImperialShuttle.label: imperial shuttle
LanguageData.VFEPD_ImperialShuttleCrashed.label: crashed imperial shuttle
LanguageData.VFEPD_ImperialUnderfarm.description: An underground hydroponics basic used by the empire to feed their subjects. Upon closer inspection it is disconnected from the water mains and all its plants are made of plastic.
LanguageData.VFEPD_ImperialUnderfarm.label: imperial underfarm
LanguageData.VFEPD_InactiveCorruptedObelisk.descripti: A large metallic pillar. Inactive and merely decorative.
LanguageData.VFEPD_InactiveCorruptedObelisk.label: inactive corrupted obelisk
LanguageData.VFEPD_InactiveTwistedObelisk.description: A large metallic pillar. Inactive and merely decorative.
LanguageData.VFEPD_InactiveTwistedObelisk.label: inactive twisted obelisk
LanguageData.VFEPD_InactiveWarpedObelisk.description: A large metallic pillar. Inactive and merely decorative.
LanguageData.VFEPD_InactiveWarpedObelisk.label: inactive warped obelisk
LanguageData.VFEPD_IndustrialGenerator.label: industrial generator
LanguageData.VFEPD_InfantryFightingVehicleWreck.descr: An ancient, broken infantry fighting vehicle. Everything that isn't rusted away was looted long ago.
LanguageData.VFEPD_InfantryFightingVehicleWreck.label: infantry fighting vehicle wreck
LanguageData.VFEPD_InfestedShipChunk.description: A chunk of a spacecraft covered in biomass and insect jelly.
LanguageData.VFEPD_InfestedShipChunk.label: infested ship chunk
LanguageData.VFEPD_InsectCloudMote.description: This is a fleck prop for "Insect Cloud Mote". Intrinsically laggy, use in moderation.
LanguageData.VFEPD_InsectCloudMote.label: insect cloud mote
LanguageData.VFEPD_InsectLairEntrance.description: The entrance to a cave network. Seems to be just painted on the floor.
LanguageData.VFEPD_InsectLairEntrance.label: cave entrance
LanguageData.VFEPD_JadePlant.description: A cultivated succulent with thick, woody stems and oval-shaped leaves. This one is fake.
LanguageData.VFEPD_JadePlant.label: jade
LanguageData.VFEPD_JainSpire.description: This is a mote prop for "Jain spire". Intrinsically laggy, though less than effecter props. Use in moderation.
LanguageData.VFEPD_JainSpire.label: jain spire
LanguageData.VFEPD_JellyFarm.description: A deep organic bioreactor constantly generating insect jelly from nearby minerals and nutrition.
LanguageData.VFEPD_JellyFarm.label: jelly farm
LanguageData.VFEPD_JellyMorpher.description: An exotic, pulsating bioformation that forces attached insect jelly to undergo a chemical process that changes it into royal jelly. Produced by giant insects. Needs to be constructed on the creep and requires refueling with insect jelly in order to produce the royal variant. Non-functional: all its internal mechanisms have been removed.
LanguageData.VFEPD_JellyMorpher.label: jelly morpher
LanguageData.VFEPD_JungleTree.description: This jungle tree is not of terrestrial origins, originating from the deepest crevices of an alien jungle. This one is fake.
LanguageData.VFEPD_JungleTree.label: deep jungle tree
LanguageData.VFEPD_JungleTree_Polluted.description: This jungle polux tree has adapted so perfectly to polluted soil and airborne toxins that it doesn't even need to remove pollution from its environment. This one is fake.
LanguageData.VFEPD_JungleTree_Polluted.label: deep jungle polux
LanguageData.VFEPD_Junk.description: A junk ship is a traditional sailing vessel known for its unique design, featuring a high stern and a flat bottom. It often employs multiple sails and was historically used for various maritime activities such as trade, fishing, and transportation. Non-functional: all its internal mechanisms have been removed. Intended to be placed over water. Or wherever you want, I'm not your mom!
LanguageData.VFEPD_Junk.label: Junk
LanguageData.VFEPD_KeeningCordax.description: The keening cordax is a carnivore plant so called for the high-pitched sound that it makes during the day. This one is fake.
LanguageData.VFEPD_KeeningCordax.label: keening cordax
LanguageData.VFEPD_Khanda.description: This is a mote prop for "Khanda". Intrinsically laggy, though less than effecter props. Use in moderation.
LanguageData.VFEPD_Khanda.label: khanda
LanguageData.VFEPD_KitchenSink.label: kitchen sink
LanguageData.VFEPD_KitchenSurface.description: A simple kitchen surface with a cutting board.
LanguageData.VFEPD_KitchenSurface.label: kitchen surface
LanguageData.VFEPD_KitchenSurfaceEmpty.label: kitchen surface empty
LanguageData.VFEPD_Knives.label: knives
LanguageData.VFEPD_LabLockerBank.description: An ancient, rusted bank of lockers. All of the lockers have been forced open with nothing valuable left behind.
LanguageData.VFEPD_LabLockerBank.label: ancient lab locker bank
LanguageData.VFEPD_LandCoral.description: A very strange purple coloured fungus that resembles a coral. Grows only in polluted soil. This one is fake.
LanguageData.VFEPD_LandCoral.label: amethyst land coral fungus
LanguageData.VFEPD_LargeChemfuelTank_Prop.description: A massive chemfuel storage tank that supplies fuel for thrusters on a gravship. This tank seems completely inert.
LanguageData.VFEPD_LargeChemfuelTank_Prop.label: large chemfuel tank

LanguageData.VFEPD_LargeDecalWordSmallClear.label: large clear decal
