LanguageData.VFEPD_LargeDecalWordSmallDock.label: large dock decal
LanguageData.VFEPD_LargeDecalWordSmallGas.label: large gas decal
LanguageData.VFEPD_LargeDecalWordSmallHall.label: large hall decal
LanguageData.VFEPD_LargeDecalWordSmallKeep.label: large keep decal
LanguageData.VFEPD_LargeDecalWordSmallLab.label: large lab decal
LanguageData.VFEPD_LargeDecalWordSmallPad.label: large pad decal
LanguageData.VFEPD_LargeDecalWordSmallRoom.label: large room decal
LanguageData.VFEPD_LargeDecalWordSmallWing.label: large wing decal
LanguageData.VFEPD_LargeDecalWordSmallZone.label: large zone decal
LanguageData.VFEPD_LargeDecalWordSmelting.label: large smelting decal
LanguageData.VFEPD_LargeDecalWordStop.label: large stop decal
LanguageData.VFEPD_LargeDecalWordStorage.label: large storage decal
LanguageData.VFEPD_LargeDecalWordWarning.label: large warning decal
LanguageData.VFEPD_LargeDecalWordWorkshop.label: large workshop decal
LanguageData.VFEPD_LargeGlowPod.description: A large bioluminescent pod produced by giant insects.
LanguageData.VFEPD_LargeGlowPod.label: large glow pod
LanguageData.VFEPD_LargeScreen.description: A large computer screen. Intended to be placed over an empty workbench. Just for decorative purposes.
LanguageData.VFEPD_LargeScreen.label: large screen
LanguageData.VFEPD_LargeSlimyTree.description: This tree doesn't seem to be entirely solid. Upon further examination, it isn't an independent entity, its roots fusing seamlessly with the hardened gelatinous ground. This one is fake.
LanguageData.VFEPD_LargeSlimyTree.label: large slimy tree
LanguageData.VFEPD_LargeSupplyCrate.description: A large crate with some building resources and components. Sealed shut.
LanguageData.VFEPD_LargeSupplyCrate.label: large hermetic crate
LanguageData.VFEPD_LargeThruster_Prop.description: An advanced chemfuel thruster that greatly increases the range of a gravship. This thruster seems completely inert.
LanguageData.VFEPD_LargeThruster_Prop.label: large thruster
LanguageData.VFEPD_LargeWoodenMilitaryCrate.descripti: A rotten military crate. Sealed shut.
LanguageData.VFEPD_LargeWoodenMilitaryCrate.label: rotten military crate
LanguageData.VFEPD_Lettuce.description: A leaf vegetable commonly eaten fresh and served as the base of green salads. This one is fake.
LanguageData.VFEPD_Lettuce.label: lettuce
LanguageData.VFEPD_Levitree.description: An exotic space tree. This one is fake.
LanguageData.VFEPD_Levitree.label: levitree
LanguageData.VFEPD_LifeSupportUnit.description: A unit connected to the orbital platform's larger life support network. It keeps rooms heated and pressurized.
LanguageData.VFEPD_LifeSupportUnit.label: life support unit
LanguageData.VFEPD_LightArmoredVehicleWreck.descripti: An ancient, broken light armored vehicle. Everything that isn't rusted away was looted long ago.
LanguageData.VFEPD_LightArmoredVehicleWreck.label: light armored vehicle wreck
LanguageData.VFEPD_Lightning.description: A fast general purpose transporter, the Lightning is an excellent road vehicle for getting an appreciable amount of cargo in a very small time frame. Non-functional: all its internal wiring and its motor have been removed.
LanguageData.VFEPD_Lightning.label: Lightning
LanguageData.VFEPD_LilacBeacon.description: The lilac beacon is a tall mushroom with a bright purple cap. This one is fake.
LanguageData.VFEPD_LilacBeacon.label: lilac beacon
LanguageData.VFEPD_LiquidTank.description: A large tank filled with water-based liquid.
LanguageData.VFEPD_LiquidTank.label: large liquid tank
LanguageData.VFEPD_LockedVaultDoor.description: A sealed vault entrance leading to an underground laboratory. Upon closer inspection, it turns out to be just cardboard.
LanguageData.VFEPD_LockedVaultDoor.label: locked vault door
LanguageData.VFEPD_Lockers.description: A metal locker unit, allowing workers to store valuable belongings.
LanguageData.VFEPD_Lockers.label: lockers
LanguageData.VFEPD_LongCommandConsole.description: A long console with several different command modules.
LanguageData.VFEPD_LongCommandConsole.label: long command console
LanguageData.VFEPD_Longship.description: A type of narrow and relatively long boat with a sleek design, often equipped with sails for propulsion. It is commonly used for various purposes such as transportation, exploration, and warfare throughout history. Non-functional: all its internal mechanisms have been removed. Intended to be placed over water. Or wherever you want, I'm not your mom!
LanguageData.VFEPD_Longship.label: Longship
LanguageData.VFEPD_LooseCables.description: This tangle of decayed cables were probably once housed inside the ceiling panels.
LanguageData.VFEPD_LooseCables.label: loose cables
LanguageData.VFEPD_LooseGround.label: loose ground
LanguageData.VFEPD_Lotus.description: Sometimes colloquially called a water lily, lotus plants are adapted to grow in the flood plains of slow-moving rivers and delta areas. This one is fake. Intended to be placed over water. Or wherever you want, I'm not your mom!
LanguageData.VFEPD_Lotus.label: lotus
LanguageData.VFEPD_Louie.description: An armoured transport aircraft, the Louie is a robust and agile mobile mode of transportation. Non-functional: all its internal wiring and its motor have been removed.
LanguageData.VFEPD_Louie.label: Louie
LanguageData.VFEPD_Lullabloom.description: A special kind of mushroom that emits calming spores, ideal for planting next to a bed. This one is fake.
LanguageData.VFEPD_Lullabloom.label: lullabloom
LanguageData.VFEPD_MachiningHammer.description: A small machining hammer. Intended to be placed over an empty workbench. Just for decorative purposes.
LanguageData.VFEPD_MachiningHammer.label: machining hammer
LanguageData.VFEPD_MajorArchotechStructure.descriptio: A cardboard imitation of a large archotech structure.
LanguageData.VFEPD_MajorArchotechStructure.label: major archotech structure
LanguageData.VFEPD_MakingSkylanternEffect.description: This is an effecter prop for "Making Skylantern". Intrinsically laggy, use in moderation.
LanguageData.VFEPD_MakingSkylanternEffect.label: making skylantern
LanguageData.VFEPD_MalfunctioningTransportPod.descrip: A cargo pod with a faulty release mechanism. It's still sealed, and empty.
LanguageData.VFEPD_MalfunctioningTransportPod.label: malfunctioning transport pod
LanguageData.VFEPD_MangrovePalm.description: A palm tree adapted to the mangrove conditions. This one is fake.
LanguageData.VFEPD_MangrovePalm.label: mangrove palm
LanguageData.VFEPD_MangroveTree.description: A tree that grows in saline or brackish water. This one is fake.
LanguageData.VFEPD_MangroveTree.label: mangrove tree
LanguageData.VFEPD_ManyDocs.description: A bunch of many scattered research documents. Intended to be placed over an empty workbench. Just for decorative purposes.
LanguageData.VFEPD_ManyDocs.label: many docs
LanguageData.VFEPD_MapleTree.description: A fake, common medium-sized tree, easily identifiable by its distinct three-pointed leaf.
LanguageData.VFEPD_MapleTree.label: maple tree
LanguageData.VFEPD_Marshal.description: A general main battle tank, the Marshal is an improved combat vehicle that performs well in any engagement. Non-functional: all its internal wiring and its motor have been removed.
LanguageData.VFEPD_Marshal.label: Marshal
LanguageData.VFEPD_MeatDryingRack.description: A solid wooden rack featuring a series of dangling metal hooks across a central beam meant to hang slabs of meat. Purely decorative.
LanguageData.VFEPD_MeatDryingRack.label: meat drying rack
LanguageData.VFEPD_MeatSmokerEmpty.description: An empty meat smoker coming from the old Vanilla Factions Expanded - Medieval. Non-functional.
LanguageData.VFEPD_MeatSmokerEmpty.label: empty smoker
LanguageData.VFEPD_MeatSmokerFull.description: A closed meat smoker coming from the old Vanilla Factions Expanded - Medieval. Non-functional.
LanguageData.VFEPD_MeatSmokerFull.label: filled smoker
LanguageData.VFEPD_MechanitorShip.description: A short-range ship used by a mechanitor to transport mechs for low-orbit or planetary travel. Deactivated.
LanguageData.VFEPD_MechanitorShip.label: mechanitor ship
LanguageData.VFEPD_MechanoidDropPod.description: A launchable cargo pod intended to carry mechanoids. Not in working condition.
LanguageData.VFEPD_MechanoidDropPod.label: mechanoid drop pod
LanguageData.VFEPD_MechanoidProcessor.description: A powerful mechanoid computer running Windows 98.
LanguageData.VFEPD_MechanoidProcessor.label: mechanoid processor
LanguageData.VFEPD_MechAssembler.description: An automated mechanoid factory. Deactivated and sealed shut.
LanguageData.VFEPD_MechAssembler.label: mech assembler
LanguageData.VFEPD_MechbandAntenna.label: mechband antenna
LanguageData.VFEPD_MechBandAntennaPreparedEffect.desc: This is an effecter prop for "Mech Band Antenna Prepared". Intrinsically laggy, use in moderation.
LanguageData.VFEPD_MechbandDish.description: A mech-band signaling device more powerful than the normal mechlink antenna. Deactivated.
LanguageData.VFEPD_MechbandDish.label: mechband dish
LanguageData.VFEPD_MechCapsule.description: A mechanoid storage and deployment capsule. Sealed shut and inactive.
LanguageData.VFEPD_MechCapsule.label: mech capsule
LanguageData.VFEPD_MechCapsuleOpen.description: A mechanoid storage and deployment capsule. Open and empty.
LanguageData.VFEPD_MechCapsuleOpen.label: mech capsule, open
LanguageData.VFEPD_MechDropBeacon.description: A mechanoid reinforcement drop beacon. When activated, it does nothing, because it's not real. Imaginary mechanoids can't hurt you.
LanguageData.VFEPD_MechDropBeacon.label: drop beacon
LanguageData.VFEPD_MechhiveAssembler.description: An automated mechanoid factory. It periodically births fresh mechanoids.
LanguageData.VFEPD_MechhiveAssembler.label: mechhive birther
LanguageData.VFEPD_MechPylon.description: A node in a distributed mechanoid computation network.
LanguageData.VFEPD_MechPylon.label: mech pylon
LanguageData.VFEPD_MechRelay.description: A node that coordinates signals across a planet-wide mechanoid communication network. This one is completely inert.
LanguageData.VFEPD_MechRelay.label: mechanoid relay
LanguageData.VFEPD_MechRelay_Crashed.description: A node that coordinates signals across a planet-wide mechanoid communication network. Wrecked.
LanguageData.VFEPD_MechRelay_Crashed.label: crashed mechanoid relay
LanguageData.VFEPD_MechRepairingEffect.description: This is an effecter prop for "Mech Repairing". Intrinsically laggy, use in moderation.
LanguageData.VFEPD_MechRepairingEffect.label: mech repairing
LanguageData.VFEPD_MechStabilizer.description: A shield projecter that protects a nearby mechanoid relay. This one is completely inert.
LanguageData.VFEPD_MechStabilizer.label: relay stabilizer
LanguageData.VFEPD_MediumScreen.description: A medium computer screen. Intended to be placed over an empty workbench. Just for decorative purposes.
LanguageData.VFEPD_MediumScreen.label: medium screen
LanguageData.VFEPD_Megalith.description: A large stone used to construct a prehistoric structure or monument, either alone or together with other stones, often hewn in definite shapes for special purposes.
LanguageData.VFEPD_Megalith.label: megalith
LanguageData.VFEPD_Melon.description: A plant producing a sweet, edible, and fleshy fruit of considerable size. This one is fake.
LanguageData.VFEPD_Melon.label: melon
LanguageData.VFEPD_MetalhorrorDebris.label: metalhorror debris
LanguageData.VFEPD_Microwave.label: microwave
LanguageData.VFEPD_MineralConveyor.description: A mineral conveyor used for transporting minerals. Non-functional now.
LanguageData.VFEPD_MineralConveyor.label: mineral conveyor
LanguageData.VFEPD_MineralExports.description: A piece of mineral outlet. Non-functional now.
LanguageData.VFEPD_MineralExports.label: mineral outlet
LanguageData.VFEPD_MoldyUniform.description: This is NOT the latest fashion.
LanguageData.VFEPD_MoldyUniform.label: ragged uniform
LanguageData.VFEPD_MonitorBank.description: These monitors will never show any information again.
LanguageData.VFEPD_MonitorBank.label: ancient monitor banks
LanguageData.VFEPD_MopBucket.description: A sterile mop bucket. Ideal for a mop.
LanguageData.VFEPD_MopBucket.label: mop bucket
LanguageData.VFEPD_Mosquito.description: A general-purpose aircraft, the Mosquito is an extremely fast and mobile mode of transportation. Non-functional: all its internal wiring and its motor have been removed.
LanguageData.VFEPD_Mosquito.label: Mosquito
LanguageData.VFEPD_Moss.description: A nutrient-rich moss that can be used to feed cave animals, but not humans. This one is fake.
LanguageData.VFEPD_Moss.label: cave moss
LanguageData.VFEPD_Moss_Base.description: Fake wild moss that grows in clumps in areas of low light and cool temperatures.
LanguageData.VFEPD_Moss_Base.label: moss
LanguageData.VFEPD_Mote_RitualGlowRays.description: This is a mote prop for "Ritual Glow Rays". Intrinsically laggy, though less than effecter props. Use in moderation.
LanguageData.VFEPD_Mote_RitualGlowRays.label: ritual glow rays
LanguageData.VFEPD_Mote_RitualGlowSingleRay.descripti: This is a mote prop for "Ritual Glow Single Ray". Intrinsically laggy, though less than effecter props. Use in moderation.
LanguageData.VFEPD_Mote_RitualGlowSingleRay.label: glow single ray
LanguageData.VFEPD_Mote_RitualTechLineA.description: This is a mote prop for "Ritual Tech Line A". Intrinsically laggy, though less than effecter props. Use in moderation.
LanguageData.VFEPD_Mote_RitualTechLineA.label: tech lines A
LanguageData.VFEPD_Mote_RitualTechLineB.description: This is a mote prop for "Ritual Tech Line B". Intrinsically laggy, though less than effecter props. Use in moderation.
LanguageData.VFEPD_Mote_RitualTechLineB.label: tech lines B
LanguageData.VFEPD_Mote_RitualTechLineC.description: This is a mote prop for "Ritual Tech Line C". Intrinsically laggy, though less than effecter props. Use in moderation.
LanguageData.VFEPD_Mote_RitualTechLineC.label: tech lines C
LanguageData.VFEPD_Mote_RolePawnHighlight.description: This is a mote prop for "Role Pawn Highlight". Intrinsically laggy, though less than effecter props. Use in moderation.
LanguageData.VFEPD_Mote_RolePawnHighlight.label: role pawn highlight
LanguageData.VFEPD_Mote_RolePositionHighlight.descrip: This is a mote prop for "Role Position Highlight". Intrinsically laggy, though less than effecter props. Use in moderation.
LanguageData.VFEPD_Mote_RolePositionHighlight.label: role position
LanguageData.VFEPD_Mote_SpikePipe.description: This is a mote prop for "Spike Pipe". Intrinsically laggy, though less than effecter props. Use in moderation.
LanguageData.VFEPD_Mote_SpikePipe.label: spike pipe
LanguageData.VFEPD_Mote_TotemOutline.description: This is a mote prop for "Totem outline". Intrinsically laggy, though less than effecter props. Use in moderation.
LanguageData.VFEPD_Mote_TotemOutline.label: totem
LanguageData.VFEPD_Mule.description: A basic cargo transport, the Mule is a relatively cheap vehicle that can carry a large amount of cargo across smooth roads of flat terrain. Non-functional: all its internal wiring and its motor have been removed.
LanguageData.VFEPD_Mule.label: Mule
LanguageData.VFEPD_MustBucket.description: A small must bucket. Intended to be placed over an empty workbench. Just for decorative purposes.
LanguageData.VFEPD_MustBucket.label: must bucket
LanguageData.VFEPD_MustBuckets.description: Two small must buckets. Intended to be placed over an empty workbench. Just for decorative purposes.
LanguageData.VFEPD_MustBuckets.label: must buckets
LanguageData.VFEPD_MutagenInhibitorCore.description: An old and inactive mutagen inhibitor core.
LanguageData.VFEPD_MutagenInhibitorCore.label: mutagen inhibitor core
LanguageData.VFEPD_MycothreadMushroom.description: This mushroom has been cultivated for ages by tunneler mining colonies. This one is fake.
LanguageData.VFEPD_MycothreadMushroom.label: mycothread mushroom
LanguageData.VFEPD_Nebulafrond.description: An exotic space plant. This one is fake.
LanguageData.VFEPD_Nebulafrond.label: nebulafrond
LanguageData.VFEPD_NeurostabilizerArray.description: An old and inactive neurostabilizer array.
LanguageData.VFEPD_NeurostabilizerArray.label: neurostabilizer array
LanguageData.VFEPD_NociosphereDeparting.description: This is an effecter prop for "Nociosphere Departing". Intrinsically laggy, use in moderation.
LanguageData.VFEPD_NociosphereDeparting.label: nociosphere departing
LanguageData.VFEPD_Noctolith.description: A twisted pillar of jagged blade-like structures made of dark, oily metal. Merely decorative.
LanguageData.VFEPD_Noctolith.label: noctolith
LanguageData.VFEPD_Nomad.description: An armoured all-rounder vehicle, the Nomad performs remarkably well in all categories with an excellent cargo and passenger capacity. Non-functional: all its internal wiring and its motor have been removed.
LanguageData.VFEPD_Nomad.label: Nomad
LanguageData.VFEPD_NutrientDispenser.description: A nutrient solution dispenser used to process and convert nutrient ointments into nutrient solutions, and then transport nutrient solutions for hydroponic cultivation through a pipeline system. Inactive.
LanguageData.VFEPD_NutrientDispenser.label: nutrient solution dispenser
LanguageData.VFEPD_NutrientPipes.description: Steel nutrient pipes. These do not transport anything.
LanguageData.VFEPD_NutrientPipes.label: nutrient pipe
LanguageData.VFEPD_NutrientSolutionCrate.description: Fake boxes of nutrient solution stacked in a crate.
LanguageData.VFEPD_NutrientSolutionCrate.label: nutrient solution crate
LanguageData.VFEPD_NutrientSolutionFermenter.descript: A nutrient solution fermenter used to process a series of raw food or fertilizers in a fermentation tank and separate them to obtain nutrient solution. Inactive.
LanguageData.VFEPD_NutrientSolutionFermenter.label: nutrient solution fermenter
LanguageData.VFEPD_NutrientSolutionStorageTank.label: nutrient solution storage tank
LanguageData.VFEPD_Nutrifungus.description: A fake meaty bioengineered mushroom grown for its nutritious value.
LanguageData.VFEPD_Nutrifungus.label: nutrifungus
LanguageData.VFEPD_OakTree.description: A fake hardwood tree. Oaks take a long time to grow, but their wood is so strong that 'oak' is used as a metaphor for strength across many cultures.
LanguageData.VFEPD_OakTree.label: oak tree
LanguageData.VFEPD_Oats.description: The oat, sometimes called the common oat, is a species of cereal grain grown for its seed, which is known by the same name. This one is fake.
LanguageData.VFEPD_Oats.label: oats
LanguageData.VFEPD_Obelisk.description: This is a mote prop for "Obelisk". Intrinsically laggy, though less than effecter props. Use in moderation.
LanguageData.VFEPD_Obelisk.label: obelisk
LanguageData.VFEPD_OffroadJeepWreck.description: An ancient, broken offroad jeep. Everything that isn't rusted away was looted long ago.
LanguageData.VFEPD_OffroadJeepWreck.label: offroad jeep wreck
LanguageData.VFEPD_Ohm.description: This is a fleck prop for "Ohm". Intrinsically laggy, use in moderation.
LanguageData.VFEPD_Ohm.label: ohm
LanguageData.VFEPD_OilSmear.description: If these appear under your car, take it to a mechanic.
LanguageData.VFEPD_OilSmear.label: oil smear
LanguageData.VFEPD_Okra.description: A flowering plant in the mallow family valued for its edible green seed pods. This one is fake.
LanguageData.VFEPD_Okra.label: okra
LanguageData.VFEPD_OldsmobileLightTonneau.description: The Oldsmobile Light Tonneau, introduced in 1905, was an early automobile featuring a larger, more powerful design compared to the earlier Curved Dash model. It had a four-seat, open-top body style known as a "tonneau," with a rear seating area that could be accessed via a side door. Powered by a two-cylinder engine, it offered more horsepower and improved performance. Non-functional: all its internal mechanisms have been removed.
LanguageData.VFEPD_OldsmobileLightTonneau.label: Oldsmobile Light Tonneau
LanguageData.VFEPD_OldsmobileModelRCurvedDash.descrip: Produced from 1901 to 1907, the Oldsmobile Model R, "Curved Dash" was the first mass-produced car in the world. It featured a distinctive curved front dash (hence the name) and was powered by a single-cylinder engine, producing about 5 horsepower. Affordable and reliable, it became one of the most popular early automobiles, helping to establish Oldsmobile as a key player in the emerging car industry. Non-functional: all its internal mechanisms have been removed.
LanguageData.VFEPD_OldsmobileModelRCurvedDash.label: Oldsmobile Curved Dash
LanguageData.VFEPD_OmnistSymbol.description: This is a mote prop for "Omnist Symbol". Intrinsically laggy, though less than effecter props. Use in moderation.
LanguageData.VFEPD_OmnistSymbol.label: omnist symbol
LanguageData.VFEPD_Onion.description: A fake edible bulb of pungent, savory taste and smell with almost as many varieties as cooking applications.
LanguageData.VFEPD_Onion.label: onion
LanguageData.VFEPD_Opuntia.description: More often referred to as the “prickly pear” cactus, this plant is known to be quite bountiful even in hot, dry deserts. This one is fake.
LanguageData.VFEPD_Opuntia.label: opuntia
LanguageData.VFEPD_OrangeTree.description: A fake, bushy, semi-tropical tree dotted with orange fruits well equipped for growing in humid environments and in wet soil.
LanguageData.VFEPD_OrangeTree.label: orange tree
LanguageData.VFEPD_OrbitalScanner.description: A sensor unit that passively scans for irregular objects orbiting the planet. Inactive.
LanguageData.VFEPD_OrbitalScanner.label: orbital scanner
LanguageData.VFEPD_OreDressingMachine.label: ore dressing machine
LanguageData.VFEPD_OutriggerCanoe.description: A watercraft featuring a lateral support float known as an outrigger, which is fastened to one of the sides of the main hull. Non-functional: all its internal mechanisms have been removed.
LanguageData.VFEPD_OutriggerCanoe.label: Outrigger Canoe
LanguageData.VFEPD_Oven.label: oven
LanguageData.VFEPD_OxCart.description: A two wheeled cart pulled by oxen. A means of transportation used since ancient times, the ox cart is generally used to carry goods, such as agrarian produce or lumber. Non-functional: all its internal mechanisms have been removed. Even the oxen are fake.
LanguageData.VFEPD_OxCart.label: Ox cart
LanguageData.VFEPD_OxygenPump.description: A small wall-mounted unit that does nothing.
LanguageData.VFEPD_OxygenPump.label: oxygen pump
LanguageData.VFEPD_PaintEffect.description: This is an effecter prop for "Paint". Intrinsically laggy, use in moderation.
LanguageData.VFEPD_PaintEffect.label: paint
LanguageData.VFEPD_Paladin.description: A general purpose armoured personnel carrier, the Paladin is a fast and hardy troop transport. Non-functional: all its internal wiring and its motor have been removed.
LanguageData.VFEPD_Paladin.label: Paladin
LanguageData.VFEPD_Palanquin.description: A covered litter carried on poles on the shoulders of two bearers. A palanquin is not an efficient mode of transportation. Non-functional: its doors are sealed shut.
LanguageData.VFEPD_Palanquin.label: Palanquin
LanguageData.VFEPD_Pallet.label: pallet
LanguageData.VFEPD_Pallet_Medicine.description: A pallet containing fake medical supplies.
LanguageData.VFEPD_Pallet_Medicine.label: medicine pallet
LanguageData.VFEPD_Pallet_SurvivalMeals.description: A pallet containing fake survival meals.
LanguageData.VFEPD_Pallet_SurvivalMeals.label: survival meal pallet
LanguageData.VFEPD_PalletBarrelBlue.description: A blue metal barrel on a wooden pallet.
LanguageData.VFEPD_PalletBarrelBlue.label: pallet with blue barrels
LanguageData.VFEPD_PalletBarrelGreen.description: A green metal barrels on a wooden pallet.
LanguageData.VFEPD_PalletBarrelGreen.label: pallet with green barrels
LanguageData.VFEPD_PalletBarrelGrey.description: A grey metal barrel on a wooden pallet.
LanguageData.VFEPD_PalletBarrelGrey.label: pallet with grey barrels
LanguageData.VFEPD_PalletBarrelRed.description: A red metal barrel on a wooden pallet.
LanguageData.VFEPD_PalletBarrelRed.label: pallet with red barrels
LanguageData.VFEPD_PalletBarrelYellow.description: A yellow metal barrel on a wooden pallet.
LanguageData.VFEPD_PalletBarrelYellow.label: pallet with yellow barrels
LanguageData.VFEPD_PalletBoxes.description: A large pallet with several wooden boxes.
LanguageData.VFEPD_PalletBoxes.label: pallet with wooden boxes
LanguageData.VFEPD_PalletCardboard.description: A large pallet with several cardboard boxes.
LanguageData.VFEPD_PalletCardboard.label: pallet with cardboard boxes
LanguageData.VFEPD_PalmTree.description: A fake tropical tree with a tall, naked trunk topped by a cluster of very broad leaves. Unfortunately, this variety doesn't produce any edible coconuts.
LanguageData.VFEPD_PalmTree.label: palm tree
LanguageData.VFEPD_PantheistSymbol.description: This is a mote prop for "Pantheist Symbol". Intrinsically laggy, though less than effecter props. Use in moderation.
LanguageData.VFEPD_PantheistSymbol.label: pantheist symbol
LanguageData.VFEPD_ParasiticMangrove.description: A weird, colourful plant adapted to extract nutrients from mangrove trees. This one is fake.
LanguageData.VFEPD_ParasiticMangrove.label: parasitic mangrove
LanguageData.VFEPD_PassengerShuttle.description: A chemfuel-powered shuttle designed for long-distance travel. This one refuses to start.
LanguageData.VFEPD_PassengerShuttle.label: passenger shuttle
LanguageData.VFEPD_PeachTree.description: A fake deciduous tree bearing fuzzy, stone fruit known as peaches, peach trees often require full sunlight and warm temperatures.
LanguageData.VFEPD_PeachTree.label: peach tree
LanguageData.VFEPD_Peanut.description: A plant that produces seeds with an oblong shape and a papery seed coat. This one is fake.
LanguageData.VFEPD_Peanut.label: peanut
LanguageData.VFEPD_PearTree.description: A fake stout tree bearing crispy green pears, pear trees are notable for requiring high amounts of water and cool weather, and also doing quite well in shade.
LanguageData.VFEPD_PearTree.label: pear tree
LanguageData.VFEPD_Peas.description: Fake spherical green seeds tucked safely away in a fleshy pod. Pea plants are known to be quite thirsty, and will benefit greatly from rainfall.
LanguageData.VFEPD_Peas.label: pea
LanguageData.VFEPD_PebbleCactus.description: A fake small cactus that resembles a cluster of pebbles.
LanguageData.VFEPD_PebbleCactus.label: pebble cactus
LanguageData.VFEPD_PentagramsMote.description: This is a mote prop for "Pentagram". Intrinsically laggy, though less than effecter props. Use in moderation.
LanguageData.VFEPD_PentagramsMote.label: pentagram
LanguageData.VFEPD_Pepper.description: Fake, tiny, spicy, crimson pods often used in sauces, relishes, or powders.
LanguageData.VFEPD_Pepper.label: pepper
LanguageData.VFEPD_PersonalConsole.description: A small, futuristic personal communications console.
LanguageData.VFEPD_PersonalConsole.label: personal console
LanguageData.VFEPD_Personalpod.description: A small, out-of-service, multi use drop pod.
LanguageData.VFEPD_Personalpod.label: personal pod
LanguageData.VFEPD_Petroglypher.description: A hive-like structure created by giant insects. Non-functional: all its internal mechanisms have been removed.
LanguageData.VFEPD_Petroglypher.label: petroglypher
LanguageData.VFEPD_PeyotePlant.description: A cultivated succulent resembling thick buttons. Whilst not as beautiful as flowers, this plant has a very long lifespan. This one is fake.
LanguageData.VFEPD_PeyotePlant.label: peyote
LanguageData.VFEPD_PickAxe.label: pickaxe
LanguageData.VFEPD_PilotBridge.description: An interface that allows launching and piloting a gravhulk. Inactive.
LanguageData.VFEPD_PilotBridge.label: pilot bridge
LanguageData.VFEPD_PilotCockpit.description: An interface that allows launching and piloting a gravjumper. Inactive.
LanguageData.VFEPD_PilotCockpit.label: pilot cockpit
LanguageData.VFEPD_PilotConsole_Prop.description: An interface that allows launching and piloting a gravship. This console seems completely inert.
LanguageData.VFEPD_PilotConsole_Prop.label: pilot console
LanguageData.VFEPD_PilotSubpersonaCore_Prop.descripti: A low-grade subpersona specialized in gravship flight. This one only has access to chatGPT and is therefore dumber than a Steam mod commenter.
LanguageData.VFEPD_PilotSubpersonaCore_Prop.label: pilot subpersona core
LanguageData.VFEPD_PincushionCactus.description: A fake short cactus. It is so named because it resembles a pincushion.
LanguageData.VFEPD_PincushionCactus.label: pincushion cactus
LanguageData.VFEPD_PincushionPlant.description: A cultivated succulent of cactus variety, with pointy spikes covering its exterior. This one is fake.
LanguageData.VFEPD_PincushionPlant.label: pincushion
LanguageData.VFEPD_Pineapple.description: A sweet tropical fruit with a tough leathery skin and spiky leaves on top. This one is fake.
LanguageData.VFEPD_Pineapple.label: pineapple
LanguageData.VFEPD_PineTree.description: A fake large conifer covered with prickly pine cones. It grows in a distinctive conical shape.
LanguageData.VFEPD_PineTree.label: pine tree
LanguageData.VFEPD_PipelineJunction.description: A large underground chemfuel pipeline. Not connected to anything.
LanguageData.VFEPD_PipelineJunction.label: pipeline junction
LanguageData.VFEPD_Pipes.description: A large stack of industrial pipes.
LanguageData.VFEPD_Pipes.label: stack of pipes
LanguageData.VFEPD_PirateCaravel.description: A caravel is a small, fast, and versatile sailing ship known for its narrow hull, multiple masts, and combination of square and lateen sails. It was widely used for exploration, trade, and naval activities during the Age of Discovery. Non-functional: all its internal mechanisms have been removed. Intended to be placed over water. Or wherever you want, I'm not your mom!
LanguageData.VFEPD_PirateCaravel.label: Pirate caravel
LanguageData.VFEPD_PitBurrow.description: A small hole connecting to some unseen cave network deep under the surface... Actually, on close inspection it seems to be just painted on the ground...
LanguageData.VFEPD_PitBurrow.label: fake pit burrow
LanguageData.VFEPD_PitGate.description: A massive, foreboding hole that connects the surface with a dark network of underground caves... Actually, on close inspection it seems to be just painted on the ground...
LanguageData.VFEPD_PitGate.label: pit gate
LanguageData.VFEPD_Planks.description: A large stack of wooden planks.
LanguageData.VFEPD_Planks.label: stack of planks
LanguageData.VFEPD_PlanningScreen.description: A glass screen, ideal for planning out combat scenarios.
LanguageData.VFEPD_PlanningScreen.label: planning screen
LanguageData.VFEPD_PlanningTable.description: A large size planning screen mounted on a large table.
LanguageData.VFEPD_PlanningTable.label: planning table
LanguageData.VFEPD_Plant_Bulrush.description: A fake plant commonly found in swamps, recognizable for its brown cigar-shaped top.
LanguageData.VFEPD_Plant_Bulrush.label: bulrush
LanguageData.VFEPD_Plant_Fireweed.description: A low-lying plant that produces clusters of purple flowers. It is common in alpine environments.\n\nThis object is inert and serves no biological function.
LanguageData.VFEPD_Plant_Fireweed.label: fireweed
LanguageData.VFEPD_Plant_LilyPad.description: A fake water plant with a broad floating leaf.
LanguageData.VFEPD_Plant_LilyPad.label: lily pad
LanguageData.VFEPD_Plant_Lotus.description: A fake aquatic plant known for its fragrant flowers.
LanguageData.VFEPD_Plant_Lotus.label: lotus
LanguageData.VFEPD_Plant_MagmaCactus.description: A fake resilient species of cactus notable for its ability to survive extreme heat.\n\nThis object is inert and serves no biological function.
LanguageData.VFEPD_Plant_MagmaCactus.label: magma cactus
LanguageData.VFEPD_Plant_Nightgrass.description: A fake grass-like fungus that grows as part of a massive mycelium network.\n\nThis object is inert and serves no biological function.
LanguageData.VFEPD_Plant_Nightgrass.label: night grass
LanguageData.VFEPD_Plant_NightRafflesia.description: A distant cousin of the giant rafflesia, this plant has adapted to thrive in dark locations. Its beauty is tempered by a strong stench of musk and rotten eggs.\n\nThis object is inert and serves no biological function.
LanguageData.VFEPD_Plant_NightRafflesia.label: night rafflesia
LanguageData.VFEPD_Plant_Poppy.description: A fake tiny, crimson flower that can be harvested for opium, a strong pain killing drug.
LanguageData.VFEPD_Plant_Poppy.label: poppy
LanguageData.VFEPD_Plant_Psilocap.description: A fungus that gives off hallucinogenic spores. Standing next to them is enough to produce mild hallucinations. Psilocaps can be harvested and ingested to produce a vivid sensory experience that increases the user's mood.\n\nThis object is inert and serves no biological function.
LanguageData.VFEPD_Plant_Psilocap.label: psilocap
LanguageData.VFEPD_Plant_Reeds.description: A fake tall slender plant that grows in water.
LanguageData.VFEPD_Plant_Reeds.label: reeds
LanguageData.VFEPD_Plant_Thornvine.description: A fake prickly vine adapted to living in harsh conditions.\n\nThis object is inert and serves no biological function.
LanguageData.VFEPD_Plant_Thornvine.label: thornvine
LanguageData.VFEPD_Plant_TreeSnagroot.description: A fake gnarled slow-growing tree, adapted to live in toxic scarlands.\n\nThis object is inert and serves no biological function.
LanguageData.VFEPD_Plant_TreeSnagroot.label: snagroot tree
LanguageData.VFEPD_Plant_Willowgill.description: A tall spindly slow-growing mushroom with gills that droop like a willow tree. It gives off a soft light.\n\nThis object is inert and serves no biological function.
LanguageData.VFEPD_Plant_Willowgill.label: willowgill
LanguageData.VFEPD_Plant_YellowGrass.description: Wild grass. Grows anywhere there is a little light and minimally fertile ground.\n\nThis object is inert and serves no biological function.
LanguageData.VFEPD_Plant_YellowGrass.label: yellow grass
LanguageData.VFEPD_Plant_YellowTallGrass.description: Wild tall grass that grows in tough thickets. It slows down anyone moving over it.\n\nThis object is inert and serves no biological function.
LanguageData.VFEPD_Plant_YellowTallGrass.label: tall yellow grass
LanguageData.VFEPD_Plasmablossom.description: An exotic space plant. This one is fake.
LanguageData.VFEPD_Plasmablossom.label: plasmablossom
LanguageData.VFEPD_PlasteelATM.description: A non-functional plasteel money dispensing machine.
LanguageData.VFEPD_PlasteelATM.label: plasteel ATM
LanguageData.VFEPD_PlasteelBookshelf.description: A bookshelf containing a variety of unreadable tomes and publications.
LanguageData.VFEPD_PlasteelBookshelf.label: plasteel bookshelf
LanguageData.VFEPD_PlasteelCupboard.label: plasteel cupboard
LanguageData.VFEPD_PlasteelCupboardDouble.label: plasteel double cupboard
LanguageData.VFEPD_PlasteelCupboardNarrow.label: plasteel narrow cupboard
LanguageData.VFEPD_PlasteelCupboardPlates.description: A large cupboard with some plates.
LanguageData.VFEPD_PlasteelCupboardPlates.label: plasteel cupboard with plates
LanguageData.VFEPD_PlasteelDivider.label: plasteel divider
LanguageData.VFEPD_PlasteelMirror.label: plasteel mirror
LanguageData.VFEPD_PlasteelPlankDivider.label: plasteel plank divider
LanguageData.VFEPD_PlasteelShortCupboard.label: plasteel short cupboard
LanguageData.VFEPD_PlasteelShortCupboardPlates.label: plasteel short cupboard with plates
LanguageData.VFEPD_PlasteelTallCabinet.label: plasteel tall cabinet
LanguageData.VFEPD_PlasteelVendingMachine.label: plasteel vending machine
LanguageData.VFEPD_PlayPokerEffect.description: This is an effecter prop for "Play Poker". Intrinsically laggy, use in moderation.
LanguageData.VFEPD_PlayPokerEffect.label: play poker
LanguageData.VFEPD_PlumTree.description: A fake bushy tree bearing a smooth-skinned purple fruit.
LanguageData.VFEPD_PlumTree.label: plum tree
LanguageData.VFEPD_PneumaticTubeLaunchPort.descriptio: A fake pneumatic tube launch port.
LanguageData.VFEPD_PneumaticTubeLaunchPort.label: pneumatic tube launch port
LanguageData.VFEPD_PneumaticTubes.label: pneumatic tubes
LanguageData.VFEPD_PneumaticTubes_Corner.description: A network of ancient tubes used to deliver small and medium items between vaults. Some of the capsules remain stuck inside.
LanguageData.VFEPD_PneumaticTubes_Corner.label: pneumatic tubes
LanguageData.VFEPD_PneumaticTubes_Long.description: A network of ancient tubes used to deliver small and medium items between vaults. Some of the capsules remain stuck inside.
LanguageData.VFEPD_PneumaticTubes_Long.label: pneumatic tubes
LanguageData.VFEPD_PneumaticTubes_Terminus.descriptio: The pneumatic tubes network had an exit port here. It is empty.
LanguageData.VFEPD_PneumaticTubes_Terminus.label: empty pneumatic tubes terminus
LanguageData.VFEPD_PneumaticTubes_Terminus_Closed.des: The pneumatic tubes network had an exit port here. It can be opened to access its contents.
LanguageData.VFEPD_PneumaticTubes_Triple.description: A network of ancient tubes used to deliver small and medium items between vaults. Some of the capsules remain stuck inside.
LanguageData.VFEPD_PneumaticTubes_Triple.label: pneumatic tubes
LanguageData.VFEPD_PneumaticTubes_Underground.descrip: A network of ancient tubes used to deliver small and medium items between vaults. Some of the capsules remain stuck inside.
LanguageData.VFEPD_PneumaticTubes_Underground.label: underground pneumatic tubes
LanguageData.VFEPD_PneumaticTubes_Wall.description: A network of ancient tubes used to deliver small and medium items between vaults. Some of the capsules remain stuck inside.
LanguageData.VFEPD_PneumaticTubes_Wall.label: pneumatic tubes
LanguageData.VFEPD_PodSlime.description: I picture it tasting like Tang.
LanguageData.VFEPD_PodSlime.label: pod slime
LanguageData.VFEPD_PollutedStikehr.description: A giant alien mushroom that glows in the strange darkening mist. This one is fake.
LanguageData.VFEPD_PollutedStikehr.label: polluted stikehr
LanguageData.VFEPD_PoplarTree.description: A fake softwood tree that grows very fast. Unfortunately, its wood is weak and so it yields less useful material than hardwood trees.
LanguageData.VFEPD_PoplarTree.label: poplar tree
LanguageData.VFEPD_Potato.description: A fake, highly nutritious tuber. Potatoes grow well even in somewhat poor soil, and form a delicious crispy outer coating when fried in oil.
LanguageData.VFEPD_Potato.label: potato plant
LanguageData.VFEPD_Potentiometer.description: A potentiometer unit. Intended to be placed over an empty workbench. Just for decorative purposes.
LanguageData.VFEPD_Potentiometer.label: potentiometer
LanguageData.VFEPD_PotentiometerOven.description: An oven converted for smelters. Intended to be placed over an empty workbench. Just for decorative purposes.
LanguageData.VFEPD_PotentiometerOven.label: converted oven
LanguageData.VFEPD_Power_Cell_BurningEffect.descripti: This is an effecter prop for "Power Cell Burning". Intrinsically laggy, use in moderation.
LanguageData.VFEPD_Power_Cell_BurningEffect.label: power cell burning
LanguageData.VFEPD_Power_Cell_SparksEffect.descriptio: This is an effecter prop for "Power Cell Sparks". Intrinsically laggy, use in moderation.
LanguageData.VFEPD_Power_Cell_SparksEffect.label: power cell sparks
LanguageData.VFEPD_PowerConverter.label: power converter
LanguageData.VFEPD_PowerPole.description: A tall post to mount cables on.
LanguageData.VFEPD_PowerPole.label: power pole
LanguageData.VFEPD_Present.description: A festive present. Actually just a painted cardboard box. Booooh.
LanguageData.VFEPD_Present.label: present
LanguageData.VFEPD_Prowler.description: A basic off-road exploration vehicle, the Prowler is relatively cheap to construct and is an effective all-weather option for efficient travel over steep terrain. Non-functional: all its internal wiring and its motor have been removed.
LanguageData.VFEPD_Prowler.label: Prowler
LanguageData.VFEPD_PsychicDroner.description: An archotech device transmitting the thoughts of a mad superintelligence. It generates a massive psychic drone tuned to one gender and affecting a whole region of the planet. Looking inside, you'll discover it's actually a cardboard cutout without any relevant machinery.
LanguageData.VFEPD_PsychicDroner.label: psychic droner
LanguageData.VFEPD_PsychicSuppressor.description: An archotech device that generates a massive psychic suppression field tuned to a particular gender. People of that gender have their psychic activity suppressed, reducing their consciousness. Looking inside, you'll discover it's actually a cardboard cutout without any relevant machinery.
LanguageData.VFEPD_PsychicSuppressor.label: psychic suppressor
LanguageData.VFEPD_Psychoid.description: A fake leafy plant which generates the chemical compound psychite. Originally evolved as a defense mechanism to ward off plant-eating animals by overstimulating and sickening them, the psychite drug can be extracted and refined into various forms for recreational use. It is addictive.
LanguageData.VFEPD_Psychoid.label: psychoid plant
LanguageData.VFEPD_Pumpkin.description: Technically a giant berry, pumpkins are renowned for being trivial to both sow and harvest. These ones are fake.
LanguageData.VFEPD_Pumpkin.label: pumpkin
LanguageData.VFEPD_Quasarbloom.description: An exotic space plant. This one is fake.
LanguageData.VFEPD_Quasarbloom.label: quasarbloom
LanguageData.VFEPD_Rack.description: This server rack once housed a lot of genetic information, but all its data has now degraded completely.
LanguageData.VFEPD_Rack.label: ancient server rack
LanguageData.VFEPD_Radish.description: A tuberous edible plant also called manioc, mandioca, or yuca. This one is fake.
LanguageData.VFEPD_Radish.label: radish
LanguageData.VFEPD_Rafflesia.description: A rare, giant flower which can be found deep in steaming jungles. You would think a giant flower would be beautiful, but this one looks and smells like rotting flesh.
LanguageData.VFEPD_Rafflesia.label: giant rafflesia
LanguageData.VFEPD_RapidInfusionPump.description: An old and inactive rapid infusion pump.
LanguageData.VFEPD_RapidInfusionPump.label: rapid infusion pump
LanguageData.VFEPD_RatPalm.description: A fake tree similar to a palm tree with dense surface roots.
LanguageData.VFEPD_RatPalm.label: rat palm tree
LanguageData.VFEPD_RavenNettle.description: Tangled, thorny, woody shoots covered with leaves. Raven nettle grows in clusters, and slows down anyone moving over it. This one is fake.
LanguageData.VFEPD_RavenNettle.label: raven nettle
LanguageData.VFEPD_RecurvedStropharia.description: A big greyish mushroom. Its size and glowing protrusions make this fungus beautiful to look at. This one is fake.
LanguageData.VFEPD_RecurvedStropharia.label: recurved stropharia
LanguageData.VFEPD_RedBugloss.description: One of the weirdest plants from Earth, genetically modified to thrive in wet, warm environments. This one is fake.
LanguageData.VFEPD_RedBugloss.label: red bugloss
LanguageData.VFEPD_Redcap.description: A cultivated mushroom with a beautiful red cap and a somewhat short lifespan. This one is fake.
LanguageData.VFEPD_Redcap.label: redcap
LanguageData.VFEPD_RedLeaves.description: This grass is completely alien, probably not even 100% carbon based. Not very edible for terrestrial creatures. This one is fake.
LanguageData.VFEPD_RedLeaves.label: ocular plant
LanguageData.VFEPD_RedPlantsTall.description: This grass is completely alien, probably not even 100% carbon based. Not very edible for terrestrial creatures. This one is fake.
LanguageData.VFEPD_RedPlantsTall.label: ocular plant
LanguageData.VFEPD_RefrigeratedTruckWreck.description: An ancient, broken refrigerated truck. Everything that isn't rusted away was looted long ago.
LanguageData.VFEPD_RefrigeratedTruckWreck.label: refrigerated truck wreck
LanguageData.VFEPD_RejectionBufferCoil.description: An old and inactive rejection buffer coil.
LanguageData.VFEPD_RejectionBufferCoil.label: rejection buffer coil
LanguageData.VFEPD_RenaultTypeK.description: The Renault Type K, produced in 1902, was a significant early automobile that gained fame for its victory in the 1902 Paris-Vienna race. Designed by the Renault brothers, it featured a four-cylinder engine, which was advanced for its time, delivering more power and speed than many contemporary vehicles. Non-functional: all its internal mechanisms have been removed.
LanguageData.VFEPD_RenaultTypeK.label: Renault Type K
LanguageData.VFEPD_RepairEffect.description: This is an effecter prop for "Repair". Intrinsically laggy, use in moderation.
LanguageData.VFEPD_RepairEffect.label: repair
LanguageData.VFEPD_ResearchDatabase.description: A research database. Intended to be placed over an empty workbench. Just for decorative purposes.
LanguageData.VFEPD_ResearchDatabase.label: research database
LanguageData.VFEPD_ResearchEffect.description: This is an effecter prop for "Research". Intrinsically laggy, use in moderation.
LanguageData.VFEPD_ResearchEffect.label: research
LanguageData.VFEPD_ResearchStructure.description: A research structure. Intended to be placed over an empty workbench. Just for decorative purposes.
LanguageData.VFEPD_ResearchStructure.label: research structure
LanguageData.VFEPD_ResearchStructureB.description: A research structure. Intended to be placed over an empty workbench. Just for decorative purposes.
LanguageData.VFEPD_ResearchStructureB.label: research structure
LanguageData.VFEPD_RevenantGorePool.description: Revenant gore pool. Smells like raspberries.
LanguageData.VFEPD_RevenantGorePool.label: revenant gore pool
LanguageData.VFEPD_RevenantSmear.description: Revenant smear. That's the name of my black metal band.
LanguageData.VFEPD_RevenantSmear.label: revenant smear
LanguageData.VFEPD_Rice.description: A fake, short, fast-growing crop that yields small edible grains. Its great nutritional ouput and ease of cultivation has made it the economic core of many great civilizations. While rice grows quickly, it is sensitive to soil fertility and will not fare well in poor soil.
LanguageData.VFEPD_Rice.label: rice plant
LanguageData.VFEPD_Rickshaw.description: A mode of human-powered transport by which a runner draws a two-wheeled cart which seats another person. Non-functional: all its internal mechanisms have been removed.
LanguageData.VFEPD_Rickshaw.label: Rickshaw
LanguageData.VFEPD_RimeNodules.description: A very strange plant, partly inorganic, that seems to extract propane from the surrounding landscape and store it as an energy source in rime-bound chemical sacs. This one is fake.
LanguageData.VFEPD_RimeNodules.label: rime nodules
LanguageData.VFEPD_Ripthorn.description: A fake short toxin-adapted shrub that looks like a dense, tough tangle of thorny branches.
LanguageData.VFEPD_Ripthorn.label: ripthorn
LanguageData.VFEPD_Roadkill.description: A basic medium tank, the Roadkill is a comparatively cheap armoured vehicle suited for short engagements. Non-functional: all its internal wiring and its motor have been removed.
LanguageData.VFEPD_Roadkill.label: Roadkill
LanguageData.VFEPD_Roadrunner.description: A general cargo transporter, the Roadrunner is an excellent vehicle for getting a lot of material from one location to another. Non-functional: all its internal wiring and its motor have been removed.
LanguageData.VFEPD_Roadrunner.label: Roadrunner
LanguageData.VFEPD_RocketArtilleryWreck.description: An ancient, broken rocket artillery truck. Everything that isn't rusted away was looted long ago.
LanguageData.VFEPD_RocketArtilleryWreck.label: rocket artillery wreck
LanguageData.VFEPD_RollsRoyceSilverGhost.description: The Rolls-Royce Silver Ghost, introduced in 1906, is often regarded as one of the most iconic and luxurious cars of the early 20th century. Powered by a 7.0-liter six-cylinder engine, the Silver Ghost was renowned for its smooth performance, reliability, and quiet operation, earning it the nickname "the best car in the world." Non-functional: all its internal mechanisms have been removed.
LanguageData.VFEPD_RollsRoyceSilverGhost.label: Rolls Royce Silver Ghost
LanguageData.VFEPD_RoofWorkEffect.description: This is an effecter prop for "Roof Work". Intrinsically laggy, use in moderation.
LanguageData.VFEPD_RoofWorkEffect.label: roof work
LanguageData.VFEPD_Rose.description: A fake beautiful cultivated flower, the rose has been a symbol of love since Earth's ancient era.
LanguageData.VFEPD_Rose.label: rose
LanguageData.VFEPD_Rotor.label: rotor
LanguageData.VFEPD_RubbishPile.label: trash bags
LanguageData.VFEPD_RubblePile.description: The crumbled remains of an ancient structure.
LanguageData.VFEPD_RubblePile.label: rubble pile
LanguageData.VFEPD_Ruined_Mechahybrid_Antenna.descrip: A collapsed antenna that is completely unable of transmitting anything ever again.
LanguageData.VFEPD_Ruined_Mechahybrid_Antenna.label: ancient mechahybrid antenna
LanguageData.VFEPD_Ruined_Mechahybridizer.description: The broken maws of this ancient factory will never be able to close again.
LanguageData.VFEPD_Ruined_Mechahybridizer.label: ancient mechahybridizer
LanguageData.VFEPD_RuinedAberrationRedirector.label: ruined aberration redirector
LanguageData.VFEPD_RuinedAncientBioBattery.descriptio: This ancient tank once converted biological matter into an electrical current. It is now completely broken and useless.
LanguageData.VFEPD_RuinedAncientBioBattery.label: ancient ruined bio-battery tank
LanguageData.VFEPD_RuinedAncientGeneTailoringPod.desc: This ancient structure was once used to inject nanomachines in a subject in an attempt to create the perfect soldier. It now lies rusted and unsalvageable.
LanguageData.VFEPD_RuinedAnimalControlHub.description: It seems that this structure was capable of emitting some kind of electromagnetic radiation used to control brain function of certain animals. This was crude and primitive technology prone to failure and instability, and as such it is completely useless now.
LanguageData.VFEPD_RuinedAnimalControlHub.label: ancient animal control hub
LanguageData.VFEPD_RuinedAnimalEnrichmentCenter.descr: Whatever was held inside this dank, rusted metal coffin has long since escaped. It is damaged beyond all repair.
LanguageData.VFEPD_RuinedAnimalEnrichmentCenter.label: ancient animal enrichment center
LanguageData.VFEPD_RuinedArchitePathingArray.label: ruined archite pathing array
LanguageData.VFEPD_RuinedArchiteRecycler.label: ruined archite recycler
LanguageData.VFEPD_RuinedArchogenInjector.label: ruined archogen injector
LanguageData.VFEPD_RuinedArchotechPlatform.descriptio: This deteriorated platform seems to have been used to assemble some kind of machinery. It now lays bare and empty.
LanguageData.VFEPD_RuinedArchotechPlatform.label: ancient construction platform
LanguageData.VFEPD_RuinedBarrelDouble.description: Whatever this barrel held has long ago evaporated.
LanguageData.VFEPD_RuinedBarrelDouble.label: ancient ruined lab barrels
LanguageData.VFEPD_RuinedCognitiveRecoveryArray.label: ruined cognitive recovery array
LanguageData.VFEPD_RuinedComplexityHarmonizer.label: ruined complexity harmonizer
LanguageData.VFEPD_RuinedGeneDuplicator.description: This semi-spherical vat seems to have held some kind of viscuous liquid inside, as evidenced by the rancid-smelling residue coating its insides. It is now completely ruined and only useful as metal scrap.
LanguageData.VFEPD_RuinedGeneDuplicator.label: ancient gene duplicator
LanguageData.VFEPD_RuinedGenePod.description: An ancient genepod that was used to combine genetic material. This machine is obsolete and damaged beyond repair.
LanguageData.VFEPD_RuinedGenePod.label: ancient ruined genepod
LanguageData.VFEPD_RuinedGeneRecombinator.description: A completely obsolete model of gene recombinator, that is also deteriorated and rusted beyond and salvaging.
LanguageData.VFEPD_RuinedGeneRecombinator.label: ancient gene recombinator
LanguageData.VFEPD_RuinedGeneticDatabase.description: This ancient computer was used to storage genetic information and feed genetic dataprints to other machines, but its components have deteriorated so far that all the data it contained has degraded to nothingness.
LanguageData.VFEPD_RuinedGeneticDatabase.label: ancient genetic database
LanguageData.VFEPD_RuinedGeneticExtractionTable.descr: Yet another workstation that has deteriorated beyond all recovery. A foul-smelling vial of stagnant liquid warns you to keep away from it.
LanguageData.VFEPD_RuinedGeneticExtractionTable.label: ancient genetic extraction table
LanguageData.VFEPD_RuinedGeneticStorage.description: This little wheeled table housed a small specialized computer and refrigerated trays to store genetic material, but it is now so damaged it can only be used as scrap.
LanguageData.VFEPD_RuinedGeneticStorage.label: ancient genetic storage
LanguageData.VFEPD_RuinedGenomeSequencer.description: A large centrifuge used in gene sequencing. Its corroded parts will never be of use to anyone again.
LanguageData.VFEPD_RuinedGenomeSequencer.label: ancient genome sequencer
LanguageData.VFEPD_RuinedGenomicAttenuator.label: ruined genomic attenuator
LanguageData.VFEPD_RuinedHexagelPlant.label: ancient hexagel core reactor
LanguageData.VFEPD_RuinedHospitalBed.description: A bed specially designed for use in hospitals. The mattress has rotted away into nothingness.
LanguageData.VFEPD_RuinedHospitalBed.label: ancient hospital bed
LanguageData.VFEPD_RuinedIncubator.description: This small canister has been smashed to pieces and whatever it contained has long evaporated.
LanguageData.VFEPD_RuinedIncubator.label: ancient ruined incubator
LanguageData.VFEPD_RuinedLabBarrel.description: Whatever this barrel held has long ago evaporated.
LanguageData.VFEPD_RuinedLabBarrel.label: ancient ruined lab barrel
LanguageData.VFEPD_RuinedLabLamp.description: A metallic post with a glass cilinder filled with some bioluminescent compound. It seems to have stopped producing light.
LanguageData.VFEPD_RuinedLabLamp.label: ancient lab lamp
LanguageData.VFEPD_RuinedLabShelf.description: Rusted shelving units coated in grime and dust.
LanguageData.VFEPD_RuinedLabShelf.label: ancient lab shelf
LanguageData.VFEPD_RuinedMechanoidTinkeringTable.desc: This workbench appears to have been used to try and reverse engineer mechanoid components, but it is damaged to the point of uselessness.
LanguageData.VFEPD_RuinedMutagenInhibitorCore.label: ruined mutagen inhibitor core
LanguageData.VFEPD_RuinedMutaniteCentrifuge.descripti: A machine used to process mutagenic minerals, now completely broken and unsalvageable.
LanguageData.VFEPD_RuinedMutaniteCentrifuge.label: ancient mutanite centrifuge
LanguageData.VFEPD_RuinedNeurostabilizerArray.label: ruined neurostabilizer array
LanguageData.VFEPD_RuinedNutrientVat.description: A slurry of liquefied organic pulp filled this reinforced glass vat. It now lays broken and empty.
LanguageData.VFEPD_RuinedNutrientVat.label: ancient nutrient vat
LanguageData.VFEPD_RuinedPulper.description: A weird-looking machine that shredded wood into organic pulp. Broken beyond repair.
LanguageData.VFEPD_RuinedPulper.label: ancient pulper
LanguageData.VFEPD_RuinedPulpRecycler.description: An obsolete, ancient machine that recycled wood, corpses and bones into organic pulp. Broken beyond repair.
LanguageData.VFEPD_RuinedPulpRecycler.label: ancient pulp recycler
LanguageData.VFEPD_RuinedRapidInfusionPump.label: ruined rapid infusion pump
LanguageData.VFEPD_RuinedRefrigeratedCoils.descriptio: These structural cryofuel coils have been completely ruined by time and neglect. They can no longer function.
LanguageData.VFEPD_RuinedRefrigeratedCoils.label: ancient refrigerated coils
LanguageData.VFEPD_RuinedRejectionBufferCoil.label: ruined rejection buffer coil
LanguageData.VFEPD_RuinedSpliceframeUplink.label: ruined spliceframe uplink
LanguageData.VFEPD_RuinedTissueGrowingVat.description: A metal sarcophagus used to grow bio-mechanic implants in a controlled manner. Its machinery has been gutted and has later decayed into rusted scrap.
LanguageData.VFEPD_RuinedTissueGrowingVat.label: ancient tissue growing vat
LanguageData.VFEPD_RuinedTraitSelectionPrism.label: ruined trait selection prism
LanguageData.VFEPD_RuinedVials.description: Small canisters that once held some valuable liquids.
LanguageData.VFEPD_RuinedVials.label: ancient ruined vials
LanguageData.VFEPD_RustedHospitalBed.description: An old-fashioned metal bed frame with a hard mattress and uncomfortable duvet.
LanguageData.VFEPD_RustedHospitalBed.label: rusted hospital bed
LanguageData.VFEPD_RustedWheeledTray.label: rusted wheeled tray
LanguageData.VFEPD_Rye.description: A plant that grows well in much poorer soils than those necessary for most cereal grains. This one is fake.
LanguageData.VFEPD_Rye.label: rye
LanguageData.VFEPD_SaguaroCactus.description: A fake, large cactus native to arid Earth environments. Though it is not a tree, it yields a small amount of fibrous material that can be used like wood.
LanguageData.VFEPD_SaguaroCactus.label: saguaro cactus
LanguageData.VFEPD_Sandpaper.description: A sheet of sandpaper. Intended to be placed over an empty workbench. Just for decorative purposes.
LanguageData.VFEPD_Sandpaper.label: sandpaper
LanguageData.VFEPD_SanguophageMeetingEffect.descripti: This is an effecter prop for "Sanguophage Meeting". Intrinsically laggy, use in moderation.
LanguageData.VFEPD_SanguophageMeetingEffect.label: sanguophage meeting
LanguageData.VFEPD_Saw.description: A small saw. Intended to be placed over an empty workbench. Just for decorative purposes.
LanguageData.VFEPD_Saw.label: saw
LanguageData.VFEPD_ScarabMote.description: This is a fleck prop for "Scarab Mote". Intrinsically laggy, use in moderation.
LanguageData.VFEPD_ScarabMote.label: scarab mote
LanguageData.VFEPD_ScatteredDocuments.description: Don't seem to contain any important information.
LanguageData.VFEPD_ScatteredDocuments.label: scattered documents
LanguageData.VFEPD_ScavengerMoteA.description: This is a mote prop for "Scavenger Mote A". Intrinsically laggy, though less than effecter props. Use in moderation.
LanguageData.VFEPD_ScavengerMoteA.label: scavenger mote
LanguageData.VFEPD_ScavengerMoteB.description: This is a mote prop for "Scavenger Mote B". Intrinsically laggy, though less than effecter props. Use in moderation.
LanguageData.VFEPD_ScavengerMoteB.label: scavenger mote
LanguageData.VFEPD_ScavengerMoteC.description: This is a mote prop for "Scavenger Mote C". Intrinsically laggy, though less than effecter props. Use in moderation.
LanguageData.VFEPD_ScavengerMoteC.label: scavenger mote
LanguageData.VFEPD_Schlumbergera.description: A cultivated succulent with bell-shaped flowers. This one is fake.
LanguageData.VFEPD_Schlumbergera.label: schlumbergera
LanguageData.VFEPD_Scissors.description: A small pair of scissors. Wait, but it's that two of them? Or a single unit? Intended to be placed over an empty workbench. Just for decorative purposes.
LanguageData.VFEPD_Scissors.label: scissors
LanguageData.VFEPD_ScrapChunk.description: A chunk of a scrapped spacecraft. Upon closer inspection it seems to be made of painted cardboard.
LanguageData.VFEPD_ScrapChunk.label: scrap ship chunk
LanguageData.VFEPD_Scraper.description: A small scraper. Intended to be placed over an empty workbench. Just for decorative purposes.
LanguageData.VFEPD_Scraper.label: scraper
LanguageData.VFEPD_Scytheman.description: A juryrigged multiple rocket launcher system, the Scytheman is a repurposed farming vehicle intended to saturate a location with inaccurate volleys of explosives. Non-functional: all its internal wiring and its motor have been removed.
LanguageData.VFEPD_Scytheman.label: Scytheman
LanguageData.VFEPD_SealantPopper.label: sealant popper
LanguageData.VFEPD_SensorPlatform.description: A small platform containing a variety of sensors.
LanguageData.VFEPD_SensorPlatform.label: sensor platform
LanguageData.VFEPD_ServerRack.description: A large server rack, containing multiple hard drives and advanced computer components.
LanguageData.VFEPD_ServerRack.label: server rack
LanguageData.VFEPD_ServerRackAlternate.description: A large server rack, containing multiple hard drives and advanced computer components.
LanguageData.VFEPD_ServerRackAlternate.label: server rack
LanguageData.VFEPD_ServerRackAlternateTwo.description: A large server rack, containing multiple hard drives and advanced computer components.
LanguageData.VFEPD_ServerRackAlternateTwo.label: server rack
LanguageData.VFEPD_SessileMechanoid.description: This thing was once a tree. Mechanoids repurposed its cells into a half-tree, half-mechanoid abomination, serving an unknown purpose. This one is fake.
LanguageData.VFEPD_SessileMechanoid.label: sessile mechanoid tree
LanguageData.VFEPD_SewingMachine.description: A small sewing machine. Intended to be placed over an empty workbench. Just for decorative purposes.
LanguageData.VFEPD_SewingMachine.label: sewing machine
LanguageData.VFEPD_ShamblerRaise.description: This is an effecter prop for "Shambler Raise". Intrinsically laggy, use in moderation.
LanguageData.VFEPD_ShamblerRaise.label: shambler raise
LanguageData.VFEPD_ShieldGenerator.description: A shielding device which projects a momentum repulsor field. Or it would, it it wasn't so fake.
LanguageData.VFEPD_ShieldGenerator.label: fake shield
LanguageData.VFEPD_ShieldGeneratorLow.description: A shielding device which projects a momentum repulsor field. Or it would, it it wasn't so fake.
LanguageData.VFEPD_ShieldGeneratorLow.label: fake low-shield
LanguageData.VFEPD_ShipChunk.description: A chunk of a spacecraft. Upon closer inspection it seems to be made of painted cardboard.
LanguageData.VFEPD_ShipChunk.label: ship chunk
LanguageData.VFEPD_ShipChunk_Mech.description: A chunk of mechanoid spacecraft made of steel and gravlite panels. It seems to have been torn off either by uncontrolled re-entry forces or some kind of weapon.
LanguageData.VFEPD_ShipChunk_Mech.label: mechanoid ship chunk
LanguageData.VFEPD_ShipLandingBeacon.description: Marks the corner of a landing area. Shuttles will ignore this one as it is inactive.
LanguageData.VFEPD_ShipLandingBeacon.label: landing beacon
LanguageData.VFEPD_ShipPart.description: An ancient ship part. Upon closer inspection it seems to be made of painted cardboard.
LanguageData.VFEPD_ShipPart.label: ship part
LanguageData.VFEPD_ShipPart_AdvancedHoloEmitter.descr: A decorative advanced holo emitter for a spaceship. This piece will connect to base game spaceships.

LanguageData.VFEPD_ShipPartDefoliator.description: An ancient ship part. Upon closer inspection it seems to be made of painted cardboard.

LanguageData.VFEPD_Shovel.label: shovel
LanguageData.VFEPD_ShrubLow.description: Various fake low broadleaf shrubs. These grow in clusters and slow down movement.
LanguageData.VFEPD_ShrubLow.label: low shrubs
LanguageData.VFEPD_Shuttle.label: shuttle
LanguageData.VFEPD_Shuttle_HeavyCargo.description: A large, multi-personel heavy cargo shuttle currently out of service.
LanguageData.VFEPD_Shuttle_HeavyCargo.label: heavy cargo shuttle
LanguageData.VFEPD_ShuttleCrashed.label: crashed shuttle
LanguageData.VFEPD_SiegePodWreck.description: An ancient, destroyed siege pod. Everything that isn't rusted away was looted long ago.
LanguageData.VFEPD_SiegePodWreck.label: siege pod wreck
LanguageData.VFEPD_SignA.description: A weathered sign advertising a company that has long been forgotten.
LanguageData.VFEPD_SignA.label: ancient sign
LanguageData.VFEPD_SignalJammer_Prop.description: A signal emitter that disguises the electromagnetic signature of your gravship. This emitter seems completely inert.
LanguageData.VFEPD_SignalJammer_Prop.label: signal jammer

LanguageData.VFEPD_SilverATM.label: silver ATM
LanguageData.VFEPD_SilverBookshelf.description: A bookshelf containing a variety of unreadable tomes and publications.
LanguageData.VFEPD_SilverBookshelf.label: silver bookshelf
LanguageData.VFEPD_SilverCupboard.label: silver cupboard
LanguageData.VFEPD_SilverCupboardDouble.label: silver double cupboard
