LanguageData.VFEPD_SilverVendingMachine.label: silver vending machine
LanguageData.VFEPD_SimulationDrive.description: A compact supercomputer. Made of cardboard.
LanguageData.VFEPD_SimulationDrive.label: simulation drive
LanguageData.VFEPD_SingleBeaker.description: A small beaker. Intended to be placed over an empty workbench. Just for decorative purposes.
LanguageData.VFEPD_SingleBeaker.label: single beaker
LanguageData.VFEPD_SingleDisplay.description: A small dashboard with a single display screen, for up-to-date information on all mod releases.
LanguageData.VFEPD_SingleDisplay.label: single display dashboard
LanguageData.VFEPD_Sink.description: Drinking from this will give you more than just a few rads...
LanguageData.VFEPD_Sink.label: ancient sink
LanguageData.VFEPD_SkipBlack.description: A light-weight, out-of-service skip, allowing users to travel comfortably for a short distance.
LanguageData.VFEPD_SkipBlack.label: black skip
LanguageData.VFEPD_SkipBlue.description: A light-weight, out-of-service skip, allowing users to travel comfortably for a short distance.
LanguageData.VFEPD_SkipBlue.label: blue skip
LanguageData.VFEPD_SkipRed.description: A light-weight, out-of-service skip, allowing users to travel comfortably for a short distance.
LanguageData.VFEPD_SkipRed.label: red skip
LanguageData.VFEPD_SkipSilver.description: A light-weight, out-of-service skip, allowing users to travel comfortably for a short distance.
LanguageData.VFEPD_SkipSilver.label: silver skip
LanguageData.VFEPD_SkipWhite.description: A light-weight, out-of-service skip, allowing users to travel comfortably for a short distance.
LanguageData.VFEPD_SkipWhite.label: white skip
LanguageData.VFEPD_Skull.description: Arrrr, matey, this here be a mote prop for "Skull". Shiver me timber, this be intrinsically laggy, me lad, though less than effecter props. Use in moderation, ye scurvy sea dog.
LanguageData.VFEPD_Skull.label: skull
LanguageData.VFEPD_SleepAcceleratorActiveEffect.descr: This is an effecter prop for "Sleep Accelerator Active". Intrinsically laggy, use in moderation.
LanguageData.VFEPD_SleepAcceleratorActiveEffect.label: sleep accelerator
LanguageData.VFEPD_Slimecasia.description: Although at first sight this seems to be an independent plant, its roots are intricately interconnected with the rest of the gelatinous superorganism. This one is fake.
LanguageData.VFEPD_Slimecasia.label: slimecasia
LanguageData.VFEPD_SlimyFern.description: Although at first sight this seems to be an independent plant, its roots are intricately interconnected with the rest of the gelatinous superorganism. This one is fake.
LanguageData.VFEPD_SlimyFern.label: slimy fern
LanguageData.VFEPD_SlimyPholiota.description: A blueish-pink mushroom, secreting a slimy substance that attracts insects. This one is fake.
LanguageData.VFEPD_SlimyPholiota.label: slimy pholiota
LanguageData.VFEPD_SlimyTree.description: This tree doesn't seem to be entirely solid. Upon further examination, it isn't an independent entity, its roots fusing seamlessly with the hardened gelatinous ground. This one is fake.
LanguageData.VFEPD_SlimyTree.label: slimy tree
LanguageData.VFEPD_Sloop.description: A single-masted sailing vessel with a fore-and-aft rig, typically equipped with a mainsail and one or more headsails. Sleek and agile, sloops are versatile vessels used for various purposes such as racing, cruising, fishing, and coastal patrols. Non-functional: all its internal mechanisms have been removed. Intended to be placed over water. Or wherever you want, I'm not your mom!
LanguageData.VFEPD_Sloop.label: Sloop
LanguageData.VFEPD_SmallAlembic.description: A small alembic. Intended to be placed over an empty workbench. Just for decorative purposes.
LanguageData.VFEPD_SmallAlembic.label: small alembic
LanguageData.VFEPD_SmallBioLight.description: A metallic capsule filled with some bioluminescent compound. Seems to be non-functional.
LanguageData.VFEPD_SmallBioLight.label: ancient bioluminescent light
LanguageData.VFEPD_SmallDisplayTable.description: A small sized display screen mounted on a tiny table.
LanguageData.VFEPD_SmallDisplayTable.label: small display table
LanguageData.VFEPD_SmallExhaust.description: A small exhaust port for the fumes of industrialism.
LanguageData.VFEPD_SmallExhaust.label: small exhaust
LanguageData.VFEPD_SmallKnife.description: A small knife. Intended to be placed over an empty workbench. Just for decorative purposes.
LanguageData.VFEPD_SmallKnife.label: small knife
LanguageData.VFEPD_SmallPlanningTable.description: A small sized planning screen mounted on a tiny table.
LanguageData.VFEPD_SmallPlanningTable.label: small planning table
LanguageData.VFEPD_SmallPyramid.description: A gigantic stone structure whose outer surfaces are triangular and converge to a single step at the top.
LanguageData.VFEPD_SmallPyramid.label: pyramid
LanguageData.VFEPD_SmallScreen.description: A small computer screen. Intended to be placed over an empty workbench. Just for decorative purposes.
LanguageData.VFEPD_SmallScreen.label: small screen
LanguageData.VFEPD_SmallThruster_Prop.description: A chemfuel thruster that increases the range of a gravship. This thruster seems completely inert.
LanguageData.VFEPD_SmallThruster_Prop.label: small thruster
LanguageData.VFEPD_SmallVent.description: A small vent. Intended to be placed over an empty workbench. Just for decorative purposes.
LanguageData.VFEPD_SmallVent.label: small vent
LanguageData.VFEPD_SmallWrench.description: A small wrench. Intended to be placed over an empty workbench. Just for decorative purposes.
LanguageData.VFEPD_SmallWrench.label: small wrench
LanguageData.VFEPD_Smelter.description: A small smelter. Intended to be placed over an empty workbench. Just for decorative purposes.
LanguageData.VFEPD_Smelter.label: smelter
LanguageData.VFEPD_SmelterExhaust.description: A small smelter exhaust. Intended to be placed over an empty workbench. Just for decorative purposes.
LanguageData.VFEPD_SmelterExhaust.label: smelter exhaust
LanguageData.VFEPD_SmelterGizmo.description: A small smelter gizmo. God knows what this does. Intended to be placed over an empty workbench. Just for decorative purposes.
LanguageData.VFEPD_SmelterGizmo.label: smelter gizmo
LanguageData.VFEPD_SmelterHeater.description: A small smelter heater. Intended to be placed over an empty workbench. Just for decorative purposes.
LanguageData.VFEPD_SmelterHeater.label: smelter heater
LanguageData.VFEPD_Smoke_JointEffect.description: This is an effecter prop for "Smoke". Intrinsically laggy, use in moderation.
LanguageData.VFEPD_Smoke_JointEffect.label: smoke
LanguageData.VFEPD_Smokeleaf.description: A fake leafy crop grown for the psychological effects of chemicals in its leaves. Smokeleaf leaves can be prepared into joints at the crafting spot. Smokeleaf makes a user feel relaxed, but reduces motivation, and can be addictive.
LanguageData.VFEPD_Smokeleaf.label: smokeleaf plant
LanguageData.VFEPD_SmokeSpewer.description: An ultratech weapon of mass destruction designed for area denial. By harvesting available compounds and converting them into self-reproducing opaque molecules, it can spew enough smoke to block the sun in a whole region of the planet. Looking inside, you'll discover it's actually a cardboard cutout without any relevant machinery.
LanguageData.VFEPD_SmokeSpewer.label: smoke spewer
LanguageData.VFEPD_Smuggler.description: A general-purpose aircraft, the Smuggler is an extremely fast and effective mode of transportation. Non-functional: all its internal wiring and its motor have been removed.
LanguageData.VFEPD_Smuggler.label: Smuggler
LanguageData.VFEPD_SnakePlant.description: A cultivated succulent with stiff, green banded leaves with a yellow border. This one is fake.
LanguageData.VFEPD_SnakePlant.label: snake plant
LanguageData.VFEPD_Snatcher.description: A general passenger transport, the Snatcher is a solid vehicle for transporting people to different locations. Non-functional: all its internal wiring and its motor have been removed.
LanguageData.VFEPD_Snatcher.label: Snatcher
LanguageData.VFEPD_Sorghum.description: A drought resistant cereal used for food, animal fodder, the production of alcoholic beverages, and biofuels. This one is fake.
LanguageData.VFEPD_Sorghum.label: sorghum
LanguageData.VFEPD_SowEffect.description: This is an effecter prop for "Sow". Intrinsically laggy, use in moderation.
LanguageData.VFEPD_SowEffect.label: sow
LanguageData.VFEPD_SoyFermenter.description: A soy fermenter is a cilindrical, metallic drum where soybeans are pressed, mixed with aspergillus bacteria and grain, and aged for long time periods. This one is inactive and non-functional.
LanguageData.VFEPD_SoyFermenter.label: soy sauce fermenter
LanguageData.VFEPD_SpaceDrone.label: space drone
LanguageData.VFEPD_SpaceHive.description: A decorative space hive. Won't produce any insects.
LanguageData.VFEPD_SpaceHive.label: space hive
LanguageData.VFEPD_SpaceJunk.description: Ancient chunks of space junk that fell from orbit. Perhaps a relic of an ancient space battle.
LanguageData.VFEPD_SpaceJunk.label: space junk
LanguageData.VFEPD_SpacerContainer.description: A medium sized, triple sealed, password protected box.
LanguageData.VFEPD_SpacerContainer.label: spacer container
LanguageData.VFEPD_SpacerContainerLarge.description: A large sized, triple sealed, password protected box.
LanguageData.VFEPD_SpacerContainerLarge.label: spacer container large
LanguageData.VFEPD_SpacerContainerStack.description: A large stack of different sized, triple sealed, password protected boxes.
LanguageData.VFEPD_SpacerContainerStack.label: spacer container stack
LanguageData.VFEPD_SpacerShuttle.description: A light-weight, out-of-service shuttle, allowing users to travel comfortably for a short distance.
LanguageData.VFEPD_SpacerShuttle.label: shuttle
LanguageData.VFEPD_SpacerStorage.description: A large, multi-chamber advanced storage device.
LanguageData.VFEPD_SpacerStorage.label: advanced storage device
LanguageData.VFEPD_Sphinx.description: A truly colossal statue of a sphinx, a mythical creature with the head of a human, and the body of a lion.
LanguageData.VFEPD_Sphinx.label: sphinx
LanguageData.VFEPD_Spices.description: A wide assortment of different spices
LanguageData.VFEPD_Spices.label: spices
LanguageData.VFEPD_SpinningWheel.description: A small spinning wheel. Intended to be placed over an empty workbench. Just for decorative purposes.
LanguageData.VFEPD_SpinningWheel.label: spinning wheel
LanguageData.VFEPD_SplicefiendContainment.label: splicefiend containment
LanguageData.VFEPD_SpliceframeUplink.description: An old and inactive spliceframe uplink.
LanguageData.VFEPD_SpliceframeUplink.label: spliceframe uplink
LanguageData.VFEPD_SplicehulkContainment.label: splicehulk containment
LanguageData.VFEPD_SplicelingContainment.label: spliceling containment
LanguageData.VFEPD_SplicetootsContainment.label: splicetoots containment
LanguageData.VFEPD_Springbok.description: A general all-rounder vehicle, the Springbok performs well in all categories with a good cargo and passenger capacity. Non-functional: all its internal wiring and its motor have been removed.
LanguageData.VFEPD_Springbok.label: Springbok
LanguageData.VFEPD_Star.description: This is a mote prop for "Star". Intrinsically laggy, though less than effecter props. Use in moderation.
LanguageData.VFEPD_Star.label: star
LanguageData.VFEPD_StaticPod.description: A medium-sized hive structure capable of generating small amounts of electricity, produced by giant insects. Non-functional.
LanguageData.VFEPD_StaticPod.label: staticpod
LanguageData.VFEPD_Statue.description: This is a mote prop for "Statue". Intrinsically laggy, though less than effecter props. Use in moderation.
LanguageData.VFEPD_Statue.label: statue
LanguageData.VFEPD_SteelATM.description: A non-functional steel money dispensing machine.
LanguageData.VFEPD_SteelATM.label: steel ATM
LanguageData.VFEPD_SteelBookshelf.description: A bookshelf containing a variety of unreadable tomes and publications.
LanguageData.VFEPD_SteelBookshelf.label: steel bookshelf
LanguageData.VFEPD_SteelCupboard.label: steel cupboard
LanguageData.VFEPD_SteelCupboardDouble.label: steel double cupboard
LanguageData.VFEPD_SteelCupboardNarrow.label: steel narrow cupboard
LanguageData.VFEPD_SteelCupboardPlates.description: A large cupboard with some plates.
LanguageData.VFEPD_SteelCupboardPlates.label: steel cupboard with plates
LanguageData.VFEPD_SteelDivider.label: steel divider
LanguageData.VFEPD_SteelMirror.label: steel mirror
LanguageData.VFEPD_SteelPlankDivider.label: steel plank divider
LanguageData.VFEPD_SteelShortCupboard.label: steel short cupboard
LanguageData.VFEPD_SteelShortCupboardPlates.label: steel short cupboard with plates
LanguageData.VFEPD_SteelTallCabinet.label: steel tall cabinet
LanguageData.VFEPD_SteelTank.label: large steel tank
LanguageData.VFEPD_SteelVendingMachine.label: steel vending machine
LanguageData.VFEPD_StewPot.description: A wood-fired stove with a top side perfectly indented for a large pot. This one is inactive and non-functional.
LanguageData.VFEPD_StewPot.label: stew pot
LanguageData.VFEPD_Stinker.description: A small, fast-growing mushroom that forms large patches. It produces rotstink through a chemical process. This one is fake.
LanguageData.VFEPD_Stinker.label: stinker
LanguageData.VFEPD_StoneGrinder.description: A small stone grinder. Intended to be placed over an empty workbench. Just for decorative purposes.
LanguageData.VFEPD_StoneGrinder.label: stone grinder
LanguageData.VFEPD_Stonks.description: This is a fleck prop for "Stonks". Intrinsically laggy, use in moderation.
LanguageData.VFEPD_Stonks.label: stonks
LanguageData.VFEPD_StorageShelf_Empty.description: An empty, wobbly storage shelf. Anything of value is long gone.
LanguageData.VFEPD_StorageShelf_Empty.label: empty storage shelf
LanguageData.VFEPD_StorageShelf_Gowns.description: A wobbly storage shelf with stacks of fake patient gowns.
LanguageData.VFEPD_StorageShelf_Gowns.label: patient gowns shelf
LanguageData.VFEPD_StorageShelf_Meals.description: A wobbly storage shelf containing fake packaged survival meals.
LanguageData.VFEPD_StorageShelf_Meals.label: survival meals shelf
LanguageData.VFEPD_StorageShelf_Medicine.description: A wobbly storage shelf containing fake medicine.
LanguageData.VFEPD_StorageShelf_Medicine.label: medicine shelf
LanguageData.VFEPD_StorageShelf_Neutroamine.descripti: A wobbly storage shelf containing fake bottles of neutroamine.
LanguageData.VFEPD_StorageShelf_Neutroamine.label: neutroamine shelf
LanguageData.VFEPD_Strawberry.description: A fake, low bush-like plant that yields fragile but delicious strawberries. While it isn't quite as productive calorie-for-calorie as other crops, strawberries are delicious even when raw.
LanguageData.VFEPD_Strawberry.label: strawberry plant
LanguageData.VFEPD_Sugarcane.description: A fake, thick, tall, tropical grass with jointed stems. While not exactly the most nutritious thing to eat on its own, this genetically modified sugarcane is easily milled into sugar and then used for a variety of culinary creations - Particularly desserts.
LanguageData.VFEPD_Sugarcane.label: sugarcane
LanguageData.VFEPD_SugarFamewort.description: The sugar famewort grows in areas with a high concentration of pollinating insects. It generates a sweet nectar that attracts these insects, and they disperse its pollen when they feed on it. This one is fake.
LanguageData.VFEPD_SugarFamewort.label: sugar famewort
LanguageData.VFEPD_SunBlocker.description: An ultratech machine that generates a sheet of exotic fields at high altitude, turning the sky opaque and blocking the sun. Looking inside, you'll discover it's actually a cardboard cutout without any relevant machinery.
LanguageData.VFEPD_SunBlocker.label: sun blocker
LanguageData.VFEPD_Sunflower.description: A large crop used for its edible oil and edible fruits. This one is fake.
LanguageData.VFEPD_Sunflower.label: sunflower
LanguageData.VFEPD_SupercarWreck.description: An ancient, broken supercar. Everything that isn't rusted away was looted long ago.
LanguageData.VFEPD_SupercarWreck.label: supercar wreck
LanguageData.VFEPD_Superpod.description: A large, out-of-service, multi use drop pod.
LanguageData.VFEPD_Superpod.label: superpod
LanguageData.VFEPD_SupplyCrate.description: A small imperial crate containing valuables. Sealed shut.
LanguageData.VFEPD_SupplyCrate.label: supply crate
LanguageData.VFEPD_SurgeryEffect.description: This is an effecter prop for "Surgery". Intrinsically laggy, use in moderation.
LanguageData.VFEPD_SurgeryEffect.label: surgery
LanguageData.VFEPD_SurveillanceDisplayBank.descriptio: An imperial computer interface. This one is disconnected from the grid.
LanguageData.VFEPD_SurveillanceDisplayBank.label: surveillance display bank
LanguageData.VFEPD_SurveillancePillar.description: A large pillar with a series of sensors, cameras and motion detectors. Seems to be inactive.
LanguageData.VFEPD_SurveillancePillar.label: surveillance pillar
LanguageData.VFEPD_SurveillanceStation.description: A large console designed to link to surrounding surveillance pillars. This one is disconnected from the grid.
LanguageData.VFEPD_SurveillanceStation.label: surveillance console
LanguageData.VFEPD_SurveyScanner.description: A wideband sensor unit that can detect and map various features in a local area.
LanguageData.VFEPD_SurveyScanner.label: surveying scanner
LanguageData.VFEPD_SurvivalNutrientPackCrateA.descrip: Fake boxes of survival nutrient paste packs stacked in a crate.
LanguageData.VFEPD_SurvivalNutrientPackCrateA.label: survival nutrient pack crate
LanguageData.VFEPD_SurvivalNutrientPackCrateB.descrip: Fake boxes of survival nutrient paste packs stacked in a crate.
LanguageData.VFEPD_SurvivalNutrientPackCrateB.label: survival nutrient pack crate
LanguageData.VFEPD_SushiPrepTable.description: A working table to cut, slice and prepare all kinds of sushi.
LanguageData.VFEPD_SushiPrepTable.label: sushi prep table
LanguageData.VFEPD_SwderptikaMote.description: This is a mote prop for "Swderptika". Intrinsically laggy, though less than effecter props. Use in moderation. Punch a nazi.
LanguageData.VFEPD_SwderptikaMote.label: swderptika
LanguageData.VFEPD_SweetheartPlant.description: A cultivated succulent with heart-shaped leaves on a tall stem. This one is fake.
LanguageData.VFEPD_SweetheartPlant.label: sweetheart
LanguageData.VFEPD_SweetPotato.description: A tuberous edible plant also called manioc, mandioca, or yuca. This one is fake.
LanguageData.VFEPD_SweetPotato.label: sweet potato
LanguageData.VFEPD_SwitchPanel.description: A medium sized panel containing varius levers and switches.
LanguageData.VFEPD_SwitchPanel.label: switch panel
LanguageData.VFEPD_TachycardiacArrest.description: This is an effecter prop for "Tachycardiac Arrest". Intrinsically laggy, use in moderation.
LanguageData.VFEPD_TachycardiacArrest.label: tachycardiac arrest
LanguageData.VFEPD_TallSlimyGrass.description: Wild tall grass. Slows down anyone moving over it. This one is fake.
LanguageData.VFEPD_TallSlimyGrass.label: tall slimy grass
LanguageData.VFEPD_TangleTea.description: This strange plant seems to be of alien origins. It doesn't seem to be fit for human consumption. This one is fake.
LanguageData.VFEPD_TangleTea.label: tangle tea
LanguageData.VFEPD_Tango.description: A general purpose armoured personnel carrier, the Tango is a slow but hardy troop transport. Non-functional: all its internal wiring and its motor have been removed.
LanguageData.VFEPD_Tango.label: Tango
LanguageData.VFEPD_TanningRack.description: A tanning rack with a pelt mounted on it.
LanguageData.VFEPD_TanningRack.label: tanning rack
LanguageData.VFEPD_Taro.description: A tropical plant grown primarily for its edible corm, a root vegetable. This one is fake. Intended to be placed over water. Or wherever you want, I'm not your mom!
LanguageData.VFEPD_Taro.label: taro
LanguageData.VFEPD_TeakTree.description: A fake, exceptionally strong hardwood tree that grows in warm climates. Because teak wood is so durable and water-resistant, it was used to form the keel of wooden sailing ships in ancient times.
LanguageData.VFEPD_TeakTree.label: teak tree
LanguageData.VFEPD_TechiteDiscStack.description: A compact stack of discs crafted from the enigmatic element known as techite, produced exclusively by the Empire for knowledge transcribing. These are all blank.
LanguageData.VFEPD_TechiteDiscStack.label: techite disc stack
LanguageData.VFEPD_Techprinter.description: The Techprinter is a marvel of technological innovation, designed to capture and preserve the intricate knowledge residing within a techfriar’s mind. This one is disconnected from the grid.
LanguageData.VFEPD_Techprinter.label: techprinter
LanguageData.VFEPD_TendrilFarm.description: A pillar that slowly grows clusters of insectoid tendrilmoss.
LanguageData.VFEPD_TendrilFarm.label: tendril farm
LanguageData.VFEPD_Tent.description: A small, personal tent no larger than a single person bed. Purely decorative.
LanguageData.VFEPD_Tent.label: tent
LanguageData.VFEPD_Tentacle.description: This is a fleck prop for "Tentacle". Intrinsically laggy, use in moderation.
LanguageData.VFEPD_Tentacle.label: tentacle
LanguageData.VFEPD_TentacleThree.description: This is a fleck prop for "Tentacle". Intrinsically laggy, use in moderation.
LanguageData.VFEPD_TentacleThree.label: tentacle
LanguageData.VFEPD_TentacleTwo.description: This is a fleck prop for "Tentacle". Intrinsically laggy, use in moderation.
LanguageData.VFEPD_TentacleTwo.label: tentacle
LanguageData.VFEPD_TentacularPlant.description: This plant is completely alien. The blue nodules at the end of each branch / tentacle produce an eerie rattling sound from time to time. This one is fake.
LanguageData.VFEPD_TentacularPlant.label: tentacular aberration
LanguageData.VFEPD_TequilaBarrel.description: A small still and fermenter combo unit. This one is empty and non-functional.
LanguageData.VFEPD_TequilaBarrel.label: tequila barrel
LanguageData.VFEPD_TextilesCardboardBox.description: A small textiles box. Intended to be placed over an empty workbench. Just for decorative purposes.
LanguageData.VFEPD_TextilesCardboardBox.label: textiles box
LanguageData.VFEPD_TheatreStage.description: A lightly decorated wooden stage meant to provide area for props and actors both to create compelling scenes. Purely decorative.
LanguageData.VFEPD_TheatreStage.label: theatre stage
LanguageData.VFEPD_Thermaebath.description: A very large, heated stone bath meant to be shared by several patrons. This one isn't heated.
LanguageData.VFEPD_Thermaebath.label: thermaebath
LanguageData.VFEPD_Thermoregulus.description: A large, bulbous, beige mushroom that is known to produce small amounts of electricity as it grows. This one is fake.
LanguageData.VFEPD_Thermoregulus.label: thermoregulus
LanguageData.VFEPD_Thornpod.description: A volatile pod covered in sharp chitin thorns, produced by giant insects. Non-functional: all its internal mechanisms have been removed.
LanguageData.VFEPD_Thornpod.label: thornpod
LanguageData.VFEPD_Timbercap_VE.description: A short, brown mushroom with a hard stem. This one is fake.
LanguageData.VFEPD_Timbercap_VE.label: timbercap
LanguageData.VFEPD_Timbershroom.description: A fake tall brown mushroom with a long stem.
LanguageData.VFEPD_Timbershroom.label: timbershroom
LanguageData.VFEPD_Tinctoria.description: A fake genetically-engineered flower-like crop which secretes a self-altering dye.
LanguageData.VFEPD_Tinctoria.label: tinctoria
LanguageData.VFEPD_Tinctshroom.description: A genetically-engineered mushroom which secretes a self-altering dye. This one is fake.
LanguageData.VFEPD_Tinctshroom.label: tinctshroom
LanguageData.VFEPD_TinkleGrass.description: Wild grass. Grows anywhere there is a little light and minimally fertile ground. This one is fake.
LanguageData.VFEPD_TinkleGrass.label: tinkle grass
LanguageData.VFEPD_TinyVent.description: A small vent. Intended to be placed over an empty workbench. Just for decorative purposes.
LanguageData.VFEPD_TinyVent.label: vent
LanguageData.VFEPD_Toad.description: A squad and mortar deployment pod, the Toad is a somewhat expensive vehicle to quickly mount a siege on a nearby locale without exposing your gunners to danger. Non-functional: all its internal wiring and its motor have been removed.
LanguageData.VFEPD_Toad.label: Toad
LanguageData.VFEPD_Toilet.description: Drinking from this will give you more than just a few rads...
LanguageData.VFEPD_Toilet.label: ancient toilet
LanguageData.VFEPD_Tomato.description: A series of juicy, glossy red fruits attached by vine, used commonly as a vegetable. These ones are fake.
LanguageData.VFEPD_Tomato.label: tomato
LanguageData.VFEPD_Tongs.description: A small tongs. Intended to be placed over an empty workbench. Just for decorative purposes.
LanguageData.VFEPD_Tongs.label: tongs
LanguageData.VFEPD_Tools.description: A tools tray. Intended to be placed over an empty workbench. Just for decorative purposes.
LanguageData.VFEPD_Tools.label: tools
LanguageData.VFEPD_ToolsBoard.description: A tools tray. Intended to be placed over an empty workbench. Just for decorative purposes.
LanguageData.VFEPD_ToolsBoard.label: tools tray
LanguageData.VFEPD_Torii.description: This is a fleck prop for "Torii". Intrinsically laggy, use in moderation.
LanguageData.VFEPD_Torii.label: torii
LanguageData.VFEPD_ToxiBulb.description: This slimy bulb seems to be feeding on the polluted terrain like a parasite. This one is fake.
LanguageData.VFEPD_ToxiBulb.label: toxibulb
LanguageData.VFEPD_ToxicGamma.description: A huge bioluminescent globular plant. Can be used as a natural sunlamp to grow regular plants, though the toxic environment it grows at might not be the best for cultivation. This one is fake.
LanguageData.VFEPD_ToxicGamma.label: toxic gamma
LanguageData.VFEPD_ToxicSpewer.description: An ultratech weapon of mass destruction designed for area denial. This device harvests available compounds and converts them into self-reproducing poisons. By spewing these into the atmosphere, it can poison a whole region of the planet. Looking inside, you'll discover it's actually a cardboard cutout without any relevant machinery.
LanguageData.VFEPD_ToxicSpewer.label: toxic spewer
LanguageData.VFEPD_ToxicWasteBarrel.description: A small barrel of toxic waste.
LanguageData.VFEPD_ToxicWasteBarrel.label: toxic waste barrel
LanguageData.VFEPD_ToxiGrass.description: Wild grass. Grows anywhere there is a little light and minimally fertile ground. This one is fake.
LanguageData.VFEPD_ToxiGrass.label: toxi grass
LanguageData.VFEPD_ToxiPotato.description: A fake genetically-engineered variant of potato adapted for growing in polluted areas.
LanguageData.VFEPD_ToxiPotato.label: toxipotato plant
LanguageData.VFEPD_TradingConfetti.description: This is an effecter prop for "Trading Confetti". Intrinsically laggy, use in moderation.
LanguageData.VFEPD_TradingConfetti.label: trading confetti
LanguageData.VFEPD_TradingStandard.description: This is a mote prop for "Trading Standard". Intrinsically laggy, though less than effecter props. Use in moderation.
LanguageData.VFEPD_TradingStandard.label: trading standard
LanguageData.VFEPD_TraitSelectionPrism.description: An old and inactive trait selection prism.
LanguageData.VFEPD_TraitSelectionPrism.label: trait selection prism
LanguageData.VFEPD_Traveller.description: A basic road vehicle suited for flat terrain, the Traveller is a relatively cheap and fast option that still performs quite amicably in cold weather and snowy conditions. Non-functional: all its internal wiring and its motor have been removed.
LanguageData.VFEPD_Traveller.label: Traveller
LanguageData.VFEPD_Trawler.description: A general-purpose boat, the Trawler is an effective long distance transportation across open waters. Non-functional: all its internal wiring and its motor have been removed.
LanguageData.VFEPD_Trawler.label: Trawler
LanguageData.VFEPD_TreeAlmond.description: A deciduous tree cultivated for its fruit, almonds. The sweet almond can be eaten plain or be used as ingredient in desserts and confectioneries. This one is fake.
LanguageData.VFEPD_TreeAlmond.label: almond tree
LanguageData.VFEPD_TreeAvocado.description: An evergreen tree with thick, leathery leaves that produces perfect white, ivory to yellow flowers. This one is fake.
LanguageData.VFEPD_TreeAvocado.label: avocado tree
LanguageData.VFEPD_TreeBonsai.description: A fake tree, pruned and shaped to look visually pleasing.
LanguageData.VFEPD_TreeBonsai.label: bonsai tree
LanguageData.VFEPD_TreeCocoa.description: A fake tropical tree that produces chocolate, genetically engineered to sweeten its own product, and survive in slightly less-warm climates.
LanguageData.VFEPD_TreeCocoa.label: cocoa tree
LanguageData.VFEPD_TreeGrayPine.description: A fake small toxin-adapted tree with twisted branches.
LanguageData.VFEPD_TreeGrayPine.label: gray pine tree
LanguageData.VFEPD_TreeMango.description: A deciduous tree cultivated for its fruit, almonds. The sweet almond can be eaten plain or be used as ingredient in desserts and confectioneries. This one is fake.
LanguageData.VFEPD_TreeMango.label: mango tree
LanguageData.VFEPD_TreeOlive.description: A subtropical broad-leaved evergreen tree. Its leaves, leathery and lance-shaped, are dark green above and silvery on the underside and are paired opposite each other on the twig. This one is fake.
LanguageData.VFEPD_TreeOlive.label: olive tree
LanguageData.VFEPD_TripleDisplay.description: A large dashboard with several display screens, for up-to-date information on all mod releases.
LanguageData.VFEPD_TripleDisplay.label: triple display dashboard
LanguageData.VFEPD_TruckWreck.description: An ancient, broken truck. Everything that isn't rusted away was looted long ago.
LanguageData.VFEPD_TruckWreck.label: truck wreck
LanguageData.VFEPD_TunnelBoringMachine.description: The gigantic husk of a boring machine. Non-functional now.
LanguageData.VFEPD_TunnelBoringMachine.label: tunnel boring machine
LanguageData.VFEPD_TunnelStructuralSupport_a.descript: A piece of tunnel support frame used to support tunnels during construction. Non-functional now.
LanguageData.VFEPD_TunnelStructuralSupport_a.label: structural support
LanguageData.VFEPD_TunnelStructuralSupport_b.descript: A piece of tunnel support frame used to support tunnels during construction. Non-functional now.
LanguageData.VFEPD_TunnelStructuralSupport_b.label: structural support
LanguageData.VFEPD_TwistedFlesh.label: twisted flesh
LanguageData.VFEPD_Udar.description: A dedicated artillery unit, the Udar is a long-range siege weapon that can be operated by a two-man crew for faster loading speeds. Non-functional: all its internal wiring and its motor have been removed.
LanguageData.VFEPD_Udar.label: Udar
LanguageData.VFEPD_UnfinishedCloth.description: Scraps of unfinished cloth. Intended to be placed over an empty workbench. Just for decorative purposes.
LanguageData.VFEPD_UnfinishedCloth.label: unfinished cloth
LanguageData.VFEPD_UnstablePowerCell.description: A fake mechanoid power generation unit. It won't output any power.
LanguageData.VFEPD_UnstablePowerCell.label: fake power cell
LanguageData.VFEPD_Urn.label: urn
LanguageData.VFEPD_Vat_BubblesEffect.description: This is an effecter prop for "Vat Bubbles". Intrinsically laggy, use in moderation.
LanguageData.VFEPD_Vat_BubblesEffect.label: vat bubbles
LanguageData.VFEPD_VaultRamp.description: A heavily reinforced vehicle ramp with personnel access stairway going down the middle. Upon closer inspection, it turns out to be just cardboard.
LanguageData.VFEPD_VaultRamp.label: vault ramp
LanguageData.VFEPD_VaultTerminal.label: vault terminal
LanguageData.VFEPD_VaultTerminalBank.label: vault terminal bank
LanguageData.VFEPD_VentilationShaft.description: An exhaust to a ventilation system.
LanguageData.VFEPD_VentilationShaft.label: ventilation shaft
LanguageData.VFEPD_VFEI2_ArtificialBasicHive.descript: An artificially constructed hive of giant insects. Non-functional: all its internal mechanisms have been removed.
LanguageData.VFEPD_VFEI2_ArtificialBasicHive.label: fake basic hive
LanguageData.VFEPD_VFEI2_ChelisHive.description: A hive of giant insects of the Chelis geneline. Non-functional: all its internal mechanisms have been removed.
LanguageData.VFEPD_VFEI2_ChelisHive.label: fake chelis hive
LanguageData.VFEPD_VFEI2_InfestedShipModule.descripti: A mysterious segment of a long destroyed spaceship.
LanguageData.VFEPD_VFEI2_InfestedShipModule.label: infested ship module
LanguageData.VFEPD_VFEI2_InfestedShipPart.description: An ancient ship part, torn off of a craft of unknown origin.
LanguageData.VFEPD_VFEI2_InfestedShipPart.label: infested ship part
LanguageData.VFEPD_VFEI2_InsectoidCocoon.description: These jelly cocoons keep swarmlings safe from fire, extreme temperatures, and other threats while they undergo a metamorphosis process. Non-functional: all its internal mechanisms have been removed.
LanguageData.VFEPD_VFEI2_InsectoidCocoon.label: insectoid cocoon
LanguageData.VFEPD_VFEI2_KemianHive.description: A hive of giant insects of the Kemian geneline. Non-functional: all its internal mechanisms have been removed.
LanguageData.VFEPD_VFEI2_KemianHive.label: fake kemian hive
LanguageData.VFEPD_VFEI2_LargeBurrow.description: A massive insectoid-made hole connecting to some unseen cave network deep under the surface. The walls are covered in insectoid goop and are too slippery to climb down. Insectoid chittering can be heard from the tunnels beneath. Seems to be empty inside.
LanguageData.VFEPD_VFEI2_LargeBurrow.label: large insect burrow
LanguageData.VFEPD_VFEI2_MediumBurrow.description: A medium-sized insectoid-made hole connecting to some unseen cave network deep under the surface. The walls are covered in insectoid goop and are too slippery to climb down. Seems to be empty inside.
LanguageData.VFEPD_VFEI2_MediumBurrow.label: insect burrow
LanguageData.VFEPD_VFEI2_NuchadusHive.description: A hive of giant insects of the Nuchadus geneline. Non-functional: all its internal mechanisms have been removed.
LanguageData.VFEPD_VFEI2_NuchadusHive.label: fake nuchadus hive
LanguageData.VFEPD_VFEI2_SmallBurrow.description: A small insectoid-made hole connecting to some unseen cave network deep under the surface. The walls are covered in insectoid goop and are too slippery to climb down. Seems to be empty inside.
LanguageData.VFEPD_VFEI2_SmallBurrow.label: small insect burrow
LanguageData.VFEPD_VFEI2_XanidesHive.description: A hive of giant insects of the Xanides geneline. Non-functional: all its internal mechanisms have been removed.
LanguageData.VFEPD_VFEI2_XanidesHive.label: fake xanides hive
LanguageData.VFEPD_VGE_Agrocell.description: An enclosed, space-efficient growing unit designed for use on gravships. Upon closer inspection, it's just a decal!
LanguageData.VFEPD_VGE_Agrocell.label: agrocell
LanguageData.VFEPD_VGE_AmmoBox_GaussShell.description: A small-sized box containing large fake uranium shells.
LanguageData.VFEPD_VGE_AmmoBox_GaussShell.label: gauss shell ammo box
LanguageData.VFEPD_VGE_AstrofuelDrain.description: A hopper-like storage structure meant to input astrofuel into the network, filling up connected tanks.
LanguageData.VFEPD_VGE_AstrofuelDrain.label: astrofuel drain
LanguageData.VFEPD_VGE_AstrofuelGenerator.description: Produces power by consuming astrofuel. Much more efficient than chemfuel generators.
LanguageData.VFEPD_VGE_AstrofuelGenerator.label: astrofuel generator
LanguageData.VFEPD_VGE_AstrofuelPipe.description: Steel pipes. These do not transport anything.
LanguageData.VFEPD_VGE_AstrofuelPipe.label: astrofuel pipe
LanguageData.VFEPD_VGE_AstrofuelSynthesizer.descripti: A specialized structure that refines chemfuel into high-grade astrofuel. It must be connected to the astrofuel pipe network and linked to at least one astrofuel tank to operate. Once connected, it automatically converts inserted chemfuel into astrofuel for use in engines and systems.
LanguageData.VFEPD_VGE_AstrofuelSynthesizer.label: astrofuel synthesizer
LanguageData.VFEPD_VGE_AstrofuelTap.description: A hopper-like storage device meant to hold dispensed astrofuel for use later.
LanguageData.VFEPD_VGE_AstrofuelTap.label: astrofuel tap
LanguageData.VFEPD_VGE_Astropurifier.description: A gravtech unit that enhances the precision and stability of astrofuel refinement. When placed next to an astrofuel synthesizer, it enables perfect 1:1 conversion from chemfuel to astrofuel, though the process takes twice as long.
LanguageData.VFEPD_VGE_Astropurifier.label: astropurifier
LanguageData.VFEPD_VGE_CapacitorHarmonizer.descriptio: A specialized device that balances and synchronizes energy flow between nearby capacitors. This one is non-functional.
LanguageData.VFEPD_VGE_CapacitorHarmonizer.label: capacitor harmonizer
LanguageData.VFEPD_VGE_CompactDrugLab.description: A space-efficient, gravship-powered drug lab designed for use aboard gravships. This one seems to be non-functional.
LanguageData.VFEPD_VGE_CompactDrugLab.label: compact drug lab
LanguageData.VFEPD_VGE_CompactFabBench.description: A space-efficient, gravship-powered fabrication bench designed for use aboard gravships. This one seems to be non-functional.
LanguageData.VFEPD_VGE_CompactFabBench.label: compact fabrication bench
LanguageData.VFEPD_VGE_CompactMachiningTable.descript: A space-efficient, gravship-powered machining table designed for use aboard gravships. This one seems to be non-functional.
LanguageData.VFEPD_VGE_CompactMachiningTable.label: compact machining table
LanguageData.VFEPD_VGE_CompactRefinery.description: A space-efficient, gravship-powered biofuel refinery designed for use aboard gravships. This one seems to be non-functional.
LanguageData.VFEPD_VGE_CompactRefinery.label: compact biofuel refinery
LanguageData.VFEPD_VGE_CompactSmithy.description: A space-efficient, gravship-powered smithy designed for use aboard gravships. This one seems to be non-functional.
LanguageData.VFEPD_VGE_CompactSmithy.label: compact smithy
LanguageData.VFEPD_VGE_CompactStove.description: A space-efficient, gravship-powered stove designed for use aboard gravships. This one seems to be non-functional.
LanguageData.VFEPD_VGE_CompactStove.label: compact stove
LanguageData.VFEPD_VGE_CompactTailor.description: A space-efficient, gravship-powered tailor bench designed for use aboard gravships. This one seems to be non-functional.
LanguageData.VFEPD_VGE_CompactTailor.label: compact tailor bench
LanguageData.VFEPD_VGE_EngineeringConsole.description: An interface used to monitor the maintenance status of all gravship components. It draws power directly from the grav engine. Non-functional.
LanguageData.VFEPD_VGE_EngineeringConsole.label: engineering console
LanguageData.VFEPD_VGE_FlightComputer.description: An advanced computational unit that optimizes data collection during gravship travel. Non-functional.
LanguageData.VFEPD_VGE_FlightComputer.label: flight computer
LanguageData.VFEPD_VGE_GiantAstrofuelTank.description: A monumental astrofuel storage tank that supplies fuel for thrusters on a gravship. Sealed and empty
LanguageData.VFEPD_VGE_GiantAstrofuelTank.label: giant astrofuel tank
LanguageData.VFEPD_VGE_GiantThruster.description:
A massive, reinforced astrofuel thruster built with advanced alloys and ultra-dense vacstone plating. It massively increases the range and maximum size of the gravship. Thrusters require an unobstructed area free of large buildings and gravship substructure.

Requires vacstone blocks, which can be obtained from orbital asteroids.

A gravship can support up to four giant thrusters.
LanguageData.VFEPD_VGE_GiantThruster.label: giant thruster
LanguageData.VFEPD_VGE_GravcorePowerCoil.description: A massive gravtech reactor that channels and amplifies gravitational wave energy into immense electrical output. This one is non-functional.
LanguageData.VFEPD_VGE_GravcorePowerCoil.label: gravcore power coil
LanguageData.VFEPD_VGE_GravheatAbsorber.description: A specialized thermal sink that draws all residual heat from the grav engine, instantly clearing its cooldown. The absorbed heat leaves the gravheat absorber inoperable for an extended period while it safely dissipates the stored energy. Non-functional.
LanguageData.VFEPD_VGE_GravheatAbsorber.label: gravheat absorber
LanguageData.VFEPD_VGE_Gravlift.description: A complex vertical launch and stabilization platform integrated into the gravship’s core structure. This one is non-functional.
LanguageData.VFEPD_VGE_Gravlift.label: gravlift
LanguageData.VFEPD_VGE_GravshipBlackBox.description: An advanced recorder integrated into the gravship’s systems. The only thing this one would do in an accident is be blown to pieces.
LanguageData.VFEPD_VGE_GravshipBlackBox.label: gravship black box
LanguageData.VFEPD_VGE_GravshipCapacitor.description: Stores high amounts of electricity for later use. Or it would, if it wasn't so fake!
LanguageData.VFEPD_VGE_GravshipCapacitor.label: gravship capacitor
LanguageData.VFEPD_VGE_GravtechConsole.description: An interface used to analyze gravdata gathered from gravship launches and travel. Inert.
LanguageData.VFEPD_VGE_GravtechConsole.label: gravtech console
LanguageData.VFEPD_VGE_GunnerSubpersonaCore.descripti: A low-grade subpersona specialized in gravship combat. This one lacks the brain, so it can post on Reddit.
LanguageData.VFEPD_VGE_GunnerSubpersonaCore.label: gunner subpersona core
LanguageData.VFEPD_VGE_IndustrialAstrofuelGenerator.d: Produces a large amount of power by consuming astrofuel. Much more efficient than chemfuel generators.
LanguageData.VFEPD_VGE_LargeHeatsink.description: A large thermal regulator that absorbs heat from gravship travel and slowly converts part of it into usable power while preventing system overheating and decreasing the grav engine cooldown duration. Non-functional.
LanguageData.VFEPD_VGE_LargeHeatsink.label: large heatsink
LanguageData.VFEPD_VGE_LargeMechanoidThruster.descrip: A massive astrofuel thruster built by the mechanoid core to propel their orbital platforms. This one is non-functional.
LanguageData.VFEPD_VGE_LargeMechanoidThruster.label: large mechanoid thruster
LanguageData.VFEPD_VGE_LargeOxygenTank.description: A large oxygen tank that supplies oxygen to pumps throughout the gravship.
LanguageData.VFEPD_VGE_LargeOxygenTank.label: large oxygen tank
LanguageData.VFEPD_VGE_LifeSupportSystem.description: A vital device that processes harvested oxyalgae into breathable oxygen. Converts biomass into gas and pumps it into the oxygen network to supply pressurized rooms and equipment.
LanguageData.VFEPD_VGE_LifeSupportSystem.label: algae oxygenator
LanguageData.VFEPD_VGE_MaintenanceHub.description: A centralized system that optimizes and automates routine upkeep across the gravship. This one is non-functional.
LanguageData.VFEPD_VGE_MaintenanceHub.label: maintenance hub
LanguageData.VFEPD_VGE_MechanoidAstrofuelNode.descrip: A compact fuel reservoir integrated into mechanoid platforms. Empty and sealed.
LanguageData.VFEPD_VGE_MechanoidAstrofuelNode.label: astrofuel node
LanguageData.VFEPD_VGE_MechanoidGravEngine.descriptio: The cold, artificial heart of a mechanoid orbital platform. This one seems inert.
LanguageData.VFEPD_VGE_MechanoidGravEngine.label: mechanoid grav engine
LanguageData.VFEPD_VGE_MechanoidPodLauncher.descripti: A mechanized launch bay that periodically fires drop pods packed with mechanoids. This one is non-functional.
LanguageData.VFEPD_VGE_MechanoidPodLauncher.label: mechanoid pod launcher
LanguageData.VFEPD_VGE_MechanoidResourceProcessor.des: A machine-built structure that sustains mechanoid platforms by breaking down cosmic debris and wreckage into usable resources. This one is non-functional.
LanguageData.VFEPD_VGE_MechanoidTempShield.descriptio: A compact defense unit that projects a localized shield around itself. This one is non-functional.
LanguageData.VFEPD_VGE_MechanoidTempShield.label: mechanoid temp shield
LanguageData.VFEPD_VGE_OxyalgaePlant.description: A fast-growing aquatic plant cultivated in hydroponics and used to generate oxygen when converted in algae oxygenator. This one seems to be a plastic plants.
LanguageData.VFEPD_VGE_OxyalgaePlant.label: oxyalgae plant
LanguageData.VFEPD_VGE_OxygenHarvester.description: A device that draws in breathable oxygen from the surrounding atmosphere and stores it in the oxygen network. It functions only on planetary surfaces with an atmosphere and will not operate in vacuum or low-oxygen environments.
LanguageData.VFEPD_VGE_OxygenHarvester.label: oxygen harvester
LanguageData.VFEPD_VGE_OxygenPipe.description: Steel pipes. These do not transport anything.
LanguageData.VFEPD_VGE_OxygenPipe.label: oxygen pipe
LanguageData.VFEPD_VGE_OxygenReclaimer.description: A self-contained atmospheric unit that extracts trace oxygen from surrounding gases. It produces oxygen at a slow, steady rate, but requires no input materials. Needs to be connected to an oxygen tank via oxygen pipes to work.
LanguageData.VFEPD_VGE_OxygenReclaimer.label: oxygen reclaimer
LanguageData.VFEPD_VGE_SmallHeatsink.description: A compact thermal regulator that absorbs heat from gravship travel and slowly converts part of it into usable power while preventing system overheating and decreasing the grav engine cooldown duration. Non-functional.
LanguageData.VFEPD_VGE_SmallHeatsink.label: small heatsink
LanguageData.VFEPD_VGE_SmallOxygenTank.description: An oxygen tank that supplies oxygen to pumps throughout the gravship.
LanguageData.VFEPD_VGE_SmallOxygenTank.label: small oxygen tank
LanguageData.VFEPD_VGE_SolarPanelling.description: Fake solar panelling built out of cardboard. This will probably win a high school science fair or something. We don't have those where I live, so I have only seen them in movies.
LanguageData.VFEPD_VGE_SolarPanelling.label: solar panelling
LanguageData.VFEPD_VGE_TargetingTerminal.description: A control station dedicated to operating a single gravship artillery piece. Out of order.
LanguageData.VFEPD_VGE_TargetingTerminal.label: targeting terminal
LanguageData.VFEPD_VodkaDrum.description: A cheap container meant for storing water retrofitted to be air tight for short-term fermenting. This one is empty and non-functional.
LanguageData.VFEPD_VodkaDrum.label: vodka drum
LanguageData.VFEPD_VoidSculpture.description: An unsettling sculpture made from bioferrite. Inactive and merely decorative.
LanguageData.VFEPD_VoidSculpture.label: decorative void sculpture
LanguageData.VFEPD_VoidStructure.description: A warped structure made of jagged oily metallic-like pieces. Inactive and merely decorative.
LanguageData.VFEPD_VoidStructure.label: void structure
LanguageData.VFEPD_VoidStructureLit.description: A warped structure made of jagged oily metallic-like pieces. Inactive and merely decorative.
LanguageData.VFEPD_VoidStructureLit.label: void structure, lit
LanguageData.VFEPD_VomitEffect.description: This is an effecter prop for "Vomit". Intrinsically laggy, use in moderation.
LanguageData.VFEPD_VomitEffect.label: vomit
LanguageData.VFEPD_VTE_ACCompressor.description: An air conditioning compressor that needs to be connected to an AC control unit via air ducts. Can only be placed outside. When powered, it allows the AC network to operate two additional AC devices without losing efficiency. Non-functional: all its internal mechanisms have been removed.
LanguageData.VFEPD_VTE_ACCompressor.label: AC compressor
LanguageData.VFEPD_VTE_ACControlUnit.description: A main air conditioning control unit. Connects to compressors to allow AC units to generate cool or hot air. Needs to be connected to compressors by air ducts. AC control unit dictates the desired temperature for all AC units in the same network. Installing too many AC units may decrease the efficiency of the network, increasing the power drain of all devices. Constructing additional compressors will improve the efficiency of the network. Non-functional: all its internal mechanisms have been removed.
LanguageData.VFEPD_VTE_ACControlUnit.label: AC control unit
LanguageData.VFEPD_VTE_ACUnit.description: An air-conditioning machine that fits into a wall. Emits either cool or warm air in the same direction, depending on the current temperature of the room. Unless unlinked from the network settings, it will aim to achieve the temperature specified in the AC control unit. Needs to be connected to the AC control unit via air ducts. Non-functional: all its internal mechanisms have been removed.
LanguageData.VFEPD_VTE_ACUnit.label: AC unit
LanguageData.VFEPD_VTE_ACUnitWall.description: A wall-mounted air-conditioning machine. Emits either cool or warm air in the same direction, depending on the current temperature of the room. Unless unlinked from the network settings, it will aim to achieve the temperature specified in the AC control unit. Needs to be connected to the AC control unit via air ducts. Can only be constructed on a wall. Non-functional: all its internal mechanisms have been removed.
LanguageData.VFEPD_VTE_ACUnitWall.label: wall-mounted AC unit
LanguageData.VFEPD_VTE_IndustrialCooler.description: A large, industrial-type air-cooling machine that fits into a wall. Cool air comes out one side, while hot exhaust comes out the other. Can be used to cool down rooms during summer, or to create a walk-in freezer. It’s capable of cooling the room to much lower temperature than the standard cooler. Non-functional: all its internal mechanisms have been removed.
LanguageData.VFEPD_VTE_IndustrialCooler.label: industrial cooler
LanguageData.VFEPD_VTE_IndustrialHeater.description: A large, industrial-type heater machine that fits into a wall. It converts electricity into heat. It can automatically turn itself on or off to reach a specific target temperature. It is capable of heating up the room to a much higher temperature than the standard heaters. Non-functional: all its internal mechanisms have been removed.
LanguageData.VFEPD_VTE_IndustrialHeater.label: industrial heater
LanguageData.VFEPD_VTE_LargeACCompressor.description: A large air conditioning compressor that needs to be connected to an AC control unit via air ducts. Can only be placed outside. When powered, it allows the AC network to operate six additional AC devices without losing efficiency. Non-functional: all its internal mechanisms have been removed.
LanguageData.VFEPD_VTE_LargeACCompressor.label: large AC compressor
LanguageData.VFEPD_VTE_StandingCooler.description: A free standing air-cooling machine. Cool air comes out of a fan and spreads over surrounding area. Can be used to cool down rooms during summer. Not efficient enough to refrigerate food. Non-functional: all its internal mechanisms have been removed.
LanguageData.VFEPD_VTE_StandingCooler.label: standing cooler
LanguageData.VFEPD_VTE_VentValve.description: Switches air flow on/off. Non-functional: all its internal mechanisms have been removed.
LanguageData.VFEPD_VTE_VentValve.label: air duct valve
LanguageData.VFEPD_VTE_WallHeater.description: A heating machine that fits into a wall. It converts electricity into heat. It can automatically turn itself on or off to reach a specific target temperature. Can be used to heat up rooms during winter. Non-functional: all its internal mechanisms have been removed.
LanguageData.VFEPD_VTE_WallHeater.label: wall heater
LanguageData.VFEPD_VTE_WallMountedCooler.description: A wall-mounted air-cooling machine that fits into a wall. Cool air comes out one side, while hot exhaust comes out the other. Can be used to cool down rooms during summer, or to create a walk-in freezer. Can only be constructed on a wall. Non-functional: all its internal mechanisms have been removed.
LanguageData.VFEPD_VTE_WallMountedCooler.label: wall-mounted cooler
LanguageData.VFEPD_VTE_WallMountedHeater.description: A wall-mounted device that converts electricity into heat. It can automatically turn itself on or off to reach a specific target temperature. Can only be constructed on a wall. Non-functional: all its internal mechanisms have been removed.
LanguageData.VFEPD_VTE_WallMountedHeater.label: wall-mounted heater
LanguageData.VFEPD_VTE_WallMountedVent.description: A simple, wall-mounted vent for equalizing the temperature between two rooms without allowing people to walk between them. Can only be constructed on a wall. Non-functional: all its internal mechanisms have been removed.
LanguageData.VFEPD_VTE_WallMountedVent.label: wall-mounted vent
LanguageData.VFEPD_Wagon.description: A general all-rounder vehicle, the Wagon performs well in all categories with a good cargo and passenger capacity. Non-functional: all its internal wiring and its motor have been removed.
LanguageData.VFEPD_Wagon.label: Wagon
LanguageData.VFEPD_WallFirefoamPopper.description: A wall-mounted variant of the firefoam popper. It is empty.
LanguageData.VFEPD_WallFirefoamPopper.label: wall firefoam popper
LanguageData.VFEPD_WallOrbitalTradeBeacon.description: A wall-mounted version of an orbital trade beacon. Inactive.
LanguageData.VFEPD_WallOrbitalTradeBeacon.label: wall orbital trade beacon
LanguageData.VFEPD_Warbird.description: A general-purpose fighter plane, the Warbird is an incredibly fast and effective attack craft. Non-functional: all its internal wiring and its motor have been removed.
LanguageData.VFEPD_Warbird.label: Warbird
LanguageData.VFEPD_WarChariot.description: The war chariot is a mobile archery platform operated by two people, with the driver steering the chariot with his reins while the main archer aims his bow and arrow at any targets within range. Non-functional: all its internal mechanisms have been removed.
LanguageData.VFEPD_WarChariot.label: War chariot
LanguageData.VFEPD_WarehouseShelfBoxes.description: An impassable warehouse shelf with boxes.
LanguageData.VFEPD_WarehouseShelfBoxes.label: warehouse shelf with boxes
LanguageData.VFEPD_WarehouseShelfEmpty.label: warehouse shelf
LanguageData.VFEPD_WarningBoard.label: warning board
LanguageData.VFEPD_WarpedMopBucket.label: warped mop bucket
LanguageData.VFEPD_WashingMachine.label: washing machine
LanguageData.VFEPD_WaspDroneTrap.description: Several dormant and inactive wasp drones.
LanguageData.VFEPD_WaspDroneTrap.label: wasp trap
This is an effecter prop for "Wastepack Atomizer Operating". Intrinsically laggy, use in moderation.
LanguageData.VFEPD_WaterChestnut.description: An aquatic vegetable that grows in marshes, under water, in the mud. This one is fake. Intended to be placed over water. Or wherever you want, I'm not your mom!
LanguageData.VFEPD_WaterChestnut.label: water chestnut
LanguageData.VFEPD_Watercress.description: Watercress is a rapidly growing, perennial plant. It is one of the oldest known leaf vegetables consumed by humans. This one is fake. Intended to be placed over water. Or wherever you want, I'm not your mom!
LanguageData.VFEPD_Watercress.label: watercress
LanguageData.VFEPD_WaterDispenser.description: A large, standing fresh water dispenser.
LanguageData.VFEPD_WaterDispenser.label: water dispenser
LanguageData.VFEPD_WaterMain.description: A large node connecting all the nearby water mains. Upon closer inspection it is disconnected from the water grid.
LanguageData.VFEPD_WaterMain.label: water main
LanguageData.VFEPD_WaterTank.label: water tank
LanguageData.VFEPD_WeaponRackEmpty.description: A long weapon rack. There aren't any weapons on it at the moment.
LanguageData.VFEPD_WeaponRackEmpty.label: empty weapon rack
LanguageData.VFEPD_WeaponRackSpears.description: A long weapon rack. There is a selection of spears mounted on it.
LanguageData.VFEPD_WeaponRackSpears.label: spears weapon rack
LanguageData.VFEPD_WeaponRackSwords.description: A long weapon rack. There is a selection of swords mounted on it.
LanguageData.VFEPD_WeaponRackSwords.label: sword weapon rack
LanguageData.VFEPD_WeatherController.description: An ultratech device for controlling weather. Using chemicals and exotic fields, it forces the weather into a particular configuration. Looking inside, you'll discover it's actually a cardboard cutout without any relevant machinery.
LanguageData.VFEPD_WeatherController.label: weather controller
LanguageData.VFEPD_WeepingToxberry.description: A short toxin-adapted shrub with berries so unbelievably toxic that no animal would ever dare consume them. This one is fake.
LanguageData.VFEPD_WeepingToxberry.label: weeping toxberry
LanguageData.VFEPD_Wheat.description: A fake, amber cereal plant that takes almost an entire growing season to come to fruition. While fragile and time-consuming, this wheat has been genetically engineered to gently break into flour with a mere touch.
LanguageData.VFEPD_Wheat.label: wheat
LanguageData.VFEPD_Wheelbarrow.description: The wheelbarrow: Your trusty sidekick for moving stuff from 'point A' to 'point B' with all the pizzazz of a one-wheel parade float. Non-functional: all its internal mechanisms have been removed.
LanguageData.VFEPD_Wheelbarrow.label: Wheelbarrow
LanguageData.VFEPD_WheeledBed.description: An old-fashioned metal bed frame with a hard mattress and uncomfortable duvet.
LanguageData.VFEPD_WheeledBed.label: wheeled bed
LanguageData.VFEPD_WhiskeyCask.description: A huge barrel meant for aging a high volume of whiskey at once. This one is empty and non-functional.
LanguageData.VFEPD_WhiskeyCask.label: whiskey cask
LanguageData.VFEPD_WildRadagast.description: This twisting alien plant grows small glowing berries. This one is fake.
LanguageData.VFEPD_WildRadagast.label: wild radagast
LanguageData.VFEPD_WillowTree.description: One of the fastest growing shade trees, fake willows provide a beautiful, leafy canopy. It doesn't yield much usable wood.
LanguageData.VFEPD_WillowTree.label: willow tree
LanguageData.VFEPD_WineRack.label: wine rack
LanguageData.VFEPD_Wisent.description: A military-grade all-purpose transporter, the Wisent is a powerful truck capable of transporting both plentiful cargo and soldiers into hostile territory. Non-functional: all its internal wiring and its motor have been removed.
LanguageData.VFEPD_Wisent.label: Wisent
LanguageData.VFEPD_WitchesOyster.description: A small, ramified fungal colony with a pungent aroma. This one is fake.
LanguageData.VFEPD_WitchesOyster.label: witches' oyster
LanguageData.VFEPD_Witchwood.description: A fake small toxin-adapted tree with a twisted trunk.
LanguageData.VFEPD_Witchwood.label: witchwood tree
LanguageData.VFEPD_WoodenATM.description: A non-functional wooden money dispensing machine.
LanguageData.VFEPD_WoodenATM.label: wooden ATM
LanguageData.VFEPD_WoodenBookshelf.description: A bookshelf containing a variety of unreadable tomes and publications.
LanguageData.VFEPD_WoodenBookshelf.label: wooden bookshelf
LanguageData.VFEPD_WoodenChest.label: wooden chest
LanguageData.VFEPD_WoodenChestLarge.label: large wooden chest
LanguageData.VFEPD_WoodenCupboard.label: wooden cupboard
LanguageData.VFEPD_WoodenCupboardDouble.label: wooden double cupboard
LanguageData.VFEPD_WoodenCupboardNarrow.label: wooden narrow cupboard
LanguageData.VFEPD_WoodenCupboardPlates.description: A large cupboard with some plates.
LanguageData.VFEPD_WoodenCupboardPlates.label: wooden cupboard with plates
LanguageData.VFEPD_WoodenDivider.label: wooden divider
LanguageData.VFEPD_WoodenLogs.description: A small, passable stack of wooden logs.
LanguageData.VFEPD_WoodenLogs.label: wooden logs
LanguageData.VFEPD_WoodenLogsLarge.description: A large, impassable stack of wooden logs.
LanguageData.VFEPD_WoodenLogsLarge.label: large wooden logs
LanguageData.VFEPD_WoodenMallet.description: A small wooden mallet. Intended to be placed over an empty workbench. Just for decorative purposes.
LanguageData.VFEPD_WoodenMallet.label: wooden mallet
LanguageData.VFEPD_WoodenMilitaryCrate.description: A rotten military box. Sealed shut.
LanguageData.VFEPD_WoodenMilitaryCrate.label: rotten military box
LanguageData.VFEPD_WoodenMirror.label: wooden mirror
LanguageData.VFEPD_WoodenPlankDivider.label: wooden plank divider
LanguageData.VFEPD_WoodenPlatform.description: A wooden platform to walk on.
LanguageData.VFEPD_WoodenPlatform.label: wooden platform
LanguageData.VFEPD_WoodenShortCupboard.label: wooden short cupboard
LanguageData.VFEPD_WoodenShortCupboardPlates.label: wooden short cupboard with plates
LanguageData.VFEPD_WoodenSign.description: A tall post with signs pointing in different directions.
LanguageData.VFEPD_WoodenSign.label: wooden sign
LanguageData.VFEPD_WoodenTallCabinet.label: wooden tall cabinet
LanguageData.VFEPD_WoodenVendingMachine.label: wooden vending machine
LanguageData.VFEPD_WoodenWagon.description: A large stationary wagon to carry goods.
LanguageData.VFEPD_WoodenWagon.label: wooden wagon
LanguageData.VFEPD_YellowBellPepper.description: Also known as sweet peppers, bell peppers are technically nightshades. This one is fake.
LanguageData.VFEPD_YellowBellPepper.label: yellow bell pepper
LanguageData.VFEPD_YinYangMote.description: This is a fleck prop for "Yin Yang". Intrinsically laggy, use in moderation.
LanguageData.VFEPD_YinYangMote.label: yin yang
LanguageData.VFEPD_Yoga.description: This is a mote prop for "Yoga Symbol". Intrinsically laggy, though less than effecter props. Use in moderation.
LanguageData.VFEPD_Yoga.label: yoga symbol
LanguageData.VFEPD_Zapcap.description: A large, bulbous, beige mushroom that is known to produce small amounts of electricity as it grows. This one is fake.
LanguageData.VFEPD_Zapcap.label: zapcap
LanguageData.VFEPD_ZeusCannonCapacitorBank.descriptio: A capacitor bank that transforms electricity into raw energy for the Zeus cannon. Seems to be inactive.
LanguageData.VFEPD_ZeusCannonCapacitorBank.label: zeus cannon capacitor bank
LanguageData.VFEPD_ZeusCannonControlStation.descripti: This terminal serves as the primary interface for operating the Zeus Cannon batteries. Seems to be inactive.
LanguageData.VFEPD_ZeusCannonControlStation.label: zeus cannon control station
LanguageData.VFEPD_ZeusCannonStatic.description: A relic of ancient Sophiamundan technology, the Zeus Cannon is a closely guarded secret of the Empire. Wait, what is this? It's... made of cardboard!
LanguageData.VFEPD_ZeusCannonStatic.label: static zeus cannon
LanguageData.VPEPD_EmptyAdvResearch.description: A working surface to fill with laboratory stuff. Non-functional for research purposes.
LanguageData.VPEPD_EmptyAdvResearch.label: empty hi-tech research bench
LanguageData.VPEPD_EmptyBrewery.description: A working surface to fill with brewery stuff. Non-functional for crafting purposes.
LanguageData.VPEPD_EmptyBrewery.label: empty brewery
LanguageData.VPEPD_EmptyElectricSmelter.description: A working surface to fill with smeltery stuff. Non-functional for crafting purposes.
LanguageData.VPEPD_EmptyElectricSmelter.label: empty smelter
LanguageData.VPEPD_EmptyFabrication.description: A working surface to fill with fabrication stuff. Non-functional for crafting purposes.
LanguageData.VPEPD_EmptyFabrication.label: empty fabrication bench
LanguageData.VPEPD_EmptyResearch.description: A working surface to fill with laboratory stuff. Non-functional for research purposes.
LanguageData.VPEPD_EmptyResearch.label: empty research bench
LanguageData.VPEPD_EmptyScultingTable.description: A working surface to fill with sculpting stuff. Non-functional for crafting purposes.
LanguageData.VPEPD_EmptyScultingTable.label: empty sculpting table
LanguageData.VPEPD_EmptySmithy.description: A working surface to fill with smithing stuff. Non-functional for crafting purposes.
LanguageData.VPEPD_EmptySmithy.label: empty smithing table
LanguageData.VPEPD_EmptyStonecutter.description: A working surface to fill with stonecutting stuff. Non-functional for crafting purposes.
LanguageData.VPEPD_EmptyStonecutter.label: empty stonecutting table
LanguageData.VPEPD_EmptyTableMachining.description: A working surface to fill with machining stuff. Non-functional for crafting purposes.
LanguageData.VPEPD_EmptyTableMachining.label: empty machining table
LanguageData.VPEPD_EmptyTailoring.description: A working surface to fill with tailoring stuff. Non-functional for crafting purposes.
LanguageData.VPEPD_EmptyTailoring.label: empty tailoring table
LanguageData.VPEPD_EmptyWorkbench.description: A working surface to fill with production stuff. Non-functional for crafting purposes.
LanguageData.VPEPD_EmptyWorkbench.label: empty workbench
LanguageData.VPEPD_VCE_BakeryOven_Electric.descriptio: An electric oven designed for baking cookies, pastries, and cakes with reliable, consistent heat distribution for perfect results every time. Non-functional.
LanguageData.VPEPD_VCE_BakeryOven_Electric.label: electric bakery oven
LanguageData.VPEPD_VCE_BakeryOven_Fueled.description: A wood-fueled oven designed for baking cookies, pastries, and cakes. Its steady heat ensures even cooking and sweet results. Non-functional.
LanguageData.VPEPD_VCE_BakeryOven_Fueled.label: fueled bakery oven
